Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.

This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.

Let me be clear: I will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. I will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.

I have gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against me — and against every voter who values free and fair elections, and privacy.

Grassroots support is our firewall. That means us. That means you.

**We aim to raise $25,000 before midnight to demonstrate our response in the face of this abuse of power.**

**[Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have my back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120560048/586650563/-569431239?refcode=251203em-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzljMjEyYy1hNGQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oMlZomK25dui4ND9q523x52fSwZSj5AOdroAUp3piGw=)**

Peter,
---
I’m so angry right now that it’s hard to find the words...
---
**Under Kathy Hochul, New York has REFUSED to honor ICE detainers and RELEASED 6,947 _criminal_ _illegal_ _aliens_ back onto New York’s streets since January 20th! **
---
**The crimes of these aliens include:

\- 29 homicides
-2,509 assaults
-207 sexual predatory offenses
-199 burglaries
-305 robberies
-392 dangerous drugs offenses
-300 weapons offenses
**
---
When I say Kathy Hochul’s sanctuary state policies are _KILLING_ New Yorkers, I’m not exaggerating: She’s turned our state into a dumping ground for violent criminals that should have been deported!
---
Given the horrific crimes these illegals are committing, you might think Democrats would run from their embrace of violence and sanctuary policies.
---
But instead, they’ve doubled down.
---
Hochul’s endorsed mayor of New York – Communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani – even described violence as **“an artificial construction”.**
---
_...Was the violence “artificial” when a sleeping woman riding the subway was**burned alive** by an illegal alien in Hochul’s New York last December?

...Was the violence “artificial” when a veteran was recently brutally **stabbed to death** by an illegal who never should have been in our country? _
---
I don’t say any of that to be graphic...
---
__I say it because no one else will__. I say it because while so-called Democrat “leaders” are busy dismissing even the idea of violence, REAL New Yorkers are paying the price.
---
And while New York Democrats enable these brutal crimes with their sanctuary policies, they’re busy weaponizing the legal system to try and imprison a president who fights for those very Americans they’ve abandoned.
---
Their priorities are completely backwards – and it will END the second I take office.
---
_As the next Governor of New York, I will END the sanctuary madness on Day One, restore law and order, and work with federal authorities to deport every single criminal illegal migrant._
---
There will be no more innocent victims of sanctuary state policies on my watch!
---

clean_body: This is Hochul’s sanctuary state policy in action. | Peter, I’m so angry right now that it’s hard to find the words... Under Kathy Hochul, New York has REFUSED to honor ICE detainers and RELEASED 6,947 criminal illegal aliens back onto New York’s streets since January 20th! The crimes of these aliens include: \- 29 homicides -2,509 assaults -207 sexual predatory offenses -199 burglaries -305 robberies -392 dangerous drugs offenses -300 weapons offenses When I say Kathy Hochul’s sanctuary state policies are KILLING New Yorkers, I’m not exaggerating: She’s turned our state into a dumping ground for violent criminals that should have been deported! Given the horrific crimes these illegals are committing, you might think Democrats would run from their embrace of violence and sanctuary policies. But instead, they’ve doubled down. Hochul’s endorsed mayor of New York – Communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani – even described violence as “an artificial construction”. ...Was the violence “artificial” when a sleeping woman riding the subway wasburned alive by an illegal alien in Hochul’s New York last December? ...Was the violence “artificial” when a veteran was recently brutally stabbed to death by an illegal who never should have been in our country? I don’t say any of that to be graphic... I say it because no one else will. I say it because while so-called Democrat “leaders” are busy dismissing even the idea of violence, REAL New Yorkers are paying the price. And while New York Democrats enable these brutal crimes with their sanctuary policies, they’re busy weaponizing the legal system to try and imprison a president who fights for those very Americans they’ve abandoned. Their priorities are completely backwards – and it will END the second I take office. As the next Governor of New York, I will END the sanctuary madness on Day One, restore law and order, and work with federal authorities to deport every single criminal illegal migrant. There will be no more innocent victims of sanctuary state policies on my watch! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat and military Vet running in the GA-14 special election for the seat just vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene. The House is currently 213 (D) to 219 (R). The date of the election has not been set but we know it'll be in the next few weeks. If Republicans lose here we would decimate their majority in the House long before next November. Plain and simple. That's why my team is all hands on deck right now. We're staffing up, running ads and making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target and won't be able to sustain this if we don't catch back up ASAP. clean_body: | | | Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat and military Vet running in the GA-14 special election for the seat just vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene. The House is currently 213 (D) to 219 (R). The date of the election has not been set but we know it'll be in the next few weeks. If Republicans lose here we would decimate their majority in the House long before next November. Plain and simple. That's why my team is all hands on deck right now. We're staffing up, running ads and making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target and won't be able to sustain this if we don't catch back up ASAP. | ~~ ~~ ~~ This race is make or break and you have the power to help Democrats break the Republican trifecta. Let's leave it all on the field. -Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

I lost everything in my life too many times to count. I lost my first wife and unborn child in a car crash. I've been through bankruptcy and a divorce. I've been to war four times and came back with the scars both mentally and physically that come with that. Just like so many Americans, I've been knocked down and gotten back up. **And now I 'm running for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country--against a Congresswoman who's done nothing other than sell us out. ** My name is Fred Wellman. I'm a 22-year Army veteran, entrepreneur, and dad running for Congress in Missouri's Second Congressional District. Ann Wagner hasn't held a town hall in years, she's tripled her net worth while in Congress, and she's been nothing other than a rubber stamp on Trump's agenda. **But I need your help to take this seat back for the people. Can you chip in $15, $5, or even just $3 to support my campaign?**

name: David Hogg
subject: VICTORY: Akbar Ali just won his runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is huge, Peter:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251201-1&t=1&akid=2902%2E587540%2EjpgVso)
This is huge, Peter:
**We just helped Akbar Ali win his runoff election to become the youngest state legislator in Georgia. Taking that title from our former candidate from last cycle, State Rep Bryce Berry who was elected at 23 years old last year.**
And get this: _he won by just 153 votes. That means every ounce of support made a difference._
Akbar built his foundation of support the hard way: months of door knocking, one conversation at a time, even traveling with two interpreters so every community could be heard and included in his campaign.
And Leaders We Deserve had his back. Together, we turned a long-shot race into a victory for a candidate who represents the best of what the next generation has to offer. Not only was the LWD team on the phone with Akbar non-stop, not only did we financially support him, we also showed up to knock doors with him in the district. Your support made it possible for us to be the largest financial backer in his race. THANK YOU for helping us make history.
Now that Akbar has won his election, he can focus on his top priorities in office:
\- Lowering the costs of everyday expenses for Georgia families
\- Reducing the burden of health care costs
\- Fully funding schools and keeping students, teachers, and school staff safe
\- Fighting Trump's agenda and protecting communities from extremist policies
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251203_1_victory.1hZOzw&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20251203-2902&t=2&akid=2902%2E587540%2EjpgVso)
**We’re not stopping here, Peter. We’ve got more candidates to elect and more change to make happen.**
**[Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help power our movement?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251203_1_victory.1hZOzw&refcode=em20251203-2902&amount=5&t=3&akid=2902%2E587540%2EjpgVso)**
With each victory under our belts, we’re proving that young people are a force to be reckoned with and that voters of all ages are ready for a new generation to lead.
Your support is the reason we’re going to elect even more candidates like Akbar who are ready to deliver on the progressive future we all deserve.
**[Can you make a $5 contribution to help elect the next generation of bold young leaders who are ready to take the torch?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251203_1_victory.1hZOzw&refcode=em20251203-2902&amount=5&t=4&akid=2902%2E587540%2EjpgVso)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251203_1_victory.1hZOzw&amount=5&refcode=em20251203-2902&t=23&akid=2902%2E587540%2EjpgVso)**
Thank you for your support,
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251201-1&t=24&refcode2=2902_587540_jpgVso&akid=2902%2E587540%2EjpgVso)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=2902%2E587540%2EjpgVso)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2902%2E587540%2EjpgVso)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve

Washington, DC 20003

#### [Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/134fa406-6cd8-4a34-857b-f8331a87c599?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/134fa406-6cd8-4a34-857b-f8331a87c599?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Just wrapped a wild, fast-moving live session with **Don Lemon** , and this one had everything -- Trump pardoning Henry Cuellar out of nowhere, the economy tanking in real time, Pete Hegseth's mounting legal disaster, Tennessee's special election, and yes... Olivia Nuzzi, against both of our wills. It was sharp, funny, a little chaotic, and honestly one of my favorite conversations we've had so far.
Here's where to jump in:
**[00:01:22]** Trump shocks everyone by pardoning Henry Cuellar -- and we try to untangle what political favor he's cashing in this time.
**[00:05:58]** The economy hits a wall: brutal job numbers, collapsing small businesses, and why Trump keeps pretending we're in a "golden age."
**[00:10:40]** Pete Hegseth's war-crime spiral, Trump's sleepy cabinet meeting, and Marco Rubio derailing everything with college football takes.
**[00:15:12]** Tennessee's special election breakdown -- why a nine-point GOP win in a Trump +22 district should terrify Republicans heading into 2026.
**[00:20:33]** The double-income crisis, housing costs, and why Americans keep ping-ponging between parties looking for someone -- anyone -- who will make their lives livable again.
_**[This episode is packed with corruption, economic freefall, voter frustration, and the cracks forming inside MAGA's power structure. If conversations like this matter to you -- real, grounded, no-BS -- help me keep them going. Become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency today.](https://substack.com/redirect/134fa406-6cd8-4a34-857b-f8331a87c599?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Trump is unhinged
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
He is desperately flailing to save his disgraceful presidency.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1978%2E791427%2EH7qxgK)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251203-2-180&t=2&akid=1978%2E791427%2EH7qxgK)
Friend, Trump is unhinged.
We are watching a sad man who is desperately flailing to save his disgraceful presidency.
The cost of living is rising thanks to his reckless tariffs.
Insurance premiums are skyrocketing.
Millions are losing their healthcare and food assistance.
The economy is losing jobs instead of adding them.
His ICE raids are inhumane and unpopular.
His approval ratings are down the drain.
He lost “bigly” in November’s elections.
And his cabinet is busy committing war crimes, helping spread measles, and lying to Congress.

name: Team Cori
subject: The tide is turning. And our movement is leading that shift.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251203_TideTurning_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251203_TideTurning_act]
AIPAC’s political stranglehold is slipping, and fast.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251203_TideTurning_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251203_TideTurning_act]
The tide is turning. And our movement is leading that shift.
Multiple politicians who once relied on the pro-Netanyahu PAC have committed to no longer accepting money from AIPAC. That’s huge. For decades, this lobby has spent millions, shaped elections, and pressured members of Congress. Now, even those representatives who are part of the establishment are rethinking those ties.
After AIPAC spent record-shattering sums to defeat Cori and other progressives in 2024, the political landscape is finally shifting. Their reputation took another hit after Zohran Mamdani defeated Andrew Cuomo twice , despite backing from Donald Trump and the same right-wing billionaires backing Wesley Bell.
But, Peter, this does not mean AIPAC is backing down. In fact, they’re entering 2026 with massive resources and their backs against the wall. They will do everything in their power to protect their allies and pursue candidates like Cori.
AIPAC will try again. They’ll try to silence pro-peace, pro-justice voices. They’ll pour money into our district, into our opponent's campaign. And to be clear, Bell won’t fight back against Trump, not when he is beholden to the same funders.
But every dollar, every volunteer, every act of courage strengthens our movement and keeps Cori fighting for Missouri and for our country. Let’s show them that people-power beats megadonors. Donate today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251203_TideTurning_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

In solidarity,
Team Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251203_TideTurning_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251203_TideTurning_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: My new legislation re: Venezuela
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends,
Today I filed a War Powers Resolution to block the use of U.S. forces in hostilities against or within Venezuela unless authorized by Congress.
I’ve been pressing the administration for weeks on illegal war activity they’re waging in the Caribbean and Pacific — strikes against boats they believe to be part of a drug trade, with limited evidence about whether that is in fact the case. More than 20 boats have been attacked, and more than 80 people have been killed.
Now, with looming threats of land strikes in Venezuela, Trump is trying to start a new, pointless forever war, and I’m doing all I can to stop him.
The American people do NOT want more forever wars, decided in secret and waged without the congressional debate and authorization the Constitution requires.
The framers of the Constitution were very clear, and they believed very strongly that no president — not even George Washington! — should be able to go to war without a vote of Congress. Unauthorized military action against Venezuela would be a colossal and costly mistake that needlessly puts servicemembers’ lives at risk.
If you agree that any war must be debated and voted on by Congress, please add your name today to support my resolution. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/unWZ5Rg7YESc33TyoP8jxA2]
Thank you for speaking up with me. I’ll share updates as we learn more.
-Tim Kaine
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. [**To reserve your card today, make sure to make a donation of $7, or whatever you can afford here →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251203_5440_fr&refcode2=5440_22930333_QkPXiG&akid=5440%2E22930333%2EQkPXiG) **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20251203_5440_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5440_22930333_QkPXiG&akid=5440%2E22930333%2EQkPXiG)** Every contribution goes towards electing Democrats up and down the ballot in every corner of the country. body:
We noticed your answer to Question 8 on our Voter Verification Questionnaire ... and we have to ask:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor. * * *
Folks, welcome back to _Amped Up_ --and look, today's thumbnail says it all: Pete Hegseth playing G.I. Joe on a beach with Kristi Noem while claiming he couldn't tell if he blew people up because of the "fog of war"? Give me a break.
Before we even got into the meat of today's show, we had to start with a little schadenfreude--**my** schadenfreude, to be precise. See, David Shuster is a proud University of Michigan alum, and after four years of owning Ohio State, he came into this season feeling pretty invincible. But when the Buckeyes finally pulled off the win, the man had to honor his bet. Which meant Shuster--Michigan Man himself--opened the show by singing the Ohio State fight song while I, an Ohio resident, sat there beaming like it was Christmas morning. His pain was my joy, and honestly, it was the perfect appetizer before we dove into the heavy stuff.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a90cfd8b-e5f3-4485-b821-5780df78263a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hahahahahahahahaha!
But unlike sports or the Hegseth circus, we had someone serious with us today--someone grounded in reality, science, decency, and actual public service. And I mean that sincerely.
Today, we got to talk with Connecticut State Senator **Saud Anwar** , and I'll tell you right now: if every state had one like him, this country would be in a hell of a lot better shape.
* * *
Subscribe for free and help us elevate more voices like Sen. Anwar.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._842nJD27_deVCSt3TnOvn0uBFcRvwd7pRJd1Yww5vM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180627151)
* * *
Saud is not just a legislator--he's a physician, a pulmonary expert, a former mayor, and a guy who actually _gets_ what's happening to working families in the real world. We started with something that hit me hard: he chose to live for nearly two weeks on just **$6.20 a day** , the SNAP food allowance Republicans are slashing. I've talked policy my whole career, but hearing a doctor and state senator describe losing weight, losing sleep, losing basic human comfort--because he wanted to understand what tens of thousands of his residents face daily--that landed differently. This wasn't a stunt. This was empathy as action. It was leadership.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a90cfd8b-e5f3-4485-b821-5780df78263a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Senator Saud Anwar Facebook_ Senator Saud Anwar lunch on October 29
And Saud didn't mince words: the Trump administration's attacks on public health, SNAP, Medicaid, housing, vaccines, childcare--they aren't theoretical. They are targeted assaults on the basic wellbeing of an entire nation. In Connecticut alone, **36,000 -42,000 people** are about to lose food benefits. **182,000** are slated to lose Medicaid. And as Saud said, "What good is the federal government if it doesn't take care of its people?" The man is right.
* * *
Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication; please consider subscribing.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._842nJD27_deVCSt3TnOvn0uBFcRvwd7pRJd1Yww5vM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180627151)
* * *
We dug into the Trump administration's illegal maritime bombings--yes, bombings--which violate U.S. law, military law, and international law. Saud was blunt: if you start normalizing killing people without due process, whether at sea or at home, you are no longer a functioning democracy. And you know what? He's not wrong. We're watching an administration shred constitutional restraints like they're Pete Hegseth's dignity in that ridiculous pool photo.
We also talked about local resistance: Connecticut's efforts to protect residents from masked ICE agents, banning courthouse arrests, strengthening childcare, boosting vaccination rates to the highest in the nation, and trying--desperately--to maintain humane government in an era when the federal level is run by corporate oligarchs and cruelty merchants.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a90cfd8b-e5f3-4485-b821-5780df78263a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Sen. Anwar got in trouble for this sign, which I think is amazing.
But the moment that stuck with me most? Saud revealing he's been _personally_ threatened repeatedly--by anti-vaxxers, white supremacists, extremists--because he dares to protect people. And he still shows up, still passes legislation, still fights. That's courage. That's service. That's patriotism.
I'll be honest: I don't often say this about politicians. But this man gives me hope. Real hope. He's doing the work. He's speaking out--even against his own party when necessary. And he's building a model for what democratic governance should look like.
Follow him. Support him. We need more leaders like Saud Anwar--and far fewer Fog-of-War Hegseths running around pretending their incompetence is valor.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a90cfd8b-e5f3-4485-b821-5780df78263a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *

name: The Angry Democrat: Matt Diemer
subject: Welcome to The Angry Democrat: Matt Diemer
body:
Thank you for subscribing to The Angry Democrat

| |
---|---|---
| Hey everyone -- welcome to my Substack, **The Angry Democrat**.
My name's **Matt Diemer** , and I'm a two-time congressional candidate for **Ohio 's 7th District** in Northeast Ohio.I created this because, frankly, I'm angry. I'm pissed off at poor policy, at a political system that's lost the will to do what's right for ordinary people. I'm tired of a two-party system that would rather trade insults than actually work for the public good. Because democracy needs a spine!This Substack is where I talk about **politics** , **policy that matters** , the **future of our country** , and fromeconomics to technology and the social shifts shaping what's next.Thanks for subscribing. Stick around, share your thoughts, and let's get loud about making this country work for the people again.
* * *
**Some housekeeping ...**If you can't find the newsletter, check your spam folder. And please mark this address as 'not spam.' If the newsletter isn't in your spam folder, either, you should look in the Promotions tab.You can always see everything on the website.Thanks again, and please tell a few friends if you feel like it.(C) 2025 Matt Diemer
548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Don’t worry. We still won.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
The results are in from Tennessee’s 7th District, and while we didn’t win, what happened last night is going to reshape the battlefield for 2026.
Republicans only held onto this seat by about 9 points. Last cycle, they won it by 22.
That means voters in one of the GOP’s “safest” districts moved thirteen points toward Democrats, even after Trump personally intervened, his super PAC dumped seven figures into the race, and Mike Johnson flew in to save it.
If Republicans are suddenly defending districts they used to sleep through, they’re going to have to spend money in places they never planned to. That means fewer resources for them in actual swing districts and more opportunities for Democrats to compete. The 2026 field is shifting and fast!
Peter, we’re proud of the work we did together in TN-07, and we’re already digging into the data to understand exactly where this movement is gaining strength. We’ll follow up with a full analysis soon.
But today, we hope you feel what we feel: We’re not just on the right track, we’re winning the long game.
In solidarity,
GOTV PAC
P.S. If you’re able, chip in $15 or whatever you can to help us jump straight into the next race. Last night proved something big: when voters hear from us, margins move, and elections change! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12032025]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12032025]
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Yesterday was just the beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Our voter registration and mobilization work for the 2026 midterm elections may have started with yesterday's appeal, folks, but there is a long way to go to accomplish our goal of increasing voter participation in our elections.
Help keep the momentum going by fueling our registration and mobilization work with $24 or whatever you can afford to give right now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=120325_2&amount=24]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team,
We're sure your inbox has been packed with emails over the last few days, just like ours have. We're sorry to add another one to it, but it's Giving Tuesday and we're kicking off our end-of-year voter registration campaign now to break through all the clutter. If "voter registration campaign" was all you needed to hear to support our work, you can click right here and skip the rest of this message [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=120325_2&amount=24] .
If you're a long-time supporter of ours you've likely heard this a lot, but -- it only costs us about $3 to register a voter. That means for every $15 we raise, five new voters could be added to the rolls ahead of the 2026 elections. Defenders of voting rights have shown up strongly at the polls in 2025 but with recent voter suppression bills defining who gets to vote and how, we have to do everything we can to make sure we get as many pro-democracy voters filling out a ballot next year as possible.
Remember, we're a 100% grassroots-funded organization. We don't have any millionaires bankrolling us from the shadows. Everything we've done to defend voting rights has come from our supporters getting these emails and trusting us to get the job done. We're grateful for your support -- but we've got to call on you again as we ramp up for next year.
Team: Fuel our voter registration efforts with $24 or whatever you can today. Every dollar goes towards registering voters and protecting your right to vote >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=120325_2&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Mark Harris
subject: Stand with Homeschool Families: Support My Fight Against College Discrimination
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/markharrisforcongress.com/stand-with-homeschool-families-support-my-fight-against-college-discrimination?e=4024c5123e)
---
| | [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=24d67a0442&e=4024c5123e)
---
| **Dear Friend,** **I'm committed to defending the values that make our nation great: individual liberty, parental rights, and equal opportunity for all. **Today, I'm reaching out with urgent news, and a call for your partnership in a critical battle for fairness in education.

**I proudly introduced the Homeschool Graduation Recognition Act a landmark bill designed to end the unfair discrimination against homeschool graduates in college admissions.** Despite outperforming peers, homeschool students are routinely penalized in admissions. My bill forces transparency and ties federal funding to fair treatment, no more second-class status for homeschool families.
---
| [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=8c51e46919&e=4024c5123e)
---
| **This legislation isn't just a bill, it's a beacon of hope for homeschool communities nationwide. But we can't do it alone.** With the radical left's deep pockets and influence, we'll face fierce opposition. That's why I'm turning to you, our grassroots champions, to fuel this fight.

Every dollar brings us closer to victory. Whether it's $25 to reach one more family or $500 to amplify our message on Capitol Hill, your gift today will echo in classrooms and dorm rooms for generations.Thank you for your unwavering support of faith, family, and freedom. **Together, we'll ensure no child is discriminated against for the courage of their parents.**
---
| [DONATE HERE!](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=7d76526627&e=4024c5123e "DONATE HERE!")
---
|
Thank you for standing with us,

Mark Harris

Peter,
Great news: our Patagonia gear giveaway and gift match for Giving Tuesday has been extended! If you missed it yesterday, you can still have your gift up to $5,000 matched by a generous donor and be entered to win some Patagonia gear. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2] You have until midnight tonight!
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=e/HfOmxx3jZ0hlSPcsbYxyjSyYFOL4a5cqiwriN8ceX+gxrLfHfVLoUh4dnSFBkqaUChmevexC67PlJkvA63GXv6Fkq67imx63sQ6IpdR7A0+QCDiASF/cTiRyJ9fTvS]
Here are the details:
🎒 What: Win a free Patagonia hoodie, sling bag, hip pack, and fleece gloves (that can be exchanged for your preferred size and color) with a gift of $100 or more to OLCV for Giving Tuesday! Your will also be matched by a generous donor.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=e/HfOmxx3jZ0hlSPcsbYxyjSyYFOL4a5cqiwriN8ceX+gxrLfHfVLoUh4dnSFBkqaUChmevexC67PlJkvA63GXv6Fkq67imx63sQ6IpdR7A0+QCDiASF/cTiRyJ9fTvS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=e/HfOmxx3jZ0hlSPcsbYxyjSyYFOL4a5cqiwriN8ceX+gxrLfHfVLoUh4dnSFBkqaUChmevexC67PlJkvA63GXv6Fkq67imx63sQ6IpdR7A0+QCDiASF/cTiRyJ9fTvS]
🗓️Deadline: 11:59pm on Tuesday, December 2nd
🌲 Why: To have your gift matched to protect our wildlife and habitat, clean air and water, and our future!
It’s Giving Tuesday, so please consider giving any amount here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2] to have your gift matched so that we can reach our goal if you are not able to give $100.
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/P_pwjnifC0W8kwEdUF518Q2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=e/HfOmxx3jZ0hlSPcsbYxyjSyYFOL4a5cqiwriN8ceX+gxrLfHfVLoUh4dnSFBkqaUChmevexC67PlJkvA63GXv6Fkq67imx63sQ6IpdR7A0+QCDiASF/cTiRyJ9fTvS]
Thank you for supporting our work to fight for a climate safe and healthy future.
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator

body:

null, it’s Haley with some important news.

**Brand-new polling just confirmed again: I’m the best Democrat to defeat Republican Mike Rogers. Not only does this poll show me up in my primary election, it’s proof that I’m the only Democrat in this race who can take on Mike Rogers.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10014?t=3&akid=1555%2E49239%2EpYVSWb)
This news is going to draw the GOP’s attention, and that’s going to come with a wave of cash from MAGA megadonors and a fresh round of attacks. But let me make this clear, null – I’m ready.

Whatever Trump, Rogers, and their billionaire megadonors throw at me, I’ll be ready to fight back.
**Are you with me, null? Now is the time.** _[**Chip in $5 to help me compete with the GOP’s megadonors so we can win this race and keep Michigan blue.**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10011?t=4&akid=1555%2E49239%2EpYVSWb)_

Let's go.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10038?t=9&akid=1555%2E49239%2EpYVSWb) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10010?t=10&akid=1555%2E49239%2EpYVSWb)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey Derek, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: Can you split a donation of $5 to my reelection campaign and Senator John Fetterman today?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52382?t=1001&akid=10458%2E434096%2E7H-j_r

Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.

And I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.

That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.

There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.

So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us.

If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and Senator John Fetterman today.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52382?t=1002&akid=10458%2E434096%2E7H-j_r

The campaign will be brutal.

But this team wins the hardest battles.

We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.

Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.

And we will win again — with your help.

Please: send $5 to my reelection campaign and Senator John Fetterman today.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52382?t=1003&akid=10458%2E434096%2E7H-j_r

With gratitude,

Senator Jon Ossoff

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52377?t=1004&akid=10458%2E434096%2E7H-j_r

--------

According to our records, your 2025 Republican State Leadership Membership Card has NOT been activated. Our team members are working day and night to defend Conservative values nationwide and are fighting to stop the Radical Left from destroying our nation! | Republican State Leadership MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING Republican State Leadership is counting on you to act NOW to stand with us as we put an end to the Left's radical agenda! body:
Peter,

name: Kristen Waggoner
subject: May God give us courage to defend the truth
body:
There’s a sense right now—you can feel it—that something is shifting.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdjgidsomvf17nn0qgat2kgkek4d1lg5hnu9a5ao_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c3gm6o36c1h2bs)

## ****
Dear Friend of Freedom,

There's a sense right now--you can feel it--that something is shifting.

People are weary of censorship, weary of hostility to faith, weary of watching freedom bow to ideology.

Some call it a "vibe shift."

But a vibe shift alone will not sustain a nation.

A cultural moment is fragile. It doesn't pass laws, build institutions, or defend the next generation's rights.

That's why Alliance Defending Freedom exists--[to turn conviction into action and ensure that liberty endures in law.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6p4at371lr77mbeor6edvche5m7t2fka7gj0s38_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c3gm6o36c1h2bs)

**America now stands alone in the Western world, still upholding robust protections for religious liberty and free expression.**

* In the UK and Europe, Christians have been arrested for praying silently outside abortion facilities and criminally prosecuted for posting Bible verses on social media.

* In Mexico, current and former congressmen have been convicted of "gender based political violence" for speaking biological truth.

* And here at home, our freedoms often hang by a single vote at the Supreme Court.

**Freedom is not self-perpetuating. It must be defended --case by case, precedent by precedent, generation by generation.**

Your gift today helps ADF defend that freedom in the courtroom, protect those silenced for their faith, and secure lasting victories that no administration can undo.

Please make your gift before December 31. And right now, every dollar you give will be matched--dollar for dollar while matching funds last.

This moment will pass. But your action today can make freedom endure.

[Give now to defend freedom before the match expires.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrefeljrcg451sq0s3o37djvhmlm3f67213qmajo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c3gm6o36c1h2bs)

May God give us the conviction to stand firm, the grace to speak truth in love, and the faith to defend the freedom that allows both truth and love to flourish.
With gratitude to God,

**Kristen Waggoner**
CEO, President & Chief Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom
---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

clean_body: There’s a sense right now—you can feel it—that something is shifting. | | | ** Dear Friend of Freedom, There's a sense right now--you can feel it--that something is shifting. People are weary of censorship, weary of hostility to faith, weary of watching freedom bow to ideology. Some call it a "vibe shift." But a vibe shift alone will not sustain a nation. A cultural moment is fragile. It doesn't pass laws, build institutions, or defend the next generation's rights. That's why Alliance Defending Freedom exists-- America now stands alone in the Western world, still upholding robust protections for religious liberty and free expression. In the UK and Europe, Christians have been arrested for praying silently outside abortion facilities and criminally prosecuted for posting Bible verses on social media. In Mexico, current and former congressmen have been convicted of "gender based political violence" for speaking biological truth. And here at home, our freedoms often hang by a single vote at the Supreme Court. Freedom is not self-perpetuating. It must be defended --case by case, precedent by precedent, generation by generation. Your gift today helps ADF defend that freedom in the courtroom, protect those silenced for their faith, and secure lasting victories that no administration can undo. Please make your gift before December 31. And right now, every dollar you give will be matched--dollar for dollar while matching funds last. This moment will pass. But your action today can make freedom endure. May God give us the conviction to stand firm, the grace to speak truth in love, and the faith to defend the freedom that allows both truth and love to flourish. body:

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbe22i7d0j8t5io6v4uqdr5q2njibhqframm41h0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c3gm6o33c1h2bs)

Hi Advocate for Life, For nearly two decades, **PreBorn!** has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation. We do two simple but powerful and life-changing things: We help women in crisis **see their babies and hear their heartbeats through free ultrasounds** , and we offer **gospel-centered, compassionate care** at our Network Clinics. Those two things change everything and we can’t do them without people like you. When a mother hears her child’s heartbeat for the first time, fear gives way to faith.

A tiny miracle begins the story of a mighty future.

Hope breaks through the darkness. Your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and shares the love of Christ with a woman in need. As our thank-you for your gift, you’ll receive the [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures 2026 Calendar_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb0ii6sfr09erspifhtg3m4o5o8c768sc1t68i7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c3gm6o33c1h2bs) __ filled with **scripture and a monthly prayer guide** to help you lift up mothers, babies, and the ministry of PreBorn! all year long in prayer.

# **[Man who brought Happy Meal to buy 11-year-old girl for sex slavery will be deported after serving decades in prison](http://trk.libertyledger.-w)**
---
A man living in Oklahoma was convicted for charges related to the attempted sexual trafficking of a minor after getting caught in an undercover sting operation. Braulio Luna, 59, arranged to purchase an 11-year-old girl for sexual activity, but unbeknownst to him, he was speaking to police officers pretending to be human traffickers.'There is actually ... code words that people use to advertise these. And once you are in the trade, you understand what these code words are.' The operation involved officers posting ads as a mother who was trying to sell her 11-year-old daughter.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-w)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/IBnHn2UYMSRVGwk5OBKPmg)
# **[Catholics form coalition opposed to the death penalty amid execution surge](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/IBnHn2UYMSRVGwk5OBKPmg)**
---
Sister Helen Prejean is an anti-death-penalty advocate. / Credit: Don LaVange via Wikimedia Commons Washington, D.C. Newsroom, Dec 3, 2025 / 16:42 pm (CNA). Catholics and pro-life conservatives joined a broad coalition of more than 50 organizations seeking to end the death penalty in the United States amid the 2025 surge in executions.Leaders of the coalition, the U.S. Campaign to End the Death Penalty (USCEPD), said they hope the coordinated team can abolish the death penalty in states where it is still practiced. Capital punishment is still on the books in 27 states, but just 16 have executed prisoners over the past decade.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/IBnHn2UYMSRVGwk5OBKPmg)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)

The Trump administration is demanding that NY AG Letitia James hand over 7,000 criminal migrants in state prisons with ICE detainers.

# **[DHS to increase operations in Twin Cities region as Somali fraud becomes unignorable](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
As deportation operations continue to clean up sanctuary cities across the country, the Department of Homeland Security is focusing on another hub of problematic immigration: the Minneapolis-St. Paul region of Minnesota. The Washington Examiner reported that Tom Homan, the Trump administration's border czar, hinted at an immigration enforcement surge there as soon as this week. 'Focus is on those Twin Cities more because of the criminal activities there that've been uncovered by DOJ and DHS.

body:
We can make November 3, 2026 the night MAGA breaks—and the night Colorado helps lead America back toward democracy.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3hRutFzFk2BXnvmma1bBW2aKv0iBRQ_98q-Ut6A3tWnkaASWzKg53G-bhXPz_mGYQflydFA-a344bOs4-F0QKUNUTwk3P_HFkRTkPI2j7th-yXQWIq_UmPN87G2nNXfjHZwxx42Ow_-gQalq2bGtCLxzxtrsHVFwqcYtRlfWnd2dcV7cil5wDQwy74y0i-B7ADozdtnSpJ_4K_5j_lAcvKWgAve20hT&c=b2gCi6pXeKRbadvsgDzKU4qoQ8_J3el0NipTrJTNH-_TCNJymnEwbQ==&ch=BcS3c8Y53KqM6ukPjaIUy4poiSwD32BQp1Q9ptvKkirH57HbSDINJw==)

Peter,
Picture this: it's the night of November 3, 2026.
Trump and MAGA have been strutting for months, certain they'll sweep the midterms. They've been bragging about a "red wave" and mocking Democrats as "finished."
But then the results start rolling in. Democrats are winning across the country. Upsets in district after district. The so-called MAGA strongholds are falling like dominoes.
And then--late in the night--the biggest shock of all: "Democrat Trisha Calvarese defeats Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th District."
MAGA is reeling. Trump goes into meltdown mode, posting unhinged rants online, crying like a baby that there's no way Boebert could lose--it must be rigged. But this time, there's nothing he can do. The will of the voters has spoken, and they rejected his fascist administration.
Boebert fades into irrelevance, back to serving up her diarrhea-inducing pork sliders at that bar of hers. And the whole world sees the truth: MAGA is not invincible. It's crumbling.
That future is possible--but only if we fight for it.
This is our moment to deliver the blow that breaks MAGA's grip on America. But it will only happen if we build the grassroots movement strong enough to take Boebert down.
[Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to fuel our campaign and make this future a reality?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3hRutFzFk2BXnvmma1bBW2aKv0iBRQ_98q-Ut6A3tWnkaASWzKg53G-bhXPz_mG_saU33TW_koEFA36fCQQwRGsGCA5BWWCKSj3keQyG8JqoytecJ0y9svc8ctfpgQ9oN0IP4oHbPCLWwUpoyAJX4119-gqDcLwVbBUp3XOUacn3MsPNaxMufNjIva01kh4kjTzX0VCPb5FPJe6wapGAEo75HIHmxsSC6rMLmNASGI=&c=b2gCi6pXeKRbadvsgDzKU4qoQ8_J3el0NipTrJTNH-_TCNJymnEwbQ==&ch=BcS3c8Y53KqM6ukPjaIUy4poiSwD32BQp1Q9ptvKkirH57HbSDINJw==)

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: ICYMI: Settlement reached in federal lawsuits surrounding citizenship verification, including Indiana lawsuit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
“This landmark settlement provides Indiana with long-overdue tools to protect the integrity of our elections,”
"This landmark settlement provides Indiana with long-overdue tools to protect the integrity of our elections," No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-altqo-hhlljjcji-q/) **IN CASE YOU MISSED IT** [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-r/)
# **Settlement reached in federal lawsuits surrounding citizenship verification, including Indiana lawsuit**
[Click Here to Read the Full Story](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-y/) Fox 59
David Gay
December 3, 2025
[https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/settlement-reached-in-federal-lawsuits-surrounding-citizenship-verification-including-indiana-lawsuit/](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-j/)
INDIANAPOLIS -- A settlement has been reached in multiple federal lawsuits surrounding citizenship verification and preventing non-citizens from voting, including a lawsuit filed in the Indiana Federal Court.According to a joint news release from the Indiana Attorney General's office and the Indiana Secretary of State's office, the lawsuit was settled in late November in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Florida.Multiple states filed a lawsuit, including Indiana and Ohio, against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security to "confirm the citizenship and immigration status of individuals in response to requests by state and local governments." The agreement settles those lawsuits from multiple states."This landmark settlement provides Indiana with long-overdue tools to protect the integrity of our elections," Indiana Secretary of State Diego Morales said in the release. "Hoosiers deserve absolute confidence that every lawful vote counts and that our voter rolls are accurate and secure."Indiana filed its lawsuit to verify the citizenship of more than 550,000 state voters in April. According to [previous reports](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-t/), Todd Rokita, Indiana's attorney general, and Morales accused the department of failing to confirm whether certain individuals were registered to vote in the state.This comes after the two petitioned the United States Citizenship and Immigration Services agency to verify the citizenship of 585,774 residents in October 2024, something that they requested to be completed prior to the November 2024 general election."Because of Indiana's leadership and persistence in bringing this lawsuit, the settlement now guarantees every state and territory in America... will have access to these modernized federal verification tools for the next 20 years," the release said.The release claims that preliminary results from the new U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services verification process "confirm that at least 165 identified non-citizens have registered to vote in Indiana." The release also claims that "at least 21 noncitizens have cast ballots in recent elections.""From day one, many individuals dismissed our work as a 'witch hunt'--but the facts speak for themselves: non-citizen voting is real here in our state, and even one illegal ballot undermines the trust we are told to have in our election processes and even the Republic itself," Rokita said. "This settlement delivers the federal access we're entitled to under law, allowing the Secretary of State to swiftly remove ineligible voters from the rolls and fortify our system against future risks. Indiana's elections will be more transparent, fairer and more secure as a result." [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-i/) to read the full details of the settlement. [Click Here to Read the Full Story](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-d/) [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-h/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-k/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-u/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-o/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-b/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-n/) [Click Here to Support Your Indiana Republican Party](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-altqo-hhlljjcji-c/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-altqo-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-a) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-u-altqo-hhlljjcji-f/)

subject: 3 reasons this Democrat urgently needs your support
body:
As Tracy Chapman once said: “Give me one reason,” well... we’ll give you three.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010dLw4fIC8Vs0uFJPUYsrzLUtYrE42JTschgHIUUQXAul2gWb1uTLuT6vnX9NGksq32seSFsissQ0isbCjrEly0qdNSsPRmmId4DGAl7dkhQhQedI4VCpt7Do89eVf0ljEsgkRKwLDOM1dS9Xf0eBm0B1_IPRqCNv7oXbCqIolymCq04LrfXQBql01QtqS9N6rBOhxe0mR4hHMsIpgFlTllN9Ntf3G2ZA&c=n4oZNg_Ojej8hCUszxrKd1mVMKpMg9c1_sGyUQ-Jkr0f-eUQ1x7gkg==&ch=ySp78cUKQoEYW9xVAwR5SxBjOnLCkzjX1fGg9iFUG_jgsKcf9qLP7A==)

|
Peter,
Illinois' 9th District just became ground zero in the battle for the future of the Democratic Party.
With Democrat Jan Schakowsky retiring, one of the safest Democratic seats in the entire country is suddenly open and forces outside of Illinois are scrambling to claim it--establishment DC power brokers, MAGA billionaires, AIPAC, and corporate lobbyists.
Bushra Amiwala is running to make sure that IL-9 stays a strong, unapologetically progressive seat, not a trophy for MAGA billionaires or the DC elite. As one of the top-funded campaigns in this race, she is considered a frontrunner to be the next representative for IL-9.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010dLw4fIC8Vs0uFJPUYsrzLUtYrE42JTschgHIUUQXAul2gWb1uTLuT6vnX9NGksq32seSFsissQ0isbCjrEly0qdNSsPRmmId4DGAl7dkhQhQedI4VCpt7Do89eVf0ljEsgkRKwLDOM1dS9Xf0eBm0B1_IPRqCNv7oXbCqIolymCq04LrfXQBql01QtqS9N6rBOhxe0mR4g3IieXl4FcykBqH_fmt5AA&c=n4oZNg_Ojej8hCUszxrKd1mVMKpMg9c1_sGyUQ-Jkr0f-eUQ1x7gkg==&ch=ySp78cUKQoEYW9xVAwR5SxBjOnLCkzjX1fGg9iFUG_jgsKcf9qLP7A==)
---
You might be wondering: why is Bushra the candidate Democrats should be supporting right now?
As Tracy Chapman once said: "Give me one reason," well... we'll give you three.
A new generation Democrat with real experience: Bushra started organizing against Trump's first administration straight out of high school and she's spent 7 years in elected office delivering for Skokie families. She's the rare candidate who brings fresh energy to the party with day-one readiness. Democrats desperately need both in 2026.
A people-first agenda that meets the moment: Bushra is fighting for the people of IL-9, not corporations and special interests. Her agenda includes:

* Universal healthcare
* Tuition free college and university
* Affordable housing and lower costs
* Ending America's blood soaked foreign policy
* Abolishing ICE and holding agents accountable for their crimes

MAGA & AIPAC are trying to buy this seat: Because they can't win IL-9 with a Republican, MAGA billionaires and AIPAC are funneling money into the campaign of one of Bushra's opponents who will fold in Congress when Trump demands it.
Bushra is going toe-to-toe with these MAGA billionaires but she desperately needs the support of Democrats across the country to ensure this seat stays in the hands of a strong Democrat who will take the fight to Trump and MAGA's extremism in Congress.
[Will you chip in $50, $25 or whatever you can spare to help Bushra Amiwala win this race and keep this deep-blue seat in the hands of a strong Democrat?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010dLw4fIC8Vs0uFJPUYsrzLUtYrE42JTschgHIUUQXAul2gWb1uTLuT6vnX9NGksqiCo1HchTOPlzFTl4pPJR_22DzvKplS8vAMSLk7PGUp1pC4WhJcuDc5jw0vF8EiXe8BQUSGStZtMcwY_A1FzXgio_HS0BclFeJ6tTjQA_80jDH8xQDEhkQUdgWK9IkdPDztQ7L6i0gM9rquCK0_BzlOIgA-ybEKOpLq8ZegluT5E=&c=n4oZNg_Ojej8hCUszxrKd1mVMKpMg9c1_sGyUQ-Jkr0f-eUQ1x7gkg==&ch=ySp78cUKQoEYW9xVAwR5SxBjOnLCkzjX1fGg9iFUG_jgsKcf9qLP7A==)

clean_body: As Tracy Chapman once said: “Give me one reason,” well... we’ll give you three. | | | | | == | Peter, Illinois' 9th District just became ground zero in the battle for the future of the Democratic Party. With Democrat Jan Schakowsky retiring, one of the safest Democratic seats in the entire country is suddenly open and forces outside of Illinois are scrambling to claim it--establishment DC power brokers, MAGA billionaires, AIPAC, and corporate lobbyists. Bushra Amiwala is running to make sure that IL-9 stays a strong, unapologetically progressive seat, not a trophy for MAGA billionaires or the DC elite. As one of the top-funded campaigns in this race, she is considered a frontrunner to be the next representative for IL-9. | == You might be wondering: why is Bushra the candidate Democrats should be supporting right now? As Tracy Chapman once said: "Give me one reason," well... we'll give you three. A new generation Democrat with real experience: Bushra started organizing against Trump's first administration straight out of high school and she's spent 7 years in elected office delivering for Skokie families. She's the rare candidate who brings fresh energy to the party with day-one readiness. Democrats desperately need both in 2026. A people-first agenda that meets the moment: Bushra is fighting for the people of IL-9, not corporations and special interests. Her agenda includes: Universal healthcare Tuition free college and university Affordable housing and lower costs Ending America's blood soaked foreign policy * Abolishing ICE and holding agents accountable for their crimes MAGA & AIPAC are trying to buy this seat: Because they can't win IL-9 with a Republican, MAGA billionaires and AIPAC are funneling money into the campaign of one of Bushra's opponents who will fold in Congress when Trump demands it. Bushra is going toe-to-toe with these MAGA billionaires but she desperately needs the support of Democrats across the country to ensure this seat stays in the hands of a strong Democrat who will take the fight to Trump and MAGA's extremism in Congress. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Thank you for your support, Team Bushra | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Troy Downing
subject: We MISSED our goal by $67 – but there’s still time to act.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Second chances don’t come around often, Peter.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)We **MISSED** our November fundraising target by just **$67. **
That may not sound like much, but if more conservatives don’t step up, **we’re going to lose ground FAST.**
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[ That’s why we’ve officially EXTENDED our internal November deadline until MIDNIGHT on 12/4.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._PZWKD1MEaww4u0uNoLtQ)
Democrats are ahead by **MILLIONS** in the race for the House. If we don’t change course now, we can **SAY GOODBYE** to our Republican Majority in 2026.
I need every Patriot reading this to step up ASAP.
Let’s close this gap and defend the America First agenda before it’s too late.
Thanks,Troy[RUSH YOUR EMERGENCY DONATION NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)| |

name: The Flyover
subject: New Car Standards, Rare Hallmark Ornaments, and a Drunk Raccoon
body:
President Trump announced on Wednesday that he is [rolling back fuel economy standards](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdCB72cNQuEhDd2lTImMvh6M1PhnfIf4-IkV-IN1II73RvK_7dLeBw_b4tJFMWdK00bEzlUL5is7mvdjN2-z3bDOtljnaCSTcagW1xMnbwOeElTcLEVBbkVG6wx476GW1mllL3S2Auu0leokD6U472foe5h5wroK5aAokKiWxHRpaVO_tcAOaYR7ICZTkQ0m5-U5hKystfKY35calWLFZS3nuov0QMAoYj-No3Da7qxQwXmgBowIBo2wFjCW_4rNeXsQ1ubSleNZ_B5u1RK6y8c8jMIe90wLlI9rAv1PlX37eBn4CAAD__w7xeEU) set under the Biden administration, lowering the requirements from 50.4 miles per gallon by 2031 to roughly 34.5 mpg.

# Thursday, December 4, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1780, [Lieutenant Colonel William Washington](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ_GdIfsxWAoXPz6JbpLkRQprQUvh6MFn2zfoXv7iBR5gXQz0mg-6fu8uisGDvvtDTeyZYlupyMzlULpjDOmXHD3mHxOmGhF5g0dSGgvCi5SO4-BX05X3i5EQE1FVplO97qDXlarXSY_Kxi0RtOAaYycFM5L25quN4PybRXs-aZAaqWkboaaFtV7HFqgCaaBZqEl-VBiqr9i2MtKC7_ik1I9x61iu5Zyz6L5J2AUMB7HUc-YIuOO50DA-PFfwPhOz8iPEuIuYEy_xaXHjZhebgvM2UG9lo2rZP39CMwhd0Zoedsw8A-t_EnR08J3AAAA__9ev3yL), cousin of General George Washington, used a fake cannon made from a pine log to trick Loyalist Colonel Henry Rugeley and his troops into surrendering at Rugeley's Mills. 🎧 New polling for the 2028 Republican primary has surfaced, showing some eye-catching shifts and prompting a closer look at JD Vance and Donald Trump Jr. as the early field develops. There's a lot to unpack, and host Ayla Brown breaks it down on today's _[Flyover Podcast](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7FqwzAQgOGnkbcY6XSxrUFDoXhqSqHQjuZknWIV2Q6SkpC3L-krdPunD_7v03SimOJ2fqeVbQ37tPG9JK6V8zNnyqXS5in7kinzQimtNIGE40HBQeLkKabHhI23gRlYN2xV3-GAHQyyWSx0OoBGPQTAwEdUCp0h7N3sevBON9E-NQUSlZKoTctBDZ7MEdiBMzwLlOxj3XP7s8etLhzSY79xbud9bZJdar0UoV8EjALGx36t19axgDF_mg9jvu70VoQeq9CvGqHJ1l_uMaVYul6gPK8U059U_7V_s_AbAAD__9IMbO8)_. 🎁 Later today, we'll send you [_The Flyover Christmas Gift Guide_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz79utDAQBPCnsbtD9rL8K1x8Dd19bUq0xmvYyMDJOHe6t49IkwdIN9KMftJ83Kc7SZJ9-U8buxKPaefXmbgUzlecKZ-F9kA5nJkyr5TSRhMYaG4WbganQJLeE-rgIjNwrdnZrsUeW-iNXl3sLPYcTAMNe29mH-fBIw6mJTY11VrcpVkwaK3Beqg42j7Q0AB78APPCg0HKUeuPg_Zy8oxvY8n52o-Np3cWsrjVPU_BaOC8bdeJJblSwJfOwWjzi48XpKSnG2n0CwbSfoxyp-OPx18BwAA__-ynW23), a quick, stress-free roundup of gifts people actually _want_ , so you can finally cross off that last hard-to-shop-for person on your list. If you're tired of watching institutions scoop up life-changing gains before you even see the chart, today's sponsor, [DM Intelligence](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFqwzAMQL_GuTXYspM4Bx8GJYNBC4PBoJegxHLjzUlax23Wvx8p-4PdxOMhPfR5aA_og5_ORxzJJDe3E61LoJQobmOPcUk4WYx2iRhpwBBGbIFDsROw46q16MOjVZk1jghIZmREVSqtStA8G4zrO2lVSbwm3Re1FgUUEqUC6bBDXWXebNsEcCUEV7LOyQltsS6AOuhq6pniZH2aY_41-ykN5MJjvlPM-3nMghlSuixMvjBoGDTruubWXa8_OsXvzWDQqMMJjq8MGvh4fzvJTZTNzVsm95VmUC7zLfbUPkEcN3DrBJP7vztbGhRZNPay-hD8UlZM8fOIPjwT0r_-djfwGwAA__9sHn67) reveals how everyday investors can finally access the same early "Native Market" opportunities long before they ever hit Coinbase.

## Trump Rolls Back Fuel Economy Rules
President Trump announced on Wednesday that he is [rolling back fuel economy standards](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdCB72cNQuEhDd2lTImMvh6M1PhnfIf4-IkV-IN1II73RvK_7dLeBw_b4tJFMWdK00bEzlUL5is7mvdjN2-z3bDOtljnaCSTcagW1xMnbwOeElTcLEVBbkVG6wx476GW1mllL3S2Auu0leokD6U472foe5h5wroK5aAokKiWxHRpaVO_tcAOaYR7ICZTkQ0m5-U5hKystfKY35calWLFZS3nuov0QMAoYj-No3Da7qxQwXmgBowIBo2wFjCW_4rNeXsQ1ubSleNZ_B5u1RK6y8c8jMIe90wLlI9rAv1PlX37eBn4CAAD__w7xeEU) set under the Biden administration, lowering the federal regulatory goal from 50.4 miles per gallon by 2031 to roughly 34 mpg. The administration claims the move will [save American families $109 billion](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DmUe2McMQONiE7G-6IWrj9tArYyO7gT-3X7FX-FmpVCpVvT9f8xdQpPT-DRtaDnlOeNWIzFhuuUCpDMlD8bVAwRVi3GDWUvdCaSHN7IHiZzattwFRY9eiVcPTvMxTv2S72mFwTnnlvHfQQT9AGHpwfjHdAmM_YEv2blNaGqWk6cYHBvXyMPYanXYjLo2R6IlzefzNlHjFED_5xPJY8tZGuzLvtel-NXpq9HRd1yPkb3dUSljrnWn0FPK3uI-JPUdiWmqjJy7HtosjnUhRrFQ5F1pEwYosHHlMIhwYRTkiVsH54CqUHIWjGCknUeGk9K5tsX6_bq8-h8bI9wYU_y_jH-E8rf4XAAD__4Pqjtg) over five years and is pitched as a cost-saving reset that could shave $900 to $1,200 off the sticker price of new gas-powered vehicles. Trump called the Biden-era rules unrealistic and said Americans should have more affordable vehicle options that match how people actually drive. Under Biden, the government required car companies to increase the fuel efficiency of passenger cars and light trucks partly in order to stimulate the production and sale of electric vehicles in the U.S., and move away from gas-fueled cars.
## Charlie Kirk Tops Wikipedia's 2025 List
Wikipedia released its 11th annual [list of most-read articles](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2ypCAQx0-DGRa0MGpAsInZbLqh1UqrvYswBcxMze23fPVu8JKuTn7_rz_3-Y4cOO6_8SRXtzRHepdAtVK-3hVzqRg9Zl8yZjowhBNnUGClBqnM7JHDZzaNdxsRUNeQ0_3NDOYGg2oOZ-2y6c5a7Hsc9ECoLFDvLS0wEuHYsLvUNCijtTLd2NKmB4-jBVpgGWkVRpHnmnL7N3GsB23hk16U2zWdTXBHrY8iul8CJgHTm__xSZ5xS8_osXKKbcq7gOkqJmC6zARMGgRM6joYY3rGleMuL_hxwUWeqVSZCb3EXHkNVGTa5DfcZOcfbw6By60XRu0ncviKU3-04cvB_wAAAP__KvCFpw), revealing conservative Christian activist Charlie Kirk's page topped 2025 with nearly 45 million views, largely driven by his assassination at a university campus debate in September. Approximately 15 million views came the day after his death, when the page was being viewed by around 170 people every second, with over 40% of traffic originating from outside the United States. The annual "[Deaths in 2025" page came in second](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8GOiN7Mdy5cJGG7k-bEu3Zy7E5g5G9OnJvHxHlDf5qdzTS6Jv59TV_ISfenz9xIy9Lnnc6ayIRKtcbsFTBPWKJtWChFVPacAYNgzKgtJ0jcvrMto1-IQLqW_LmNtq7HeGu29UPzvVmCNYGJOdgCHYIFm6DHp0ZoY8t-yvNgLbGaNu7jhZzj-gGoAc8HIXGaoosuXS_M--y0pI--U2lC3lrk19Fjtr0PxqYGpjO8-xef3C_zAamq811UDjvmNR_vVKhqmQlJflQoFXiKiovastV1JvppKhOfvFBkVFhEQ6JquJdXbANTG3x8Tg5Ja7jrbH6uSGnf0TyrRnfHv4GAAD__1rIhxo) with 42.5 million views, which has never ranked lower than third since the Wikimedia Foundation began tracking most-read articles 11 years ago. People spent an estimated 2.4 billion hours reading English Wikipedia articles in 2025. Serial killer Ed Gein took third place with 31.2 million views, driven by Netflix's latest season of _Monster_ , while [President Trump ranked fourth](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOpC92AQXLv4mXf72SrTBS7yXBSPbSpS3P3GvcN1oNJrRfF-3-YYsvD_-40a-rmne6V2EaqV8ygVzqbgHzKFkzBRRZMMZFNhOQ6fMHJDlM5s2-JUIaGjJ68toJjPCpNro0Tm1YBgsDNaOqIFsWM0wkbtMZPTUsj_bNCijtTKD62nVU0Bnge5wd7Q0RlHgmnL_nXivkVb5pBflfklbKz7WepRm-NfAtYHrgv35oP9gTOlMnF7ELEzdk_Ozq-ko3ZuffFBg7IRL7TRoBda5sY91kzb7cLxZhMt4aYx6bMjyO1b_ROjl4ScAAP__NeJ6Zg) with 25.1 million views, marking his eighth appearance on the list since 2015. Other top 10 entries included Elon Musk, New York City mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani, and Ozzy Osbourne, who died in July.
## Veteran Raises $1.3 Million After Pension Loss
Ed Bambas, an [88-year-old Army veteran in Brighton](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ8GukXG-PgpXKShu7Qp0YLXh6O1fbKdI-TpI_IK6UYaaTTf93Ff7ujYhcc7etLFxiXQkZlKoXTFDVMuGAwmkxMm2pHZ4yKFvEErQajFoONzUbXRlkhSV5Nuh16NqpejqHc9DMp2E1Ev7TBtKw52xW1Ea5VobziY2ulrrZVCta1Q3dSQbUeD003SKteJtkoJMq7E1HxGF8pOls_4otRs0des91KeuereKjlXcj6Oozm-z5-rrOR80VRyHkc4CRNENvCiQgkDrLRFTxly3BwyeDIOIVPIWFwMgBnKHr8yBpMhIfMJJcJO_ITdeUhUXKI6afM8HLPL_VAp8fDo-O9X-ZfMl5a_AQAA__9yE40f), Michigan, has raised $1.4 million online after revealing he works fulltime at a Meijer grocery store because he lost his pension. Influencer Samuel Weidenhofer met Bambas while filming random acts of kindness at the store. After hearing his story, he posted a video that quickly went viral. [Watch the video here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uxCAQxfHTQLcWjDE2BUWkyN2miCJFSmONl8EmwR8Css7ePnKukO4VT7_i_34drhhiWKcXXMgWvw0rHTlSKZTOecOUC64Ok8sJE80Y44IDCGguEi5CDQ5DfAyKO-uJgGpOVrZadUpDJ_hsfSNHI5wfW61VLbu2NkJKrZoRUEJreLCnJkEoKYWqTUVedg5NAzTCaOjGlCAXypaqzy2sZSYfH9udUnXbFh7tXMqeWf3EoGfQH8dRhTUXnBIu54NBvzPon1-_6ecjf71Fx6Dnybr9CDGGrFumxLRgiH9e-VeEu4XfAAAA__9stm-7). Bambas, who retired from GM in 1999, lost his pension and benefits after the company’s bankruptcy and returned to work to make ends meet following his wife's death. The overwhelming response from strangers online may finally let him retire for good. [See his fundraiser here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuhDAQBNCvMZ2RvecDrnCRhu7SpkSGXR-OFnwyGxB_H5FfSDfF04w0X8_hGRKn9fUZFvIS87DSsTGJULniFMomYcVQcCuh0ByYlzCAgbu2oI0bMCQ-B1ehj0RAt4q8bRvXuQY6U80exoijNbZxGG2HY2sai-DG1kBsu7apkr_aLBhnrXG3R02XC4870AjjgyblDGGSXOrvnFaZKfKZdyr1lJeK_Szy3tTtQ0GvoD-Oo37l-LPiQhdQ0EcF_Uz81l2nTwpFZ0a9k1AJqybUkjWnnfSRZNZTXmIuUhWP7yMxp61plTOvJST-G5R_vbR7-A0AAP__fCx8vA).

clean_body: President Trump announced on Wednesday that he is set under the Biden administration, lowering the requirements from 50.4 miles per gallon by 2031 to roughly 34.5 mpg. | | | | | | Thursday, December 4, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1780, , cousin of General George Washington, used a fake cannon made from a pine log to trick Loyalist Colonel Henry Rugeley and his troops into surrendering at Rugeley's Mills. 🎧 New polling for the 2028 Republican primary has surfaced, showing some eye-catching shifts and prompting a closer look at JD Vance and Donald Trump Jr. as the early field develops. There's a lot to unpack, and host Ayla Brown breaks it down on today's . 🎁 Later today, we'll send you , a quick, stress-free roundup of gifts people actually want , so you can finally cross off that last hard-to-shop-for person on your list. If you're tired of watching institutions scoop up life-changing gains before you even see the chart, today's sponsor, reveals how everyday investors can finally access the same early "Native Market" opportunities long before they ever hit Coinbase. | Trump Rolls Back Fuel Economy Rules President Trump announced on Wednesday that he is set under the Biden administration, lowering the federal regulatory goal from 50.4 miles per gallon by 2031 to roughly 34 mpg. The administration claims the move will over five years and is pitched as a cost-saving reset that could shave $900 to $1,200 off the sticker price of new gas-powered vehicles. Trump called the Biden-era rules unrealistic and said Americans should have more affordable vehicle options that match how people actually drive. Under Biden, the government required car companies to increase the fuel efficiency of passenger cars and light trucks partly in order to stimulate the production and sale of electric vehicles in the U.S., and move away from gas-fueled cars. Charlie Kirk Tops Wikipedia's 2025 List Wikipedia released its 11th annual , revealing conservative Christian activist Charlie Kirk's page topped 2025 with nearly 45 million views, largely driven by his assassination at a university campus debate in September. Approximately 15 million views came the day after his death, when the page was being viewed by around 170 people every second, with over 40% of traffic originating from outside the United States. The annual " with 42.5 million views, which has never ranked lower than third since the Wikimedia Foundation began tracking most-read articles 11 years ago. People spent an estimated 2.4 billion hours reading English Wikipedia articles in 2025. Serial killer Ed Gein took third place with 31.2 million views, driven by Netflix's latest season of Monster , while with 25.1 million views, marking his eighth appearance on the list since 2015. Other top 10 entries included Elon Musk, New York City mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani, and Ozzy Osbourne, who died in July. Veteran Raises $1.3 Million After Pension Loss Ed Bambas, an , Michigan, has raised $1.4 million online after revealing he works fulltime at a Meijer grocery store because he lost his pension. Influencer Samuel Weidenhofer met Bambas while filming random acts of kindness at the store. After hearing his story, he posted a video that quickly went viral. . Bambas, who retired from GM in 1999, lost his pension and benefits after the company’s bankruptcy and returned to work to make ends meet following his wife's death. The overwhelming response from strangers online may finally let him retire for good. . name: This is dark
subject: Boebert’s new conspiracy: Minority Leader Jeffries is “Reptilian”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
We laugh at Boebert’s antics because she's a joke, but why she’s pushing this one is sinister...
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MVhihFkjXTHXAeg5WRxuDcCCc7xZjYaploocPQpm-KzsreMPvAnYCY1EW-lP83aHc__58ugPlPt4iNbFwtoKWTTEO01thnR8yy5uFCWToAYCw9aCFnWHjLs5e5BQd9VC0_0LnZ_wsoizGyiWVz1bKCVtmWWNVwVeUZbUx0ve4Rdi8Zq3FOUEr867RYQU8SsEpiLKnigtB5iRS1JO59CVcuAMxnpdvuTjOIj0GPvnDO8=&c=MX2O5HaneIdjZTbZ47ow392tJ_onaYx68hCGkTJ2unelJwIKHYyY9Q==&ch=SEv_bnj8jvO-YDPmsYL9TteDxngvG33QMJ10JEJE8w1eSaHehfnr7Q==)
---
|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert is pushing a new conspiracy theory-- that House Speaker Hakeem Jeffries is a "reptilian."
This is based on a conspiracy pushed by Holocaust denier David Icke who posits that most Jews, and many in positions of power across the world, secretly belong to a race of reptilians that plan to eradicate humanity.
It's funny to laugh at Boebert's antics because she's a joke, however she has a dark reason for pushing this one...
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MVhihFkjXTHXAeg5WRxuDcCCc7xZjYaploocPQpm-KzsreMPvAnYCY1EW-lP83aHc__58ugPlPt4iNbFwtoKWTTEO01thnR8yy5uFCWToAYCw9aCFnWHjLs5e5BQd9VC0_0LnZ_wsoizGyiWVz1bKCVtmWWNVwVeUZbUx0ve4Rdi8Zq3FOUEr867RYQU8SsEpiLKnigtB5iRS1JO59CVciJgKaVD9IMmJAsrtBO85K8=&c=MX2O5HaneIdjZTbZ47ow392tJ_onaYx68hCGkTJ2unelJwIKHYyY9Q==&ch=SEv_bnj8jvO-YDPmsYL9TteDxngvG33QMJ10JEJE8w1eSaHehfnr7Q==)
---
Congressman Clay Higgins is a close ally of Boebert. In 2023 when an activist asked Boebert an unfriendly question at a presser with Higgins, he went on the attack manhandling the protestor and dragging him away.

The reason why Boebert is spreading this theory is because it dehumanizes her political opponents and primes her base to accept and participate in violence committed against them.
It's the same reason why she claims that Trans people are behind a wave of mass shootings or that Ilhan Omar is a jihadi.
Democrats, LGBTQ, Muslims, and Jews are all groups she is targeting-- and she wants violence committed against them. She is pushing for it at a policy level and she is priming her base for it.
Lauren Boebert is in Congress because of a mere 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese went head to head with her, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points. Now Trisha is back to finish the job.
[Please, make a contribution of $25, $10, or whatever you can afford, to help the Calvarese campaign defeat Boebert, flip this seat, and take back the House for Democrats.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MVhihFkjXTHXAeg5WRxuDcCCc7xZjYaploocPQpm-KzsreMPvAnYCWcjWWmMOQYCJRakQLI-iRarE5JtaSmtDovzFgQcj7X9VLlERVj7cQTAeHyJ-Mm4xGqscnoiSiwyvLR0hZDx65cc2FU1LrhFlM4A9lKMaHu_5KbPjLYcgDQqCyyQAEnvMKTg0ofhkelvKiDJL1eZA2KVOjWKVtmQyyXiUlM9RpIJsWLla9QtSeT4y3rlrfkwxA==&c=MX2O5HaneIdjZTbZ47ow392tJ_onaYx68hCGkTJ2unelJwIKHYyY9Q==&ch=SEv_bnj8jvO-YDPmsYL9TteDxngvG33QMJ10JEJE8w1eSaHehfnr7Q==)
---

clean_body: We laugh at Boebert’s antics because she's a joke, but why she’s pushing this one is sinister... | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert is pushing a new conspiracy theory-- that House Speaker Hakeem Jeffries is a "reptilian." This is based on a conspiracy pushed by Holocaust denier David Icke who posits that most Jews, and many in positions of power across the world, secretly belong to a race of reptilians that plan to eradicate humanity. It's funny to laugh at Boebert's antics because she's a joke, however she has a dark reason for pushing this one... | == Congressman Clay Higgins is a close ally of Boebert. In 2023 when an activist asked Boebert an unfriendly question at a presser with Higgins, he went on the attack manhandling the protestor and dragging him away. The reason why Boebert is spreading this theory is because it dehumanizes her political opponents and primes her base to accept and participate in violence committed against them. It's the same reason why she claims that Trans people are behind a wave of mass shootings or that Ilhan Omar is a jihadi. Democrats, LGBTQ, Muslims, and Jews are all groups she is targeting-- and she wants violence committed against them. She is pushing for it at a policy level and she is priming her base for it. Lauren Boebert is in Congress because of a mere 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese went head to head with her, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points.
