| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. President Trump issued a pardon for U.S. Rep. Henry Cuellar (D-Laredo) and his wife, Imelda, who were [indicted last year](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwRsWxn_sMDB08ZauHa3f8BOjYrCAxMnbV0n7Bp1PutN3X5f5gj74eP3EjXR9uDRHOkqgWinPNd-2fcdsUyzmRiFgXnxJ8XuWQp54J7mA2aIPzxkaqxdhVdeQ7sYBzqAGNTSrPim7SBSOYHTK9SdzhkU5Y0BhLxxA4_WrrJMCOim6HtoBx9Gq8-gMoaPBMRBkfU25rStVemBx4ZnulFuTtibotda9sP6DyYnJ6TiO1qXHS_HKmZz2FHz1pjA5vUEcY0y3aKjwXxu3tCWTsXrDM-18pZif_A_cZG33w4fgyzAyENcNfXgv1__9ddfyJwAA__8G5IPa) on charges of accepting bribes to advance the interests of an Azerbaijan-controlled energy company and a Mexican bank. The couple's trial was scheduled for April.

## Trump Pardons Cuellar
President Trump issued a pardon for U.S. Rep. Henry Cuellar (D-Laredo) and his wife, Imelda, who were [indicted last year](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwRsWxn_sMDB08ZauHa3f8BOjYrCAxMnbV0n7Bp1PutN3X5f5gj74eP3EjXR9uDRHOkqgWinPNd-2fcdsUyzmRiFgXnxJ8XuWQp54J7mA2aIPzxkaqxdhVdeQ7sYBzqAGNTSrPim7SBSOYHTK9SdzhkU5Y0BhLxxA4_WrrJMCOim6HtoBx9Gq8-gMoaPBMRBkfU25rStVemBx4ZnulFuTtibotda9sP6DyYnJ6TiO1qXHS_HKmZz2FHz1pjA5vUEcY0y3aKjwXxu3tCWTsXrDM-18pZif_A_cZG33w4fgyzAyENcNfXgv1__9ddfyJwAA__8G5IPa) on charges of accepting bribes to advance the interests of an Azerbaijan-controlled energy company and a Mexican bank. The couple's trial was scheduled for April. In a Truth Social post, Trump claimed the Biden administration "weaponized the Justice System" by targeting Cuellar for [opposing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGu6yAMBuCnIRsRuBySDAx3Yetd7xgRcFqrJERAm-btr1L1Dc5myZJ_f_-_63h1FGm9_XULmvqe07jiXiLWinms-blsm8shrcU_MUaXJyppfYwg4IdL4EKNwVE8RtUEM4kwyAaN7LTq1aAH3dzNEHrVS6dl13uJsw96gB46L39g9mqAhsx5TIJQEoS8qFa7rgtD380e3Yx6ZkpgoJpyW-9Y8e3KHI_0wtz6tDTR3GvdCrv8YWAZ2H3f20dx9VwysKeGgd1SpEr-HM80BlYCAysuDOxHyb9M_gngAZfks6vkecaNf_GcVj5lmjAf3K2B-7SWjbLzB_euIAPbZBO2nWKkojumxG1xFD9_1t-1-zLwPwAA___ajJBR) its open-border policies. "_Henry, I don't know you, but you can sleep well tonight_ ," Trump wrote. "_Your nightmare is finally over!_ " Trump's [post](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MuK7CAYBOCn0V03v_d24eLAIbue1cAsg4nakTEx6N-3tx8yrzDbKvig6us6Xn0uebt9-DU6fKU6bvHZS0SMbcR2X_fdt1C3Pt9jKb5Nudfte-TA1YnxE8gx-Fzeo6TBTRAso9Exo-VFWm01XZyQk5qtmbxJIMECaJOUmgD4ZLkFQbM7MMZBMg5MyLP2xgR7MWmOPkWdiIQYMtZ2xiVifPmeyrs-YjvPdaXFLYh7J-If4QPhA7Y7Lr3O2ZejP0IJLfryv26-hM9jEuHDXjt2wgfGlFZaSGGMuHBQUtHmwv7MpeSuDZFwW33-pSj-7aCH4z8BAAD__0eteGU) included a Nov. 12 letter from the couple's daughters. Cuellar said he was aware his daughters sent the letter, and he acknowledged meeting with prosecutors several months ago to discuss having his case dismissed. The U.S. House Ethics Committee is still investigating Cuellar. Speaker Mike Johnson said he "didn’t know anything" about Cuellar’s pardon before Trump's announcement, and a National Republican Congressional Committee spokesman [admitted](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAQhuHT4A4LBgxxQbGNu2y7pYVhHKNgsIDEye1Xye4N_nqkd_R8f67z1YYY0u233dG015rnhGeN2BqWuZXHfhy2-Jyqe2CMtiyh5nSfgcFAOVAmZ29DfM-y82ZhfuQdGq6VvMhRjarbjIAB0GknnRBaoXNa2AFWC4NUA7fQBfOJcWCSA-NC9spq7ceLXh3aFdVKJEMfWi5927Dhy9Y1vvMTS-_y3kWztXZUIn4RmAhM53n29hVy_VwJTJ84gYkDgYkJAtMe7kjzlmpOdIkh-Ro8erq86Zdb6X8p_QfvivHHGWIMVWki2W23IX4_t5_t9TTwNwAA__9viH_2) it "certainly makes it tougher" to flip the 11-term incumbent's seat.
## Waymo Vehicles Passing School Buses
Austin ISD has [released videos](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb9GOxxkEbGgSGO3aVM6CM_1TZ7gAOru32c2-YTU986de87XfbpbJAyPT7uBKc8lTgGuTFAKpKmkY9t3m3wM2R1AZNOMOYbvSXDRsVYwLidvkV6TrL2ZuR_aGkzbK6nloAZVr-amO6WVW9SgrRYtH9zcae9tp2cuOu9rNO-xVnDZCt7eZKNs3_tB94sDu4BaKsnBY4mpKSsUeNq80CuekBoXt5rMWsqeq9tHJcZKjNd1NUt89vbIBcO7UonxzVSJ8UQPkf0lDLNnzu7lSJDZdlDBnYBlt8ZIbD4yOzGSLRhDZhjOSCeGB7vsa4vshBUdQa6T8fuFRJhVX0n-2CzS763yP5mnET8BAAD__yr6jqM) of Waymo autonomous vehicles illegally passing stopped school buses over a dozen times in the past few months. Between the first day of school on Aug. 19 and Oct. 29 of this year, cameras on the stop arms of district school buses recorded Waymo vehicles failing to stop 12 times. AISD sent a letter to the company demanding that they address the issue and pay $2,100 in fines. Waymo stated that they "implemented software updates," but AISD recorded [seven additional violations](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAURE-DM1rwTYMdEGzibDbd0PrAZxoNNi3A7enbr7x7hEnrlUpV9edj_cCU0_75Gzey_TuWdaezZeqd6trrsT2fWEPZmz8oZ6wutbJ_rSDgziVwodaAKb9XNQTrRJjlQFYarSY161kPD-vcGFHOQkQa7yqgGyc5gYwA6M18j0OyV5gEoSQIOaqbRmPCPJnoCSPpyJSgkHqpt_6gTt_YYn6XF9WbL9uQ7aP3Z2PjLwYLg-U8z9vX66ALMliw9uQzMViuXQwWCofHnsrOYGn-UUq-VDxaTztPLfAT31vh_xF3R-MNI_U3T60ddHlBzxxxknqSxMm4wBVqxd1kHDc4S08B7kKoodrwPFPOqWnDlPjcMOV_nfvPnn5Z-BsAAP__H0iTGg) after sending the letter. Officials have asked the company to suspend its service from 5:20 to 9:30 a.m., and from 3 to 7 p.m. AISD has shared the videos with the National Highway Transportation Administration, which has been [investigating Waymo](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQAL8GOp-wn89A4SIN3UubEi14gdVbbOT1wfH30eUXUo80Gs2f7_EbiCmuv2FHX95LGiNewlgK5rHk134ckEOKMr-QGfJEkuLPaBrzVNqoxo4BiO_R1sFPTeh1jV63zna2d72rNw_T4kz3fE7YubnVTmtAu7Sdm7updQFr8h-ZNo3VptFf9uGgbUPftcuMsKBbKttgoJLyo2xY8A2y8J1OzI857TX7rZRDqq9flRkqM1zX9fh5Q_zAygwUT5RCKxRKUSoznBQwiZItXeqCe0_qxI1mRlHEjCsw3-oAEYqrgpcUikrmLSVW00tQlO5VoR1FlY1E3Qi5MkOdfTguYiZxbWWbdQfif33l_66e3vwNAAD__2grkU0) over the behavior of its vehicles around buses. Waymo has announced plans to roll out its service in Dallas, Houston, and San Antonio in the near future.
## Search for Missing Plane Continues
Austin-based marine robotics company Ocean Infinity will [conduct a 55-day search](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O4yAURJ8Gd1j4muC4oNjGXbbd0rqGS4yWHwtInLz9yvsKXzfSSKM5589jfaAPPj1_YyTdPi6vic4aqDUqayuveBxYbE7VvCgELJuvOf1dQcCND8CFXC368F1lZ_Um7Dx0pIdJybuc1ay6XaNDZ2CcpVG4wehAmPsMMN6UE8NEW-f1NTaAkAOIYZS9wmmy831yhtCRckwKsr7l0redGn2wuvDNbyq9ybELem_tqGz8xWBhsJzn2ZutXhRXz2C5IoPFBf_cG4_7OAkeMeC3euRHwETcFKw7r4TF7Nwn6zHxbAgTL1RfkbglQ3GjwmDpirbH6UPwVU1MimdEH_5faT8T-NbwLwAA___JzIgX) for Malaysia Airlines Flight 370 beginning Dec. 30, having suspended a six-week search in April due to challenging conditions. The Boeing 777 carrying 239 people [mysteriously disappeared](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAYBODTQBfrh2AIBcVr3OW1WyIMv2O02FhA7Pj2K-8VthtppE-a-Xrap4sprq__bkHTPlO2Kx41YWtYbCvvZdtcCXmt_o0puTLGmtdvy4H3N8ZvIGxwMZ1W0GBGCJpRNExJ8RBaaklng8g0wkP6PggEAboXnoceRn_vvdJIo7kwxkEwDuwuOumUCvqhJo9uQjkRARhiy6VrMzb8uDqlM-9YOp8Xmszc2lbJ_R_hA-HDcRzdOPqrI3y4xhA-uNKiT3hFf6odlAoLbJkWE7YjphSrVETAa3Ex_artb1_shv8EAAD__wLwc9o) 39 minutes after departing Kuala Lumpur en route to Beijing on March 8, 2014. Authorities never determined what happened. Despite a massive international search for the aircraft, only a few fragments of debris have been recovered. Ocean Infinity signed a "no-find, no-fee" contract for $70 million with Malaysia's government in March to [search a 5,800-square-mile area](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGysyAUhJ8GOxxAlFhQ_I1d_vaWzgkcIpOjOEBi8vZ3zCvcYqud3dn9fq7zFSLF7f4fVrT1HdK84VEIa8U81_xc9x2yT1txTySCfIslbY9ZCdVzqbjQs4dIn1k33t6EH2WDVppBX_Q4jEOzWOMAvRu9lAIHJ0zfG9WZXqDRsjOXWxPtWSaV0FIJ2el2AGP8eDHBIQQcAtMCfawpt3XBim8ogT7phbl1aW3ILrXuhXX_mJqYmo7jaB9v2E6Tqel8w9T0jTE1wc494s4LwqnsFh5S5isQfEoEDjFT3LDwQPG-VN4ZwWviGctzRe7R8U4wNTXZ-v2IRLEMhmlxXyHSd079G8SXVb8BAAD__8AYh6o) of the Indian Ocean. The company conducted a similar search in 2018.

The couple's trial was scheduled for April. In a Truth Social post, Trump claimed the Biden administration "weaponized the Justice System" by targeting Cuellar for its open-border policies. "Henry, I don't know you, but you can sleep well tonight ," Trump wrote. "Your nightmare is finally over! " Trump's included a Nov. 12 letter from the couple's daughters. Cuellar said he was aware his daughters sent the letter, and he acknowledged meeting with prosecutors several months ago to discuss having his case dismissed. The U.S. House Ethics Committee is still investigating Cuellar. Speaker Mike Johnson said he "didn’t know anything" about Cuellar’s pardon before Trump's announcement, and a National Republican Congressional Committee spokesman it "certainly makes it tougher" to flip the 11-term incumbent's seat. Waymo Vehicles Passing School Buses Austin ISD has of Waymo autonomous vehicles illegally passing stopped school buses over a dozen times in the past few months. Between the first day of school on Aug. 19 and Oct. 29 of this year, cameras on the stop arms of district school buses recorded Waymo vehicles failing to stop 12 times. AISD sent a letter to the company demanding that they address the issue and pay $2,100 in fines. Waymo stated that they "implemented software updates," but AISD recorded after sending the letter. Officials have asked the company to suspend its service from 5:20 to 9:30 a.m., and from 3 to 7 p.m. AISD has shared the videos with the National Highway Transportation Administration, which has been over the behavior of its vehicles around buses. Waymo has announced plans to roll out its service in Dallas, Houston, and San Antonio in the near future. name: This is dark
subject: Boebert’s new conspiracy: Minority Leader Jeffries is “Reptilian”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
We laugh at Boebert’s antics because she's a joke, but why she’s pushing this one is sinister...
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xmVVFVq0X_WVlPROLVXlHV7_fEz_6xNLtYSwskJXhfxOPQ8GsWSKQUP_9JJ-QvDkXkUqXYLoo9XDJoOo7c_jkQH_h_ZMsTJeyMYyyy3O6yzLCfRKOMoMroG6ph1bvrmM4uTpWjVmJ9_NZ69YoJo1Pn0nxBtWOqdwO1T2BR5WcsxY87hLKe7slvvkrY7nPLVdg8R50NOe8Ne78hxw5wgawidV77N9M96w&c=vcn99sycAHAbzlW2i8HAisbWwG2N9QPVM8QAetYAGDJieaa0zPHBoA==&ch=gSyT2QgC2LNgzmGL2i4kSARP4DUPMfKn2oJUjhd8a5H7KqI2WCDx8w==)
---
|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert is pushing a new conspiracy theory-- that House Speaker Hakeem Jeffries is a "reptilian."
This is based on a conspiracy pushed by Holocaust denier David Icke who posits that most Jews, and many in positions of power across the world, secretly belong to a race of reptilians that plan to eradicate humanity.
It's funny to laugh at Boebert's antics because she's a joke, however she has a dark reason for pushing this one...
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xmVVFVq0X_WVlPROLVXlHV7_fEz_6xNLtYSwskJXhfxOPQ8GsWSKQUP_9JJ-QvDkXkUqXYLoo9XDJoOo7c_jkQH_h_ZMsTJeyMYyyy3O6yzLCfRKOMoMroG6ph1bvrmM4uTpWjVmJ9_NZ69YoJo1Pn0nxBtWOqdwO1T2BR5WcsxY87hLKe7slvvkrY7nPLVdg8R50NOe8Ne78hxw5wgawsjWDRTkkeNV&c=vcn99sycAHAbzlW2i8HAisbWwG2N9QPVM8QAetYAGDJieaa0zPHBoA==&ch=gSyT2QgC2LNgzmGL2i4kSARP4DUPMfKn2oJUjhd8a5H7KqI2WCDx8w==)
---
Congressman Clay Higgins is a close ally of Boebert. In 2023 when an activist asked Boebert an unfriendly question at a presser with Higgins, he went on the attack manhandling the protestor and dragging him away.

The reason why Boebert is spreading this theory is because it dehumanizes her political opponents and primes her base to accept and participate in violence committed against them.
It's the same reason why she claims that Trans people are behind a wave of mass shootings or that Ilhan Omar is a jihadi.
Democrats, LGBTQ, Muslims, and Jews are all groups she is targeting-- and she wants violence committed against them. She is pushing for it at a policy level and she is priming her base for it.
Lauren Boebert is in Congress because of a mere 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese went head to head with her, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points. Now Trisha is back to finish the job.
[Please, make a contribution of $25, $10, or whatever you can afford, to help the Calvarese campaign defeat Boebert, flip this seat, and take back the House for Democrats.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xmVVFVq0X_WVlPROLVXlHV7_fEz_6xNLtYSwskJXhfxOPQ8GsWSKQS7tAAyCh-1OA9aZSN9o-_LZdC1wkKR0Siy9YwT2HX-nJP2NX5-Xvk7wORUB37iBUcn4PJz3fnyMXuj9-sIgEBVPiIw4wIQLB-4aIyrmMQvs3tRNm2oBwRdlHnImzFQSUtHP0pYxHDoUFliBMUY7jg0iLqK0diaYhaN57Hc3HNMq5XxME3zAZqxLzhUxwDljGg==&c=vcn99sycAHAbzlW2i8HAisbWwG2N9QPVM8QAetYAGDJieaa0zPHBoA==&ch=gSyT2QgC2LNgzmGL2i4kSARP4DUPMfKn2oJUjhd8a5H7KqI2WCDx8w==)

clean_body: We laugh at Boebert’s antics because she's a joke, but why she’s pushing this one is sinister... | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert is pushing a new conspiracy theory-- that House Speaker Hakeem Jeffries is a "reptilian." This is based on a conspiracy pushed by Holocaust denier David Icke who posits that most Jews, and many in positions of power across the world, secretly belong to a race of reptilians that plan to eradicate humanity. It's funny to laugh at Boebert's antics because she's a joke, however she has a dark reason for pushing this one... | == Congressman Clay Higgins is a close ally of Boebert. In 2023 when an activist asked Boebert an unfriendly question at a presser with Higgins, he went on the attack manhandling the protestor and dragging him away. The reason why Boebert is spreading this theory is because it dehumanizes her political opponents and primes her base to accept and participate in violence committed against them. It's the same reason why she claims that Trans people are behind a wave of mass shootings or that Ilhan Omar is a jihadi. Democrats, LGBTQ, Muslims, and Jews are all groups she is targeting-- and she wants violence committed against them. She is pushing for it at a policy level and she is priming her base for it. Lauren Boebert is in Congress because of a mere 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese went head to head with her, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points. Now Trisha is back to finish the job. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | We can beat Boebert and stop the violence she is pushing. body:
Unless we push back and beat them at their own game it’s over for us.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pCWMzKIfOnW0NKX1mN7BNnTDJxJwpwBwxdxjD0JzT9MlYkAm4O7wfNRfJLQfinF57aG_7EVK2-nv2qTaW_cGIISD6uzcN1nxWgAa4gjOSjUzoB8xw46FUem8HjDDzaFuuR6wDKUGqV6PYY0jByARLOeqUk5l8j3z5wU78I13KfPP4o6qEfo95U7aQg4GK0FC88yJIwpZz0fw2j9VXMDmywmyw8aGJKDO&c=m4ckL7piNLyNBhPacxvZb_eqsfvOjlbDqtqNP_aHiS7Q51_VZuRa2A==&ch=Lzx8BezI8IS-TOs0iR9k6JANRIsl3s_a7lIhuSdSKpDl2crBnFxk_Q==)

| Peter,
MAGA is about to do something horrific.
They are about to steal the 2026 midterms via redistricting every red state imaginable.
If they pull this off and win the 2026 midterms, despite every factor being stacked against them, they will have established one party rule for generations to come.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pCWMzKIfOnW0NKX1mN7BNnTDJxJwpwBwxdxjD0JzT9MlYkAm4O7wfNRfJLQfinF57aG_7EVK2-nv2qTaW_cGIISD6uzcN1nxWgAa4gjOSjUzoB8xw46FUem8HjDDzaFuuR6wDKUGqV6PYY0jByARLOeqUk5l8j3z5wU78I13KfPP4o6qEfo95U7aQg4GK0FC88yJIwpZz0coqHxqlIZ0uW_fvr4sOIP9&c=m4ckL7piNLyNBhPacxvZb_eqsfvOjlbDqtqNP_aHiS7Q51_VZuRa2A==&ch=Lzx8BezI8IS-TOs0iR9k6JANRIsl3s_a7lIhuSdSKpDl2crBnFxk_Q==)
---

In states like Florida and Indiana, MAGA is eyeing mid-decade redistricting schemes. They are sharpening their knives to carve up maps, silence voters, and hand-deliver toss-up seats to MAGA extremists just in time for the midterms.
While red states manipulate the map to drown out our voices in Congress, many Democrats stay wedded to "fairness," a one-way street that only Democrats are driving on, whilst MAGA absolutely clobbers us.
Unless we push back and beat them at their own game it's over for us. We cannot afford to let this stay a one sided fight. To survive, we must fight fire with fire.
Fair Fight Colorado is launching the ballot measure to bring Colorado into this fight and get this key blue state new maps to give Democrats more seats and counteract the seats MAGA has stolen.
We are ensuring that Colorado's congress map reflects reality--not the wishful thinking of a GOP minority that hasn't won a top-of-the-ticket race here in years.
[We aren't just holding the line; we're pushing back. But we can't get this on the ballot with you. Will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us fight fire with fire and stop the MAGA's horrific power grab before he can establish one party rule and snuff out American democracy?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pCWMzKIfOnW0NKX1mN7BNnTDJxJwpwBwxdxjD0JzT9MlYkAm4O7wfNRfJLQfinF53rZOGS85hx-m-Qm_6gvqM1QInneapexbUcZ3bg3GceX9V0bo6b33fdpZHZdJrDerfpbxrLvdVTe1t9bEHVchMw1JeCJQftR8t-aIAiDT1Y8CixhvcrmhZPrAyLP2i1cJDQK9kIGpQexxNS1xwUvo6lcXVW7WHdLLxzdrEYRnVks=&c=m4ckL7piNLyNBhPacxvZb_eqsfvOjlbDqtqNP_aHiS7Q51_VZuRa2A==&ch=Lzx8BezI8IS-TOs0iR9k6JANRIsl3s_a7lIhuSdSKpDl2crBnFxk_Q==)

name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: December 2025
body:
I want to start this month’s newsletter with a quick request
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - December 2025
**Welcome to this month’s installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly newsletter highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs!**
I want to start this month’s newsletter with a quick request. This is now the one-year anniversary of Teichert in the Trenches. I would love your feedback on how we can make this a better product for you -- you can reply to this email to do so. Thanks! ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
| | | The following videos provide a sample of the topics I provided expert perspective on during this past month.
---
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/Cvx92f2SXmnc)

| | | 📽️ A movie I can’t get out of my mind!

!!️ Check out the link to the trailer above!

📣 A House of Dynamite provides a powerful springboard for thoughts on the fog and friction of war (and decision making), especially in time limited and time critical situations. I love the arc of activity that reveals the same timeframe through the perspectives of different key players.

💥 It is worth the watch and deep consideration!
---
|
---
| | | ⚓ Point to Ponder – Annapolis activities during the shutdown! (October 8th)

🗓️ This past weekend was a busy one at the Naval Academy. It’s fall and there was a thrill in the air. Friday evening, Navy men’s soccer hosted Bucknell. For those willing to travel, women’s volleyball and men’s & women’s cross country competed on Friday away from the Yard. On Saturday and Sunday, the schedules were similarly packed, featuring 18 different competitions in a busy mix of home and away matches. You could even enjoy three showings of the annual Halloween concert in the chapel. The Mids were getting after it!

!?️ But wait, aren’t we in a government shutdown? Are these activities considered essential while hundreds of thousands of government workers and military members were missing another paycheck or struggling to make ends meet?

🧠 None of this is to condemn the Midshipmen or argue about different sources of funding for their extracurricular activities. It is, however, a strong reminder that another group of Americans a few dozen miles to the west of Annapolis took the same oath as these fledgling officers to Support and Defend the Constitution and are failing miserably in their obligations. A packed schedule of ancillary activities at a military college during a shutdown is a stark sign of the normalization of governmental dysfunction that harms all of us.

!!️ I wonder if the Naval Academy’s musical included Emperor Nero playing the fiddle? It would have been an appropriate gesture – essential or not. ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**

🧠 With two of the three kids home for the long weekend, these are the games we played together on Thanksgiving Day. Strategy games are standard fare for our family, though we didn’t bust out Settlers of Catan because Summer wasn’t able to join us. Don’t worry, we’ll play that during the few days we will all be together for Christmastime! ** _My Bookshelf_**
| | | |
---
I was honored to write the following endorsement for this incredible s insights from the Ukrainian and Israeli front lines are stunning – as a war reporter he is the best there is! NewsNation’s viewers benefit greatly from his stellar insight, and as a regular commentator I thoroughly enjoy following Robert because his reporting is always crisp and rich. His gripping ability to tell a story in the most consequential and challenging of circumstances comes to life in these pages, creating a book that readers won’t be able to put down while chronicling world-changing history that will stand the test of time!”
| | | |
---
“Are moral ambiguity and personal vulnerability reasons for us to avoid the public square? Is it not better to stick to safe places where we will not have to worry about the morally perilous areas of politics? Far from it. It is that ambiguity and difficulty that makes it so important for believers to enter into the process.”
“Compassionate, purposeful government makes the world a better place. As frustrating as the process might be, it matters too much for people of faith to just check out of the process. Instead, with hearts set on civil and not cynical governing, we can bring humility, hope, and a commitment to getting to the best answer, not just our answer.”
|
---
“GOD having made man such a creature, that in his own judgment, it was not good for him to be alone, put him under strong obligations of necessity, convenience, and inclination to drive him into society, as well as fitted him with understanding and language to continue and enjoy it.”
“That, which begins and actually constitutes any political society, is nothing but the consent of any number of freemen capable of a majority to unite and incorporate into such a society. And that is that, and that only, which did, or could give beginning to any lawful government in the world.”
|
---
“Too often, we are proactive in our work and personal growth, and reactive in our families, and that’s a missed opportunity because your family holds the keys to be the leader and human you long to be ... You will never be as powerful as you can be as a leader in your work or in your business if you have not first learned to lead yourself and your family well.” ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**

This video walking through the USAF Honor Guard Drill Team gauntlet is always a hit – and it’s tough to believe that it’s been 8 years since then!
_**Rejoin Opportunities**_
I’ll be in the Aerospace Valley and at The Center of the Aerospace Testing Universe (IYKYK) on December 9th to officiate the retirement ceremony of Tony Rubino. For those in the area, I hope to see you there to celebrate Tony’s incredible lifetime of service to this great nation!
_**Dad Joke of the Month**_
I heard that someone recently invented a mind-controlled air freshener.
It makes scents when you think about it!

body:
Unless we push back and beat them at their own game it’s over for us.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f8e4ExY1WGKQxLfT0sBL8pQhyt2ACXAYAJ0TxlhLUJf4Hx6z7MMIURgrxUbk-GmygOuJXDL9sh7FNXWmUCDvmC2ouePKVDgazI2V6fniRKDZb2ZQP7jcdG5BGCNyqE-0eRuybE5qpUqbuOT52Cg8z0VPD7VRGaChSITm6QLsriWRBPjvjQqnZhwzfoy4PLKxzfxxvcTBtvbw7IAL-rSzqa3FsBGIXGDE&c=wrIv6t2jP8j_CXtDmzPZDUpfdmI36PkkKqDJkQvuoFrqyodDgNY5yg==&ch=nXcOqIUO1cat10qUpJPXP0IE52RoXRRjruyK0Qgw7KehGmQNOSgY6g==)

| Peter,
MAGA is about to do something horrific.
They are about to steal the 2026 midterms via redistricting every red state imaginable.
If they pull this off and win the 2026 midterms, despite every factor being stacked against them, they will have established one party rule for generations to come.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f8e4ExY1WGKQxLfT0sBL8pQhyt2ACXAYAJ0TxlhLUJf4Hx6z7MMIURgrxUbk-GmygOuJXDL9sh7FNXWmUCDvmC2ouePKVDgazI2V6fniRKDZb2ZQP7jcdG5BGCNyqE-0eRuybE5qpUqbuOT52Cg8z0VPD7VRGaChSITm6QLsriWRBPjvjQqnZhwzfoy4PLKxzfxxvcTBtvaX6eOKZTRhaXnedceTv8NS&c=wrIv6t2jP8j_CXtDmzPZDUpfdmI36PkkKqDJkQvuoFrqyodDgNY5yg==&ch=nXcOqIUO1cat10qUpJPXP0IE52RoXRRjruyK0Qgw7KehGmQNOSgY6g==)
---

In states like Florida and Indiana, MAGA is eyeing mid-decade redistricting schemes. They are sharpening their knives to carve up maps, silence voters, and hand-deliver toss-up seats to MAGA extremists just in time for the midterms.
While red states manipulate the map to drown out our voices in Congress, many Democrats stay wedded to "fairness," a one-way street that only Democrats are driving on, whilst MAGA absolutely clobbers us.
Unless we push back and beat them at their own game it's over for us. We cannot afford to let this stay a one sided fight. To survive, we must fight fire with fire.
Fair Fight Colorado is launching the ballot measure to bring Colorado into this fight and get this key blue state new maps to give Democrats more seats and counteract the seats MAGA has stolen.
We are ensuring that Colorado's congress map reflects reality--not the wishful thinking of a GOP minority that hasn't won a top-of-the-ticket race here in years.
[We aren't just holding the line; we're pushing back. But we can't get this on the ballot with you. Will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us fight fire with fire and stop the MAGA's horrific power grab before he can establish one party rule and snuff out American democracy?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f8e4ExY1WGKQxLfT0sBL8pQhyt2ACXAYAJ0TxlhLUJf4Hx6z7MMIURgrxUbk-GmyI6H17vd02at5UNeH9KiqkclXzXV6Kwjc2qgyyWrYZfd8PR7kMDoxDx_cXt0iOlGAaeSQcab1C7wib4wor06DjJP2BRP-FMN7_6MBhN__7s394-5XSmC7XT0qvVN3L7Okmu50MDldoyaBjQYH6yUaIHfojiInZkHiVHCBUpAgWlg=&c=wrIv6t2jP8j_CXtDmzPZDUpfdmI36PkkKqDJkQvuoFrqyodDgNY5yg==&ch=nXcOqIUO1cat10qUpJPXP0IE52RoXRRjruyK0Qgw7KehGmQNOSgY6g==)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8fb5debf-0569-425b-9e27-e172f1c7fbf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The White House's social media accounts have been putting out video after video showing the efforts of federal immigration agents, often with cool editing and popular songs in the background.
A video posted by the Trump White House showed a compilation of federal agents being confronted by anti-Trump protesters and agitators while agents are seen arresting illegal aliens.
In the background of the video, the song "Juno" by Sabrina Carpenter is played amid the liberals' profanities and handcuffs. It appears the decision to include that song is due to the fact Carpenter would "arrest" a fan or celebrity with pink prop handcuffs during concerts on her recent tour.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e68ec854-5377-4f20-947b-b0f85e6c9ce3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Needless to say, Carpenter was not a fan of her song being included in the White House's video.
"[T]his video is evil and disgusting. Do not ever involve me or my music to benefit your inhumane agenda," Carpenter posted on X.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e325508-f941-43e2-a217-468658786f7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Given Carpenter's celebrity status and her stance against the Trump administration, it is not surprising her comment has almost one million likes. Her post has been viewed over 38 million times.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/81e9fd9c-72e6-41d3-a202-ff5723562a76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [RFK Jr's 2025 confession EXPOSED](https://substack.com/redirect/81e9fd9c-72e6-41d3-a202-ff5723562a76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/81e9fd9c-72e6-41d3-a202-ff5723562a76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,

Not long ago RFK Jr went toe-to-toe with senate Dems on Capitol Hill... And he was NOT holding back.
What he EXPOSED left the room in stunned silence.

**[An emerging health threat](https://substack.com/redirect/81e9fd9c-72e6-41d3-a202-ff5723562a76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that affects over one hundred million Americans. And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965... then you're most at risk.
Angry Democrats mocked him as a conspiracy theorist...
Just like they did when he warned about the COVID Lab leak, microplastics and corruption in the FDA...
All of which now appear to be _**100% TRUE**_.
Which is exactly why you need to hear RFK Jr's 2025 warning _**NOW**_.
You can **[get full details here now](https://substack.com/redirect/81e9fd9c-72e6-41d3-a202-ff5723562a76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/81e9fd9c-72e6-41d3-a202-ff5723562a76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. **[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/81e9fd9c-72e6-41d3-a202-ff5723562a76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
In response to Carpenter, White House Deputy Press Secretary Abigail Jackson trolled the singer by referring to more of her work, "Here's a Short n' Sweet message for Sabrina Carpenter: we won't apologize for deporting dangerous criminal illegal murderers, rapists, and pedophiles from our country. Anyone who would defend these sick monsters must be stupid, or is it slow?"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dcd9f0ef-dc72-4d33-a1b6-6af4f5782e92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is what it boils down to. Due to the unhinged reaction from liberals and progressives to the Trump administration's immigration crackdown, it does not matter if ICE or Border Patrol arrests an illegal alien with a lengthy criminal record. All they see is a "person of color" being "oppressed" by the "racist" Trump administration.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..H5NwNe39Kl3j5QPZ4gF13OcpFK7dm6q7uBhIaMyjro4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=180700371)
That line of thinking, or lack thereof, also conveniently ignores why such a crackdown is necessary: Joe Biden had an open border for four years, adding strain to an immigration system already overburdened by the illegal alien population that existed in the United States before 2021.
What made the border crisis worse was it was something that was made to happen by design, it did not occur by accident or happenstance.
So yes, Carpenter will be given her applause by her fans and liberals for "standing up" to Trump, but it is another example of someone with the privilege of being rich enough to avoid the devastating consequences of failed policies by Democrats.

Needless to say, Carpenter was not a fan of her song being included in the White House's video. "[T]his video is evil and disgusting. Do not ever involve me or my music to benefit your inhumane agenda," Carpenter posted on X. | | ---|---|--- Given Carpenter's celebrity status and her stance against the Trump administration, it is not surprising her comment has almost one million likes. Her post has been viewed over 38 million times. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) | | ---|---|--- Dear Reader, Not long ago RFK Jr went toe-to-toe with senate Dems on Capitol Hill... And he was NOT holding back. What he EXPOSED left the room in stunned silence. that affects over one hundred million Americans. And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965... then you're most at risk. Angry Democrats mocked him as a conspiracy theorist... Just like they did when he warned about the COVID Lab leak, microplastics and corruption in the FDA... All of which now appear to be 100% TRUE. Which is exactly why you need to hear RFK Jr's 2025 warning NOW. You can while it's still available online. P.S. I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. while it's still available online. (Piece continues below) In response to Carpenter, White House Deputy Press Secretary Abigail Jackson trolled the singer by referring to more of her work, "Here's a Short n' Sweet message for Sabrina Carpenter: we won't apologize for deporting dangerous criminal illegal murderers, rapists, and pedophiles from our country. Anyone who would defend these sick monsters must be stupid, or is it slow?" | | ---|---|--- This is what it boils down to. Due to the unhinged reaction from liberals and progressives to the Trump administration's immigration crackdown, it does not matter if ICE or Border Patrol arrests an illegal alien with a lengthy criminal record. All they see is a "person of color" being "oppressed" by the "racist" Trump administration. That line of thinking, or lack thereof, also conveniently ignores why such a crackdown is necessary: Joe Biden had an open border for four years, adding strain to an immigration system already overburdened by the illegal alien population that existed in the United States before 2021. What made the border crisis worse was it was something that was made to happen by design, it did not occur by accident or happenstance. So yes, Carpenter will be given her applause by her fans and liberals for "standing up" to Trump, but it is another example of someone with the privilege of being rich enough to avoid the devastating consequences of failed policies by Democrats. | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. Subscribe to my newsletter for original content as I travel the United States and beyond. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Yellow Sweatshirt Scandal That Broke Albuquerque
body:
Plus: Trump announces major policy for every American newborn

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=831fc63e34&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |

Someone just pulled off the most ruthless political operation New Mexico has ever seen—and Tim Keller is absolutely losing it. [We've got the full breakdown](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3ba0979ec5&e=567664f14c) of what happened, who we think is behind it, and why it's already gone viral nationwide.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d9466caa66&e=567664f14c)
| |
**🔥 HUNDREDS OF HOMELESS NOW WEARING "I LOVE TIM KELLER" SWEATSHIRTS**
Right before the mayoral election, homeless people across Albuquerque started showing up in bright yellow sweatshirts with Tim Keller's name on them.
No tags. No trail. Just hundreds of people—the same population Keller's policies have failed—now serving as walking billboards for his administration's biggest failure.
Both campaigns are pointing fingers. We reveal who we think actually did this—and why it's the most savage political gamesmanship we've ever seen.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f86ed268cc&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
**🚨 AI VIDEO TORCHES KELLER — AND THE WRITING IS BRUTAL**
An AI-generated "campaign ad" featuring a fake Tim Keller just went viral.
The AI version calls himself a "vibe curator" and "spiritual concierge of postmodern urban decay." We play the whole thing—and break down why AI in campaigns is about to change everything.
Wait until you hear what AI-Keller says about carjackings.

**💰 $1 BILLION STOLEN IN MINNESOTA — TIM WALZ BLAMES EVERYONE BUT HIMSELF**
86 people charged. 78 of them Somali. $1 billion ripped off from taxpayers.
Nonprofits claimed they were feeding children during COVID. Federal prosecutors found almost none of those meals were ever delivered. The money went to luxury cars, mansions, and real estate in Turkey and Kenya.
We show you Tim Walz's response on Meet the Press—and why it proves he should never hold office again.

**🎁 TRUMP ANNOUNCES $1,000 FOR EVERY NEWBORN + DELL PLEDGES $6.25 BILLION**
On Giving Tuesday, Trump unveiled the "Trump Accounts"—$1,000 for every newborn American citizen.
Then Michael Dell dropped a bombshell: He and his wife Susan are donating $6.25 BILLION to cover 25 million kids ages 2-10.
We explain how this works—and why some Republicans criticizing it are completely missing the point.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=48ec71ff1f&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
**🐦 THE 75-YEAR-OLD BIRD THAT JUST MADE HISTORY**
A quick palate cleanser: The world's oldest known wild bird just returned to Hawaii to nest—at 75 years old.
We've got a personal connection to this story that involves our girls, some sushi, and a very patient albatross.
---
|

body:

Our records indicate that you have NOT signed our petition demanding Trump be removed from office under the 25th Amendment.

* * *
**Donald Trump is ramping up his abuse of power:**

❌ Weaponzing the DOJ to BLOCK California’s new maps.

I am fighting every day to stop them, but I need your help right now. The Democrats are powered by massive fundraising machines and we need your help. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The deadline EXPIRED…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=da4f717a24f943b0b2b0a411ed3a0f3b&_e=ydjUVk-wBmFJIpRklk5qseDUP5f--sxrFiCJUxkOzap8N5-u6h31x9AdRHQrZ_ngoUWqZ7QMhBQMTwfi_wzZ9_g542oGn0jbOZL_mLlCqd67uUojuqboYIn30AvTiZ7rcYrwQ5WmAjzHDTRcURnVGIL5EIZjeIdvPdZzcjHpdcKBJqVaxo8bfvtZyUzcyHQ1DvhLQK7igAin5jfiyxa1DI08BaQ5wDzAIHPbjllh8p0yo4XOcHrOpJUA-J1mWyuoaRzQnuzwamFGyqRL-4NtGsENeIVJN0FZmpvynrUWpJR_M_8y7M3kUsetX2MzIpwWLcm0tYAu9RSNq-CcrbngwQ652Rsbfa57Aff2zrECJ56ItgN8_pI1ck6obEp2iPQFBHcgSJl0sSCrgESwSrwi0tVZC9mX3yOgAqMGYhBnEaDAdT_gBfqtVP4jbjGOBv2nRh6fd7NBRiuTH9u1Pv7iYhakiAZQW_3UQd8VkwKpvrMdxizoz4DAHtNmFu6yeuTNKz3dTdLeNTT_oTtdBJCkwK69j9Np8dwKBs8Qm5NqZcl5F8Ln7ghSARcxv3e3g82IPC2zL68GsVXOupDmVfCTtAXg1m125JiXlMHQtBdoB5-vo-ljnOEas0HLLMu-XMggvvTxSVUPCeTbE5RuA781Mw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
On 11/21, the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona had the chance to do the right thing and DROP her wrongful prosecution against me – an _innocent_ 80-year-old man facing 20 years in prison.
---
_But at the _final_ _hour__ , she chose bloodthirsty **VENGEANCE** over **JUSTICE** , and decided to continue her prosecution against me and put me on _TRIAL_ right after the holidays are over.
---
**She is now rushing to the __State__ Supreme Court for emergency assistance.**
---
It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon authority for __state__ crimes.
---
But let me be clear: **I will never give up the fight for my freedom**.
---
When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in America, we proclaimed, “ _NEVER_ SURRENDER!”
---
Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House.
---
_**But I’m still fighting for my freedom!** And Democrats have RIGGED the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is **_POWERLESS_** in _state_ court._
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=da4f717a24f943b0b2b0a411ed3a0f3b&_e=ydjUVk-wBmFJIpRklk5qseDUP5f--sxrFiCJUxkOzap8N5-u6h31x9AdRHQrZ_ngoUWqZ7QMhBQMTwfi_wzZ9_g542oGn0jbOZL_mLlCqd67uUojuqboYIn30AvTiZ7rcYrwQ5WmAjzHDTRcURnVGIL5EIZjeIdvPdZzcjHpdcKBJqVaxo8bfvtZyUzcyHQ1DvhLQK7igAin5jfiyxa1DAx5CMC6OTXzk82mGFFh_C7VqAWBbSuDc0gaWwlsLWUDkkE_s8JWfhqV24PD9TNQ5Aov5rcdyYPZ8w-YmO62BGLlukk9ZmlxhlI-iGtXydYxgDSH6EXxHaPYTbDxkqjDu38Bvvl3gSdpDzKy8PALzntAjBEKXxQEPnx5a6JHAJ1akQXRPq9S4WEuHcdrQ6sOkwIDLYv4z8OgdNzPB1EhZMu-VTWxjJe7rCQ_JUDil404tX6fX4_3eiybVxWjM5AXQDIyHKsmUo2iJaP3jlnvnUESexOvORWKzCMngsCP2oB4ZN6-aIabT1pLV7Xu5aYrR1mFjEH6svA8MelfpenAgJjNMxkiPgoccmVGI0E96yQcycBkwLujoZw77m6tY4HRX5r1AQYH5ARIgiWA66L9-U37kAUYcf9PrASMnsvtP7m-7W1qBhQ4302ocwgE8BMq6A%3D%3D)
__
---
The night I was arrested in the most violent jail in America, the Left filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757.**
---
_Now, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will not stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for _successfully_ defending President Trump as his lawyer, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my defense trust to retain a top-notch defense team to fight for my _FREEDOM_._
---

But at the final hour , she chose bloodthirsty VENGEANCE over JUSTICE , and decided to continue her prosecution against me and put me on TRIAL right after the holidays are over. She is now rushing to the State Supreme Court for emergency assistance. It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon authority for state crimes. But let me be clear: I will never give up the fight for my freedom. When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in America, we proclaimed, “ NEVER SURRENDER!” Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House. But I’m still fighting for my freedom! And Democrats have RIGGED the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is POWERLESS in state court. The night I was arrested in the most violent jail in America, the Left filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757. Now, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will not stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for successfully defending President Trump as his lawyer, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my defense trust to retain a top-notch defense team to fight for my FREEDOM. Let me put it bluntly: you truly are my final hope. clean_body: Peter, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support. My father and I know that this fight isn't possible without patriots like you who are willing to stand up for what's right. We're honored to have you on our team, Peter. | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

subject: 6,947 criminal illegals RELEASED!

body:
This is Hochul’s sanctuary state policy in action.
This is Hochul’s sanctuary state policy in action.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9316754/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvUVE2VUVYZFVmeA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDQ/LbmNsUEVYSUdibg/qP2hpZHM9bmNLS2tTb0dQczhZNU1scw/gaTGb_g/sfre8c54316)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._g/s4gaebde77d)
---
Patriot,
---
I’m so angry right now that it’s hard to find the words...
---
**Under Kathy Hochul, New York has REFUSED to honor ICE detainers and RELEASED 6,947 _criminal_ _illegal_ _aliens_ back onto New York’s streets since January 20th! **
---
**The crimes of these aliens include:

\- 29 homicides
-2,509 assaults
-207 sexual predatory offenses
-199 burglaries
-305 robberies
-392 dangerous drugs offenses
-300 weapons offenses
**
---
When I say Kathy Hochul’s sanctuary state policies are _KILLING_ New Yorkers, I’m not exaggerating: She’s turned our state into a dumping ground for violent criminals that should have been deported!
---
Given the horrific crimes these illegals are committing, you might think Democrats would run from their embrace of violence and sanctuary policies.
---
But instead, they’ve doubled down.
---
Hochul’s endorsed mayor of New York – Communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani – even described violence as **“an artificial construction”.**
---
_...Was the violence “artificial” when a sleeping woman riding the subway was**burned alive** by an illegal alien in Hochul’s New York last December?

...Was the violence “artificial” when a veteran was recently brutally **stabbed to death** by an illegal who never should have been in our country? _
---
I don’t say any of that to be graphic...
---
__I say it because no one else will__. I say it because while so-called Democrat “leaders” are busy dismissing even the idea of violence, REAL New Yorkers are paying the price.
---
And while New York Democrats enable these brutal crimes with their sanctuary policies, they’re busy weaponizing the legal system to try and imprison a president who fights for those very Americans they’ve abandoned.
---
Their priorities are completely backwards – and it will END the second I take office.
---
_As the next Governor of New York, I will END the sanctuary madness on Day One, restore law and order, and work with federal authorities to deport every single criminal illegal migrant._
---
There will be no more innocent victims of sanctuary state policies on my watch!
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help me FIRE Hochul and END that sanctuary state madness has led to nearly 7,000 criminal illegal aliens being released back onto New York’s streets since January 20th.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._g/s4gaebde77d)

The crimes of these aliens include: \- 29 homicides -2,509 assaults -207 sexual predatory offenses -199 burglaries -305 robberies -392 dangerous drugs offenses -300 weapons offenses When I say Kathy Hochul’s sanctuary state policies are KILLING New Yorkers, I’m not exaggerating: She’s turned our state into a dumping ground for violent criminals that should have been deported! Given the horrific crimes these illegals are committing, you might think Democrats would run from their embrace of violence and sanctuary policies. But instead, they’ve doubled down. Hochul’s endorsed mayor of New York – Communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani – even described violence as “an artificial construction”. ...Was the violence “artificial” when a sleeping woman riding the subway wasburned alive by an illegal alien in Hochul’s New York last December? ...Was the violence “artificial” when a veteran was recently brutally stabbed to death by an illegal who never should have been in our country? I don’t say any of that to be graphic... I say it because no one else will. I say it because while so-called Democrat “leaders” are busy dismissing even the idea of violence, REAL New Yorkers are paying the price. And while New York Democrats enable these brutal crimes with their sanctuary policies, they’re busy weaponizing the legal system to try and imprison a president who fights for those very Americans they’ve abandoned. Their priorities are completely backwards – and it will END the second I take office. As the next Governor of New York, I will END the sanctuary madness on Day One, restore law and order, and work with federal authorities to deport every single criminal illegal migrant. There will be no more innocent victims of sanctuary state policies on my watch! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

| Peter,
If every House district in the country shifted left by this same amount as Tuesday's massive Democratic swing in the Tennessee Special election -- about 15 points -- we would be looking at a blue wave far larger than 2018.
To prepare for this, Trump is escalating his redistricting arms race to shore up the GOP majority and steal the upcoming 2026 midterms.
Which is why this week it was announced that Florida Gov. Ron Desantis will eliminate the majority of Florida's Democratic congressional seats.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-Tej9sMigriu7TrGR-5eenXvSGl0eeZCFuK49rDap19aZtBMm3ryQSUoaIkcEI08T3HM_6yDN6uo3xY8nvEEd7M5Ic0GqgM-lHOqtYPDa2pGTXg_u49rK6AgfiBJE3X6JcEytmpplFheyPmn2l-unReLy0Yv_HFWNnXVwmi4pjBJzfC3iyk1d7XgBUUkMGSOoBxNfCUbwFmTfqVxQ6UAvABVnxQrp25stSlbo5zwzfbeO-oCDjgksQ==&c=UT-8ir4e9gqOrkwxebzowqUyjeO72xS2qJg3r_qh5Qyj_TsWIVdc0Q==&ch=CZ6RvaR6oZeCk4_U-2sKW4pvqN1BVL6ZBf58JUg_4xLGBuWnl5AlQQ==)
---

And even more states plan to follow Florida's lead.
Do the math -- if every red state redistricts, the numbers show Democrats never winning the House again. MAGA will successfully enshrine one party rule before voters head to the polls next November.
The only way our party survives this is if Democrats carry out redistricting in every blue state where we are able to. However, Trump pursued this policy under the assumption that we wouldn't have the stomach to fight him on this. So far, with the exception of California and Virginia, his instincts have been correct.
But our fate isn't written in stone, yet... are we going to accept permanent MAGA rule as our new reality or are we going to fight back?
Colorado just decided they will fight back and just launched a massive Democratic redistricting effort of our own. Fair Fight Colorado is leading the charge but we are massively outnumbered and outgunned and MAGA is prepared to do everything to snuff out our initiative before it reaches the ballot.
[Will you make a founding donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to play your part in this critical and historic juncture and ensure that Colorado fights back with a new Congressional map that will prove Trump wrong and show MAGA that we are ready to escalate this fight and make them pay?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-Tej9sMigriu7TrGR-5eenXvSGl0eeZCFuK49rDap19aZtBMm3ryQSUoaIkcEI08gOAiGAU2BENVzMdn-IKes6J3GqCh0xntFgLlWcODu5Vnoj0tk_UuRIW0k90o2FM6bqzAlULSFK2jzJ4p8RGWHuNKvNzyUzSkA2UDY6L_wFiZsCiNxBze0HvsAXI3eUEG1dlXYHJcEnF01BIYQvCrRuTCi56S3vYp3Vj45TuUc7qW2AiWJXpuDv3upJuenfL6&c=UT-8ir4e9gqOrkwxebzowqUyjeO72xS2qJg3r_qh5Qyj_TsWIVdc0Q==&ch=CZ6RvaR6oZeCk4_U-2sKW4pvqN1BVL6ZBf58JUg_4xLGBuWnl5AlQQ==)

name: John Kasich
subject: We can call it the Trump Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Earlier this week, I sent President Trump a letter encouraging him to give the ultimate gift to the American people by calling for the| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/4up0tmd388QS5wSSjSq2OIScrleoK1dSuEf5jgU5gwdHo2s3711VivTm3txYt0MggOVpZ0CMfswF3YT8mqmy-wIjqqHwIoZmPi6NzacTBW7o1R8g5bKoD17VkHtJpg2T4rOiZqxWQESsBvZZAXJh8Vnj-782dUOTyL1LkWJfonI7ntj6Q9tLbi4axIMJYr9ElQlitN3TeY7B5au0OjBj1lNXIRzyKzNlcaP-uEwCthVFrn_z8wPd-Y2IhpBs3YN1TsfQwis9SCOBO2oYTGDR0eBXNzrA-2IahjfnkRIVseiP9Rke-5zO3ssWt_xqUm1KQ9i-EmeM8oTm3xCtk_5_fz-xgbAN9fNpFkW_S4n3vtOxSeQnNV-ICmqPWQy5/eKVJ1TidHxSQ6wCpr4JYdcy7AtyVns0g/15)
---
Peter, Earlier this week, I sent President Trump a letter encouraging him to give the ultimate gift to the American people by calling for the adoption of a Balanced Budget Amendment to the United States Constitution.

It isn't an easy path to add an Amendment to the Constitution - and that's a good thing. But it CAN be done by Congress proposing and passing an Amendment with a two-thirds majority in each chamber that would then be ratified by three-fourths of the states. It does not need to be done in a Constitutional Convention.
---
[](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/-Hs6aZzTRBpyR3UGlpzzylOBoce0s6gs2a3i0t9HHaD9KbKzKdG08CMrVcjJwSGXfLvqGpR372w-91TUghW273J3hbbPP1u7GvrK5aES2Wspszii9_FaUqtP3SYQ3ojPoNyam-zp7GwYcxAssCfV6aNWONSuQjDkm_PcnHaT-48MGSVdN2Zybfwnz4wRE-3u-ZgiWEzheMtt5z4ZHOrPHr5Ivf8kJ_KH5MzXlQ70SAQA6qDre_T-k2mUoEQzOyDiXzZDge-tjSYULgKvimifSBmAdG6UPEBIEYCVa-YwVc1_RZQWEBUN8SiQtJlAX4DOaualfDsddZK3jvqlHKgQN3UZh9wU-khJyGWoMdy5dX1v6xFOp3J9cfOqd1Dzg3AtvpKtQGAZuliOMfTHtR3nubRHc640vglg0U6g9fFOSsEOWLYaL6-_CS_DqNCgo1_70VD4POa7AhvWr7Q766tX2n0/448JC9QqCmPjiUA0cxKR2g0QEtXm64R_/15)
---
I believe that if President Trump identifies this as a priority and pushes his allies in Congress to get serious about it, we'll have the most positive movement toward a bipartisan solution on this issue that we've seen in a very long time.

[**If you'd like to read more, please read my most recent Substack post (here)**](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/p2r9LZZfT4wPxJLyQH0ADPqY-cmgeTnc4jJYbFDTQ6cU458ZLbqiP5Lta11L-OHvA_3F5ZMKgjSVl-IMQe2Wg_XUvy18SvfYi7VST-u2rnD3oX4_urdBoiAAtGG8Cuu2o3QFcArJHdcv4SYyf4CfhRRQLUPW_aILYhfGuwze4XFZQ9kHGEc2lS0t8wfCr804dyrtAx1mAMb_P0-SpZRxWRdcrJvFZ2PgQjLJWrQ5ru-x3S6FG0si-keBHBzXnWVXsnItGhVODtmWXhjDwF0XzOjWp9gXdfOXmPWYH2IismlFM0r393UBzr6V6SF5a7Q59PLsw1epQcOkFJHj2QcWruul8M8CcVguNhoLFyS2R3BnIgjaEgIn7npoJq2C8KkgCvn2VWnsdbJ01qJ_E1wJ85OGiQei8VJUPM7VjEpWqWR9rUkE2CCUlUrWKqc3fSrB26JmudvZWHc7zF9Y5cmnAK8/E16k_kfh2x-8yMNhJeZjQn7W52rUrw_O/15) that details why I think this is a smart move for the President and members of both parties in Congress. clean_body: Earlier this week, I sent President Trump a letter encouraging him to give the ultimate gift to the American people by calling for the| | | Peter, Earlier this week, I sent President Trump a letter encouraging him to give the ultimate gift to the American people by calling for the adoption of a Balanced Budget Amendment to the United States Constitution. It isn't an easy path to add an Amendment to the Constitution - and that's a good thing. But it CAN be done by Congress proposing and passing an Amendment with a two-thirds majority in each chamber that would then be ratified by three-fourths of the states. It does not need to be done in a Constitutional Convention. I believe that if President Trump identifies this as a priority and pushes his allies in Congress to get serious about it, we'll have the most positive movement toward a bipartisan solution on this issue that we've seen in a very long time. that details why I think this is a smart move for the President and members of both parties in Congress. If you'd like to help us spread the word, you can share this post on your social media accounts: | | | ---|---|--- Stay tuned for more updates as we continue to push for action on this issue! Thank you -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: Rashida Tlaib  via Team Cori
subject: Sign to support my resolution on genocide in Gaza:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251204_rashidapetition_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251204_rashidapetition_act]
Hi Peter,
Rashida Tlaib here. I recently introduced a new resolution in Congress to formally recognize the genocide of Palestinians in Gaza and end our country’s complicity in it.
Can you sign our petition today to support this resolution and demand Congress stop supporting genocide? [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-to-support-rashida-tlaibs-resolution-to-recognize-and-end-the-genocide-in-gaza/?source=group-cori-for-us&referrer=group-cori-for-us&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fupl_cab_email-25q4%3Frefcode%3Dx_251204_rashidapetition_act]
Sponsored by 20 of my colleagues in the House of Representatives, this resolution lays out evidence showing that Israel’s actions meet the legal definition of genocide under the Genocide Convention —including the Israeli military’s own data, which says that 83% of Palestinians killed in the past two years have been civilians.
The resolution demands the U.S. follow its obligations to prevent and punish the crime of genocide —including by ending weapons transfers, stopping military aid, sanctioning Israeli officials, and holding other perpetrators of this genocide to account.
House Resolution 876 also notes that our government has sent $52 billion of our tax dollars to Israel’s genocidal military over the past two years, through military aid and weapons transfers.
And now, the Trump administration is negotiating with Israel’s government to send an additional $76 billion worth of weapons , paid for with our tax dollars.
I’m standing with the majority of Americans in demanding our government stop funding and arming the Israeli government’s genocide of Palestinians. Will you stand with us today?
Add your name to demand Congress recognize the genocide in Gaza and end U.S. complicity in mass atrocities against the Palestinian people. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-to-support-rashida-tlaibs-resolution-to-recognize-and-end-the-genocide-in-gaza/?source=group-cori-for-us&referrer=group-cori-for-us&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fupl_cab_email-25q4%3Frefcode%3Dx_251204_rashidapetition_act]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-to-support-rashida-tlaibs-resolution-to-recognize-and-end-the-genocide-in-gaza/?source=group-cori-for-us&referrer=group-cori-for-us&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fupl_cab_email-25q4%3Frefcode%3Dx_251204_rashidapetition_act]
Israel’s government has continually violated its so-called “ceasefire” in Gaza. And this week, the UN Security Council outrageously voted to increase Trump’s control over the U.S.-Israeli occupation of Gaza—further undermining Palestinians’ legal right to self-determination.
Already, Israel’s government has illegal control over Gaza: As intense flooding destroys the tents of hundreds of thousands of forcibly displaced Palestinians with nowhere to go, Israel’s government is blocking emergency shelter as well as food from entering Gaza. This week’s UN Security Council vote further entrenches this occupation.
Our government must urgently take action to reverse course. As the Political Director of Jewish Voice for Peace Action affirmed when endorsing my new resolution:
“For over two years, the U.S. has been a full partner in the Israeli government’s genocide against Palestinians. Presidents and members of Congress have denied and erased Israel’s ongoing atrocities in Gaza, shielded Israel from accountability in the international arena, and attempted to dehumanize Palestinians.”
She added: “Congresswoman Tlaib and the original co-sponsors joining her on this historic resolution are making clear that this complicity must come to an end.”
Please join us and the majority of Americans demanding an end to this genocide: Add your name to support my resolution today. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-to-support-rashida-tlaibs-resolution-to-recognize-and-end-the-genocide-in-gaza/?source=group-cori-for-us&referrer=group-cori-for-us&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fupl_cab_email-25q4%3Frefcode%3Dx_251204_rashidapetition_act]
Thank you. Together, we’ll keep fighting state violence and demanding human rights be respected—at home and abroad.
With you in the fight for life, peace, and justice,
Rashida
Rep. Rashida Tlaib
Michigan’s 12th Congressional District
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251204_rashidapetition_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251204_rashidapetition_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251204_rashidapetition_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251204_rashidapetition_act&recurring=1]
Paid for by Cori For Us
Cori For Us
PO Box 12404
St. Louis, MO 63132
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/W8UekF_Ks0eg_1uL1zIi9A2?unsubscribedata=R2whPo%2FJ8vJdTPh9b%2FPaN6qzUaBBuG8JtuGGklI6GqWlM%2BQEOz9le2uUt6sVnQ8hNRgHKYYdMK%2Bg8hT2E4iOrJZhfQTdJNdTzZps5ZW0RsSwjLqyHZ7cMjBQX%2FrR4Y4Wa4W0bdam6l%2FJ4mBTL%2FuPAg%2BeL5EUeBCYxFmgr73YEEpwyvQLpOC7OO3bEwQp2Cy46Cy5dtRROt%2FGTRBT8KMO1hfIlLiIc554ZhuzPr1f1SfrokyXoM%2Fh6vbm1pCUAPI4thQynchH1FULn1OWCUWiqMVH0hivAtM46V6jYbaPhx%2FqtjTpygrLrup556oOuUgc4rKe9NAPvk553yTx8k89wlqXvYnD4ffJ8OKwXfqm9n%2FFGXWFYtwBnn9BGqOmGo%2FaRhksJqxPs6mlAXSL8bqP77itKsnT1nXfr0yYz03UaQW6EYJedQ%2FcTtIhDKLCRZXu .

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
