[Click HERE and I'll reveal what you're missing.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=8174095bb54a4fe795fd3e3deecaffc9&_e=yCTxAta-mdCuPWWBcQE9uhatFHtLr5bzTNJRNK-Gci5X_Q7hpRvu-QGBH5Tp1e8NnI_reaKQVSwf_zsrgEBhS6ROKYg0tnYh1mVqpG0Qu1G-QJcJqJ4gipM8ZSx7qxmzBJ0UCZZZe-wFDylr6sz3mgv4QopxJqnV_hFPl725xUxL_pW5kc8SnIrxQ3FhkxsVKKkktM__nXfOySRU8oog35QgERud6ik9uwVCQGRyFQpzbxB6gGUxcOXrgFFyvXkaeXUeLv2kVP6kgCudEThJvyAOvhJlGb_yKeV8Rg7qhNITiQI8HPd9-h3xmOmdiBbB9rx3V_f67KMxY4BLlKP4XYpAyRqg9MpHrPjHYnNtp_BgKbgi7zPvGMZrRUtzm5R2n7HwAc-NBeH0TFZSWRRzggWPtfHB2GBR7Ipl-x8qQZwv2l3xm_czVgT1l56DGdiu6q7TOy0NEN0IjLrHB8yq6zh-PRsQ1MVIFOP-aVVrm56gMtz4M782c3Po_Ys7AzMBKFIWiESykg5uOYAAwEk1x-cASr7gIW23e8RIXhd2TwU1rZEOsBCkS8w8r7QLWusnvHz0-eJShcHhjbDj0Cw0cA%3D%3D)

You may be **shocked** by what you discover.
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | See this Tesla charging station? | Experts believe these will soon be all over the country... But there's an even bigger development that many are overlooking. Take another look at the image above... Really focus on... Pay attention to what's happening around the chargers. Because what's unfolding there is much bigger than almost anyone realizes. Do you notice it? If not... You may be shocked by what you discover. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. | Peter,
If every House district in the country shifted left by this same amount as Tuesday's massive Democratic swing in the Tennessee Special election -- about 15 points -- we would be looking at a blue wave far larger than 2018.
To prepare for this, Trump is escalating his redistricting arms race to shore up the GOP majority and steal the upcoming 2026 midterms.
Which is why this week it was announced that Florida Gov. Ron Desantis will eliminate the majority of Florida's Democratic congressional seats.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rRtuItKGuQonWcvwpElQEH9NqczYp-XQTK5CMeufiS3_LgZvn_FDaMqI8CcM64D3UJ5RspAVPAAczUH62SaW2gqB-leW5pEomT40paSiNEZ9U6Mm9Qi27kpiOu3nQao7MQ4aWRtcrjbrEY7X1E_K4JYrp_4a5EMvmnJP4Tpt5BPW8eBkUQGRIaeT3zE2xa0b9pGA3ox7aPvY0Ii-dj3ittqn9TRNGKPaVg57g9VbwYMtk2ZuItQcjw==&c=xxrlqEhB23D1dGYZyU714tOYO-IhsBZGPQ_nNeESRHOGzhghLnr9eQ==&ch=soHFBGyLqi0m19Y6hL6Q3aoiphnVvYIpAILMLSygnSOVl6m_xXY-PA==)

And even more states plan to follow Florida's lead.
Do the math -- if every red state redistricts, the numbers show Democrats never winning the House again. MAGA will successfully enshrine one party rule before voters head to the polls next November.
The only way our party survives this is if Democrats carry out redistricting in every blue state where we are able to. However, Trump pursued this policy under the assumption that we wouldn't have the stomach to fight him on this. So far, with the exception of California and Virginia, his instincts have been correct.
But our fate isn't written in stone, yet... are we going to accept permanent MAGA rule as our new reality or are we going to fight back?
Colorado just decided they will fight back and just launched a massive Democratic redistricting effort of our own. Fair Fight Colorado is leading the charge but we are massively outnumbered and outgunned and MAGA is prepared to do everything to snuff out our initiative before it reaches the ballot. [Will you make a founding donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to play your part in this critical and historic juncture and ensure that Colorado fights back with a new Congressional map that will prove Trump wrong and show MAGA that we are ready to escalate this fight and make them pay?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rRtuItKGuQonWcvwpElQEH9NqczYp-XQTK5CMeufiS3_LgZvn_FDaMqI8CcM64D38lBq1RkUslZFlnK07fvte23r7Kfm48oRFNi2G6QEZBR4f0Q2AUzEuz5ge-rytoJI2qcJmKoazt2aYlIiDvshTSzA7BCDC-IqzzxRA1-MFx568MzEV2fYiVeVnxikN8lapN1OrRxOmNVew0G9uSrAF8bULLj_RzBYrXhSI4iNp4G9Qh9LRexJSHYXxImw0DEA&c=xxrlqEhB23D1dGYZyU714tOYO-IhsBZGPQ_nNeESRHOGzhghLnr9eQ==&ch=soHFBGyLqi0m19Y6hL6Q3aoiphnVvYIpAILMLSygnSOVl6m_xXY-PA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, If every House district in the country shifted left by this same amount as Tuesday's massive Democratic swing in the Tennessee Special election -- about 15 points -- we would be looking at a blue wave far larger than 2018. To prepare for this, Trump is escalating his redistricting arms race to shore up the GOP majority and steal the upcoming 2026 midterms. Which is why this week it was announced that Florida Gov. Ron Desantis will eliminate the majority of Florida's Democratic congressional seats. | == And even more states plan to follow Florida's lead. Do the math -- if every red state redistricts, the numbers show Democrats never winning the House again. MAGA will successfully enshrine one party rule before voters head to the polls next November. The only way our party survives this is if Democrats carry out redistricting in every blue state where we are able to. However, Trump pursued this policy under the assumption that we wouldn't have the stomach to fight him on this. So far, with the exception of California and Virginia, his instincts have been correct. But our fate isn't written in stone, yet... are we going to accept permanent MAGA rule as our new reality or are we going to fight back? Colorado just decided they will fight back and just launched a massive Democratic redistricting effort of our own. Fair Fight Colorado is leading the charge but we are massively outnumbered and outgunned and MAGA is prepared to do everything to snuff out our initiative before it reaches the ballot. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == | | | | They started this fight. name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Announcing our sixth 2026 Democratic primary candidate →
disclaimer_text: paid for by the same corporations driving up prices
body:
Today, Justice Democrats is proud to endorse a working-class, progressive primary challenger in Colorado’s 1st congressional district.
#
BREAKING, Peter:
Today, Justice Democrats is proud to announce our sixth 2026 Democratic primary endorsement: **Melat Kiros in Colorado’s 1st congressional district!**
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251204-mk.bTgN2b&refcode=em20251204-37251&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=37251%2E1203867%2EPPbfP1)
Melat is the daughter of Ethiopian immigrants who built a life in Denver through hard work and community. When she witnessed the Tigray genocide in Ethiopia in 2020-2022, she spoke up against it. And then when she saw the genocide happening in Gaza, she defended pro-Palestinian protesters — even though it cost her her job at her law firm.
That’s the kind of urgency and moral clarity we need in Congress: principled fighters who won’t back down when lives are on the line, not more Representatives who will fold for a corporate PAC check.
**[Before I tell you more about Melat, rush a contribution of any amount right now, and 100% of it will go directly to her campaign →](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251204-mk.bTgN2b&refcode=em20251204-37251&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=37251%2E1203867%2EPPbfP1)**
Melat’s parents supported their family from the ground up by working two and three jobs while neighbors and chosen family helped raise Melat and her sister. That’s how she learned what community really means: _no one gets left behind._
**Today, too many people are being left behind by those in Washington, like CO-01 incumbent Rep. Diana DeGette.** DeGette has been in office since the year Melat was born. Rent is crushing, childcare costs more than a second mortgage, and you can lose everything because you get sick—even if you have insurance. Meanwhile, Congress is bought and paid for by the same corporations driving up prices.
Melat represents a generation that did what everyone said they should: earned degrees, worked hard, followed the rules, and _still_ aren’t able to afford a home or healthcare. As a renter, a barista, and a PhD student, she knows firsthand what it means to live the struggle that career politicians only talk about.
Melat is running for Congress to put working people at the center of every decision and to deliver three basic guarantees: **Medicare for All, Housing First, and Universal Childcare.**
We can’t deliver these key necessities to working-class people in Denver and the rest of the country until we get corporate money out of politics, and that means replacing corporate-backed Democrats like DeGette with a new generation of leadership.
But like other Justice Democrats, Melat can’t defeat an entrenched, complacent incumbent without support from our people-powered movement.
**[Become a founding donor of Melat’s campaign today by pitching in $5 or more and help us send her to join our bloc in Congress next year →](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251204-mk.bTgN2b&refcode=em20251204-37251&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=4&akid=37251%2E1203867%2EPPbfP1)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251204-mk.bTgN2b&refcode=em20251204-37251&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=23&akid=37251%2E1203867%2EPPbfP1)**
In solidarity,
Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251204-37251-footer&t=24&refcode2=37251_1203867_PPbfP1&akid=37251%2E1203867%2EPPbfP1)**
---

1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A few thoughts for you, if you have a minute.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251204_1_kelly.iA17dH&refcode=em20251204-1&t=1&akid=3842%2E582294%2Eu5I9-L)**
Team, it’s been a weird couple weeks.
In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire. If you had told me before one of those missions that 25 years later the President of the United States would call for me to be hanged, I would have said you were crazy.
But that’s exactly what happened.
Sadly, this is the kind of thing we’ve come to expect from this president. He’s a person who can live through the same year we have — rising political violence, escalating tensions, assassinations — and go on to wish death upon sitting members of Congress.
Yes, it was concerning, but more than anything, it’s incredibly sad. I served 25 years in the Navy, launched into orbit 4 times, and ran for Senate because I love this country. To me, there is nothing more American than standing up for our Constitution.
Donald Trump will never understand that. He’ll never understand putting service to this country before yourself. He’s made billions of dollars off his presidency while millions of people are wondering how they’ll afford their health care, or how to feed their kids.
He just doesn’t get it, and he never will. But that makes it even more important that people who do get it — people like you — stick together. That’s how we’ll get through this.
There’s no telling what’s ahead of us. This is uncharted territory for me, for my family, for my team, and we have to be ready for anything.
I wish I didn’t need to ask you to do any more than you already have, but today, that’s what I need to do.
**[Can you split a donation between me and Chris Pappas to help raise the resources we’ll need to stand against Trump and anything he throws at us?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251204_1_kelly.iA17dH&refcode=em20251204-1&t=2&akid=3842%2E582294%2Eu5I9-L)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251204_1_kelly.iA17dH&amount=5&refcode=em20251204-1&t=21&akid=3842%2E582294%2Eu5I9-L)**
Again, I can’t thank you enough. It really means the world to me.
Mark
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251204-1&t=22&refcode2=3842_582294_u5I9-L&akid=3842%2E582294%2Eu5I9-L)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=3842%2E582294%2Eu5I9-L)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=24&akid=3842%2E582294%2Eu5I9-L)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3842%2E582294%2Eu5I9-L)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

subject: READ THIS: They're Going Too Far
body:
A dangerous push is spreading, and we need your voice.
| | |
---
| | [](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com%2F/1/0100019aea19af70-e1a88d6c-5579-4ae0-a6ba-ca22810442b4-000000/a-R-2kuWqdG1YWcq_CbNtFsisOs=455)
---
| |
---
| Peter, As a U.S. Army veteran, I've seen what discipline, duty, and loyalty really look like. I've watched men and women follow the chain of command in situations where hesitation could cost lives. So when I saw political activists, radical Leftists, and commentators openly encouraging members of our military to _**ignore** or **defy** _President Trump's lawful orders as Commander-in-Chief, _I knew I had to speak up._ **Let me be absolutely clear:** **This is _NOT_ how the military works.** **This is _NOT_ how America works.** **And I will _NOT_ stay silent while people try to drag our armed forces into political warfare.**
---
| | [DEFEND OUR MILITARY](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fmilitary-conduct-poll%3Futm_campaign=20251201_Reeves_MilitaryConduct%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019aea19af70-e1a88d6c-5579-4ae0-a6ba-ca22810442b4-000000/xmofR-R2onU_C4_JtKx5uEs9XZU=455)
---
| When I put on the uniform, politics didn't matter. _The mission did. The Constitution did. And the Commander-in-Chief did._ Anyone who encourages disobedience in the ranks – _even casually, even for clicks_ – is playing with fire and putting our national security at risk. That's why I'm launching an official nationwide poll. I want to hear directly from YOU: **Do you believe the military must follow the lawful orders of the Commander-in-Chief?** [** _Make your voice heard right now. >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fmilitary-conduct-poll%3Futm_campaign=20251201_Reeves_MilitaryConduct%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019aea19af70-e1a88d6c-5579-4ae0-a6ba-ca22810442b4-000000/75DMSXmmTHNHE3T7QAkBXSWPZkY=455)
---
| | [TAKE THE OFFICIAL MILITARY CONDUCT POLL](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fmilitary-conduct-poll%3Futm_campaign=20251201_Reeves_MilitaryConduct%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/3/0100019aea19af70-e1a88d6c-5579-4ae0-a6ba-ca22810442b4-000000/bN0-Bkqh_i8QU8VvSZMRU9Qno2E=455)
---
| As a veteran, I know what it means to serve with honor. As a conservative, I know what it means to defend our country. And as a candidate for U.S. Senate, I will not allow our military to become a political weapon for the far Left. I need to know where you stand, Peter. [**_This moment matters. >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fmilitary-conduct-poll%3Futm_campaign=20251201_Reeves_MilitaryConduct%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/4/0100019aea19af70-e1a88d6c-5579-4ae0-a6ba-ca22810442b4-000000/m_V8QFvXjQ0wll3y_6hwMMyQUwU=455)

And I will NOT stay silent while people try to drag our armed forces into political warfare. | | | When I put on the uniform, politics didn't matter. The mission did. The Constitution did. And the Commander-in-Chief did. Anyone who encourages disobedience in the ranks – even casually, even for clicks – is playing with fire and putting our national security at risk. That's why I'm launching an official nationwide poll. I want to hear directly from YOU: Do you believe the military must follow the lawful orders of the Commander-in-Chief? | | | As a veteran, I know what it means to serve with honor. As a conservative, I know what it means to defend our country. And as a candidate for U.S. Senate, I will not allow our military to become a political weapon for the far Left. I need to know where you stand, Peter. | | | Standing with you, Bryce ReevesRepublican Candidate for U.S. Senate (VA) | | | | | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 7021 Fredericksburg, VA 22404, United States | | or

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: A six-year-old boy vanished into ICE custody
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBP-kw0Y5nvwRaorU_xXXJTiT8CNwweOTd8ESkZgBrfNyU7csSi02vZI0_cGH2e92mJAT45FueAGVhMpi0A6q3Yg4Pz5TaX8ZmSvVLRifXSRR/4m5/iVlWnwZARrS0w5x1pA00RQ/h0/h001.zOprdAp6RpAsUX0JkofXwrw2pm1Jm6bcBSrPGc2ubqI)
---
Peter,

When I read the report about a Chinese father taken by ICE during a routine check-in and separated from his six-year-old son who has still not been located, I felt something inside me break. I keep thinking of that child, Yuanxin, scared and alone at just six years old. One moment he is holding his father's hand, the next his world collapses behind a locked door. I come back to my own kids. I think about my son's small hand in mine when we cross the street. I think about my daughter running to me with that trust only a child carries. The idea of someone pulling them from me without explanation shakes me in a way I cannot fully capture on a page. [**Help fuel a campaign that fights for a future where children are never disappeared into government custody and where ICE no longer has the power to tear families apart.**

](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDnx41PjpfqmWQejciS0lupEQY3vIG7au_ZO6jtt82Yj8JVveNluTR0hn96x_Wxt3eob4Hva-X7wGlbrdLXTvLahlvhcH7C5qTM5P9U6cc4qRF4fbDIkBXs59Z-c0l15R8FPGmsB-h31o64lc4CIzUUchZ5UGMNoelfOK2vczZJ31ZdrCxXmtkM_mWiio-1LLQMJSD2qatDg7E-DX9PfDCUxaJW_5nbN9FnSU5k2QxKvBdiuIz9vOdv5Cx5jkveeQgzh3hVFgHJy647JTFiawmHEsJc7zbyEuOKP0fngLLWeg/4m5/iVlWnwZARrS0w5x1pA00RQ/h1/h001.SLk_OJRQzeK8hJUG_UQmG3EeCoja3HsmiP_zfTWFIuI)This story landed so heavily because something similar happened on my block not long ago. Families in our own community live with the constant threat that someone will disappear, and recently, ICE agents showed up in MY neighborhood. My wife and I rushed outside to document their actions and keep our neighbors' kids inside. When I see these ICE operations and these separations, I also see the votes cast in Congress that made them possible. **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez supported the Laken Riley Act. She voted for the House resolution that praised ICE. ** She raised her hand for budget increases that expanded the agency's reach to levels that shock even seasoned immigration lawyers. Every one of those votes strengthened the system that swallowed up that six-year-old boy in New York. Every one of those votes deepened the danger facing families across Washington state. I am running because families deserve someone who carries the responsibility of this moment with the seriousness it demands. Someone who understands what it means to raise small children in a country where immigration agents can take a child away without warning. Someone who will not justify these acts with political language meant to soothe party operatives or appeal to the fringes. Help me build a campaign that will meet this crisis with moral clarity. [**Chip in and join this fight so no one in Southwest Washington ever faces this kind of terror alone.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDnx41PjpfqmWQejciS0lupEQY3vIG7au_ZO6jtt82Yj8JVveNluTR0hn96x_Wxt3ckiFGh44jtrssmQ5i93bkw4GcsG0zIXY1e9RIQQ9n8PtBFpNqAZOvwSBRD_ITC0Y-8KlTQ_yhANtTuaW3OIGtpLzD3pREyhfE0Y5PymA7F_tCtSkFhqlzpl1vc8wGTFkbM_GGflEF6QEs6u64x6pE3oKZFfnThXksYKBKy9FZj39609o7Wgw1u_Kg_y27XrCDS3iylBAF-1T6cyDOH72yPEhBtfFLVIpq6XNObkx2T2w/4m5/iVlWnwZARrS0w5x1pA00RQ/h2/h001.FiD0pzgQ0rDEfhpYRPhM4X6oaV0bp7fTWhvRUscKiaI) Let's Heal Washington!

Brent Hennrich
---
[ **SUPPORT BRENT TODAY** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDnx41PjpfqmWQejciS0lupEQY3vIG7au_ZO6jtt82Yj8JVveNluTR0hn96x_Wxt3f3z-mrnhVZkKR7u6Q0nJ1YatyOMwEoOFxkCkV4utNltp8kSbk9GktUEleEV71zWU4iVwUqmThvXq6bK0PQSEXn7JgG9eP2q-QpWFDH6MPwVA5BR_cyeeqW3lVtEkVzaeRE5PR9xowXR5ZUNZyV5p4KVMpsW2xbWGDHq8qfQt6NYkjt_vlIKEttp9bH_b_W6EZexcv9F3Uk8GHP1KbiQgsBEp7ZMVQSnxLdwgN9Ykb-Yg/4m5/iVlWnwZARrS0w5x1pA00RQ/h3/h001.bC3LqV23X4DrvFTBPnM1t8By1-wglVfbX6YX1urGPJc)

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Intimidating requirements and suppressive policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_1&amount=25]
Team,
We've told you that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate.
The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot.
While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely.
The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic.
We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_1&amount=35]
The problem is not only that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike.
These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more.
We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to protect the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120425_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120425_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=6PsBT04jB5tq9qd7YCWbqeMHfGXcUBr8lkuNRCYhtxCsncdzzL4CB67eiVulJKubem4p0uIa5h79IQeQTurCl0bH219uZKp7o9nG6tTb7zHkkIu9efPIAyf8eWErow%2FalRGu6l6k3j8gl0CgnHXHkTOTM61nnpNjisEgVDNwZAvP3IZkzhXU8OZRxtATbqYI3Ce5z9NeiAYcNAY8A4cSRAKsWhmWc5CMTw8q8gDzbVum4aU7APqaL4Gwo0ADzRsIvsD17C3PIssQL9f%2F3eWKNdJwp3avEj1Jj6UIC4lnHir47ALb1OVeTnJLIuGh%2BPbiyCngxUMbj3CLWh2zGMwCOdTOHuFN%2BfQSWeM0TlT2A2RB9pp%2FRelrhvNXusYoFSFm9YrP2ZhV4DADVJU3c0ZpmsBzGu%2Fs8vTCiI13AS7HynE%3D .

name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: Something powerful happened…
body:
---
Derek, In the aftermath of the 2025 elections, we’ve sent several messages about the resounding victories Democrats delivered across the country — and the work we need to do to carry that momentum into the midterm elections. We’ll be honest: We did not know how Democrats would respond. It would have been easy to take the results of the 2025 elections as permission to relax and take our foot off the gas. But after we sent those messages, something powerful happened: Elizabeth from North Carolina chipped in $15. A few minutes later, Michael from Alabama contributed $15. Then, Wanda from Ohio pitched in $15. And suddenly, we had a whole movement of people committed to winning the 2026 elections. **Derek, each of these donations came from a grassroots supporter just like you — people with families and responsibilities giving what they could because our democracy matters to them.** [**So, will you match Elizabeth, Michael, and Wanda’s $15 donations with one of your own?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251204_5437_fr&amount=15&refcode2=5437_22930333_iKDoiE&akid=5437%2E22930333%2EiKDoiE) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $15](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em_20251204_5437_fr&refcode2=5437_22930333_iKDoiE&akid=5437%2E22930333%2EiKDoiE)**

clean_body: Derek, In the aftermath of the 2025 elections, we’ve sent several messages about the resounding victories Democrats delivered across the country — and the work we need to do to carry that momentum into the midterm elections. We’ll be honest: We did not know how Democrats would respond. It would have been easy to take the results of the 2025 elections as permission to relax and take our foot off the gas. But after we sent those messages, something powerful happened: Elizabeth from North Carolina chipped in $15. A few minutes later, Michael from Alabama contributed $15. Then, Wanda from Ohio pitched in $15. And suddenly, we had a whole movement of people committed to winning the 2026 elections. Derek, each of these donations came from a grassroots supporter just like you — people with families and responsibilities giving what they could because our democracy matters to them. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | ** Thank you for your support, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

Swoboda is spending her time sucking up to Trump and his MAGA Super-PACs so she can secure huge donations. I cannot think of anything more vile. **I’m running to be a fighter for working families, not Trump and his MAGA enablers.** **[So, will you take two minutes to fill out my December Priorities Survey? After years of standing up for students in the classroom and working families in our communities, I know it's time to take that fight to Washington. I am a first-generation American, born to Indian immigrants and raised in Jupiter. Today, I live in Palm Beach Gardens with my husband and son. I know firsthand that our district deserves a representative who wants to fight for working families, who has dedicated their life to creating opportunities for others, and who will fight to keep the American dream alive. That's what I've done throughout my career in education and public service. People thought I was too young or too inexperienced. But Democracy Prep Endurance High School became one of the top-performing schools in New York. **Here's what I'm most proud of: every single one of our graduates was accepted to college, despite 86% of them living below the poverty line.** **Then I was chosen for my experience in fighting poverty to serve as a White House Fellow at the Department of Education and Domestic Policy Council.** This role taught me how policies developed in Washington can lead to economic prosperity for families across the nation. clean_body: I'm Pia Dandiya, and I'm running as a Democrat for Congress to represent Florida's 21st District. After years of standing up for students in the classroom and working families in our communities, I know it's time to take that fight to Washington. | | | I'm Pia Dandiya, and I'm running as a Democrat for Congress to represent Florida's 21st District. After years of standing up for students in the classroom and working families in our communities, I know it's time to take that fight to Washington. I am a first-generation American, born to Indian immigrants and raised in Jupiter. Today, I live in Palm Beach Gardens with my husband and son. I know firsthand that our district deserves a representative who wants to fight for working families, who has dedicated their life to creating opportunities for others, and who will fight to keep the American dream alive. That's what I've done throughout my career in education and public service. I studied Government at Harvard and got my Master's in Education from Boston University, but honestly, my best education came from the classroom. I began my teaching career as a math teacher through Teach For America, working with middle school students, where I helped them achieve some of the highest growth scores in the entire state. At just 28, I took a leap of faith and founded my own high school in Harlem, New York. People thought I was too young or too inexperienced. But Democracy Prep Endurance High School became one of the top-performing schools in New York. Here's what I'm most proud of: every single one of our graduates was accepted to college, despite 86% of them living below the poverty line. Then I was chosen for my experience in fighting poverty to serve as a White House Fellow at the Department of Education and Domestic Policy Council. This role taught me how policies developed in Washington can lead to economic prosperity for families across the nation. I'm running for Congress to put people first again. Elected leadership shouldn’t be about headlines or political fights – it should be about you, and I will — be a representative committed to the economic freedom of every American. I'm ready to take everything I've learned—from the classroom to the principal's office to the White House—and put it to work for you in Congress. But first, I need your support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | To a better future, Pia Dandiya * Pia Dandiya is a first-generation American, educator, and public servant who has dedicated her life to expanding opportunity for others. She’s running for Congress to build an economy that empowers every American to thrive—not just survive—and to defend the programs that millions rely on, like Social Security, Medicaid, and support for our veterans. Pia is ready to bring bold, people-first leadership to Washington—and she’s counting on your support. Paid for by Pia Dandiya for Congress

| | There are dark spiritual forces at work seeking to destroy America from the inside out. We’re watching it unfold in real time.

But I refuse to let my four kids inherit a nation that rejects its rich heritage of revival and turns its back on God.

This is what compels me to launch the “Roots of Revival” Tour in 2026.

The work ahead is massive.

The resources required are significant.

The energy demanded will stretch all of us.

But America is a nation in crisis. But I refuse to let my four kids inherit a nation that rejects its rich heritage of revival and turns its back on God. This is what compels me to launch the “Roots of Revival” Tour in 2026. The work ahead is massive. The resources required are significant. The energy demanded will stretch all of us. But America is a nation in crisis. name: Dexter HQ
subject: Families face an impossible choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Last month , the Senate passed a deal to reopen the government without extending the enhanced premium tax credits for the Affordable Care Act, or proposing anything to curb rising healthcare costs.
Now , we’re a month deep into open enrollment for the ACA—and families are facing doubled, tripled, and sometimes, quadrupled healthcare premiums.
By 2034 , because of the Big, Ugly Bill and if the ACA tax credits aren’t extended, experts predict that around 14 million more Americans could go without health insurance.
At moments like this, it’s painfully clear why we need more physicians serving in government—leaders who actually understand what these policy decisions mean for real patients and their families.
Dr. Maxine Dexter spent her career caring for people in crisis, and now she’s fighting in Congress to protect their access to care. To keep her voice at the forefront of this fight, please consider making a contribution today. Your support helps keep a physician’s perspective at the decision-making table where it belongs. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q4?refcode=x_251204_inthefight_act]

name: Marc Elias
subject: Let me explain.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey there, it's Marc Elias.

For years, I've gone to court to stop Trump and defend democracy -- and I've won 64 times. **Now, working with the DSCC, we're doing our part to safeguard voting rights, uphold the rule of law, and protect your freedom.**

But I won't lie: Trump's actions put all that work at risk -- and we need to fight back NOW. [**Support from grassroots Democrats like you is what powers the fight to flip the Senate so Democrats can put a stop to Trump's extremism. Will you give $5 to the DSCC to help us stop Trump's allies by winning back a Democratic Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251204-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251204-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=21946%2E9716520%2ERTw-X9)

Let me explain further:

Donald Trump is ignoring due process and openly mocking the courts. He's threatening the very foundation of our democracy by attacking fair, free, and secure elections. And he's going after voting rights -- the very bedrock of our democracy.

Worst of all, Trump has a seemingly **endless** supply of fools and cowards in the Republican Party who are willing to help him.

But the DSCC and I are fighting back: The _moment_ Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten voting rights, we filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats nationwide. And the good news is, we've already notched some key victories in the case!

**But the fight isn't over yet. Donald Trump is an aspiring despot -- not just for a single day -- and despots _never_ willingly give up their power. We have to take it from them.**

Winning the Senate is the first step, and Democrats need to flip just four seats to claim the majority and wrest power away from the GOP.

**As I've said before, the fight for democracy is the fight of our generation.[Right now, the best thing YOU can do is chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand in this fight with me to unseat Senate Republicans and elect a Democratic Senate majority the first chance we get >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251204-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251204-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=21946%2E9716520%2ERTw-X9)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Tim Walz
subject: My newest opponent
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251204-235&t=1&akid=235%2E34582%2Es_7HGg)
Peter,
**Mike Lindell is running for Governor.**
The MyPillow CEO and snake oil salesman is bringing his election-denying, con-manning, Trump-sycophantic self to this governor’s race.
Peter, we’ve seen what happens when we elect a crook to the highest office in America. We can’t let it happen here in Minnesota.
While I’m not going around Minnesota selling a — let’s be honest — below average pillow, I am selling the progress that we’ve made in my time as governor — like paid family and medical leave, free school lunches for our students, and tax breaks for working families.
**I want to be clear: Mike Lindell is Donald Trump’s pick for Governor of Minnesota. He’s got the backing of his MAGA buddies, and we can be sure they’ll empty their pockets to support his campaign.**
**[Will you chip in $5 today to make sure we’re able to fight back against Mike Lindell?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251204.Pk1THb&amount=5&refcode=em20251204-235&t=2&akid=235%2E34582%2Es_7HGg)**

I’m grateful,
Tim Walz

name: Beth Poole, Evergreen
subject: Help! We are so close
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
We came up short, but you can still support Evergreen
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4308548/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi friend,

Giving Tuesday showed the heart of this movement as climate advocates like you came together to support urgent action in the states.

And while we didn’t meet our goal, we came _so close_ —raising **$24,412** total, which is just **$588** short of our target.

We didn’t receive any offers to match gifts for this particular campaign, **so I won’t lie to you and say that there are extra funds waiting to be “unlocked” if we meet our goal.** But, Evergreen still sets fundraising goals because they represent the real work ahead. And **if we don’t meet those goals, we’ll have to scale back our plans** to fuel advocacy, amplify diverse voices, and build broad, cross-movement solidarity that will define what's possible for our clean energy future.

So, when we say that generosity helps us make climate action unstoppable, we mean it! Every contribution ensures we can keep up the fight against fossil fuel giants, defend bold state-level climate policies, launch targeted campaigns to expand affordable clean energy like wind and solar, and bring more people into this movement.

Take [our new report released with Synapse Energy Economics today](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4308549/87SdQ4wZ), where we outline concrete steps that can be taken to help save the average Virginia household **$712 per year.** With electric bills on track to rise by 15% for many Virginians, these savings can deliver tangible relief to families while laying the groundwork for lasting reform.

The work our team did these past few months to release this playbook, and the work we’ll do to release more of them in the coming months, **is fueled by your support.**

If we want to continue to produce these kinds of in-depth policy resources for decision-makers to be able to lower energy costs and reduce dangerous climate pollution, we need your help!

[**Will you help us meet our goal by making a gift today?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4308550/87SdQ4wZ)

Thank you again for everything you do as a part of the Evergreen community. Together, we're making lasting change possible. |
---
| With gratitude, |
---
| | |
---
### Beth Poole
Senior Fundraising Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.

subject: We need to do it again next year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark just launched his reelection campaign, so I’m asking each of you to support him today to make his victory possible

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120607770/586800755/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SpanbergerRelaunch_251204_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDA3YjUzYy0zMWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o10JL7VK3bbKKeEM3Rna26u9Aic6GD2xHeUs1NpEI64=) Hi Derek, it’s Abigail Spanberger, and I am happy to support Mark Warner’s reelection.

[_**Senator Warner officially announced he’s running for reelection to the United States Senate, so I’m asking you to contribute anything you can today to support his campaign >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120607772/586800772/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SpanbergerRelaunch_251204_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDA3YjUzYy0zMWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o10JL7VK3bbKKeEM3Rna26u9Aic6GD2xHeUs1NpEI64=)

Every day in Washington, Mark is working hard to put Virginia’s families first, standing up to the Trump Administration’s policies that are skyrocketing the cost of living while gutting health care, and bringing people together to find common sense solutions.

**We need to send Mark back to Washington so he can continue his work on behalf of Virginia – but we can’t take this election for granted.**

We need to be ready for far-right Republicans to spend tens of millions of dollars in this race, just like they did against me. National Republican groups covered the airwaves with attacks against me and I was even attacked online personally by Donald Trump. The GOP did everything they could to distract Virginians from the truth: that their agenda is devastating the Commonwealth’s economy and threatening the livelihoods of so many.

It was because of grassroots supporters like you, Derek, that my campaign overcame these attacks and won resoundingly.

Now, with Senate control on the line, we need to do it again.

[_**Will you pitch in anything you can to Mark’s reelection campaign so he can build the momentum he needs to reach voters and get the job done next year?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120607774/586800786/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SpanbergerRelaunch_251204_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDA3YjUzYy0zMWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o10JL7VK3bbKKeEM3Rna26u9Aic6GD2xHeUs1NpEI64=) clean_body: Mark just launched his reelection campaign, so I’m asking each of you to support him today to make his victory possible | | | = Hi Derek, it’s Abigail Spanberger, and I am happy to support Mark Warner’s reelection. = Every day in Washington, Mark is working hard to put Virginia’s families first, standing up to the Trump Administration’s policies that are skyrocketing the cost of living while gutting health care, and bringing people together to find common sense solutions. We need to send Mark back to Washington so he can continue his work on behalf of Virginia – but we can’t take this election for granted. We need to be ready for far-right Republicans to spend tens of millions of dollars in this race, just like they did against me. National Republican groups covered the airwaves with attacks against me and I was even attacked online personally by Donald Trump. The GOP did everything they could to distract Virginians from the truth: that their agenda is devastating the Commonwealth’s economy and threatening the livelihoods of so many. It was because of grassroots supporters like you, Derek, that my campaign overcame these attacks and won resoundingly. Now, with Senate control on the line, we need to do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a well-timed donation to help elect James Talarico to the United States Senate. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here's the truth:
In just a few weeks, we will close the books on our first full FEC fundraising deadline. When it ends, we're legally required to report how much we've raised. The number of donations we received will be public as well.
Everyone is going to be watching. The press, our opponents, and people considering spending to defeat us will be looking to see if we have the grassroots strength to win this race.
It will all be out there. No hiding.
This is a big deal. Not just for the message it sends, but because no matter who Republicans nominate, billionaires and corporate mega-donors are going to line up to fill their war chest in a desperate attempt to smear James and defeat our movement.
[**So if helping to elect James, winning this race and inspiring people that a different kind of politics is important to you, we're asking for your support. Our average donation is around $30. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

But this map aligns with a powerful shift already underway—set in motion by Trump’s latest Executive Order.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Take a look at this map... But I believe this order just triggered a rare market signal I’ve tracked for over a decade—one that’s preceded some of the biggest gold booms in U.S. history. Even more shocking? One company at the heart of this shift may already be on Warren Buffett’s radar. It fits the exact profile Berkshire has quietly targeted before—high cash flow, undervalued, and directly tied to what this map reveals. I’ve identified that stock—along with four more miners I believe are in the direct path of this developing wave. The map is real. The trigger has fired. And the time to act is now. name: Haley's mom
subject: I’m Haley Stevens’ mom. And yes, she's THE BEST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I have to brag

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1487%2E49239%2EzYuGwW)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9467?t=2&akid=1487%2E49239%2EzYuGwW)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9468?t=3&akid=1487%2E49239%2EzYuGwW)
Hi there! 👋 I’m Maria Marcotte – proud Michigander, leopard print enthusiast 🐆, artist, and lifelong cheerleader of the AMAZING HALEY STEVENS!

Listen, hun. I know I’m biased. I _am_ Haley’s mom ♥️. But she really is amazing!
She’s always been the most determined person in the room – ever since she was a kid with pigtails, reading a book in a T-shirt covered in sawdust from helping out with our family landscaping business. 💪📚🌳

Now she’s out there doing her thing for Michiganders in Congress – saving jobs, fighting for health care, taking on these MAGA goofs, and standing up for working families every single day. And never forgetting where she came from.
I honestly don’t know how Haley does it all, but I do know one thing: **She can’t do it alone.**

Republican megadonors are pouring millions into Michigan to try to flip this seat red. And as a proud Michigander (and Haley’s mom), I’m telling you with my mom voice: **We CANNOT let that happen.**
We need someone who LOVES the people of Michigan in the Senate – not another rich friend of Donald Trump’s. 🤬💰

That’s why I’m asking – for my daughter, and for our state: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help my Haley fight back and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9468?t=4&akid=1487%2E49239%2EzYuGwW)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9468?t=5&akid=1487%2E49239%2EzYuGwW)
---
Any donation would mean the world to me – and so much to Haley. 💖

Thanks for supporting my girl. And if you see a woman in a leopard coat at an event yelling “That’s my daughter!!” – it’s me! 😎🐆 Come say hi!
With love and mom-hugs,

Maria Marcotte
(Haley’s mom 💕)
P.S. Call your mom!
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9469?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1487%2E49239%2EzYuGwW) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9467?t=7&akid=1487%2E49239%2EzYuGwW)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

33717 Woodward Ave #539
