name: James Carville
subject: the most important Senate seat on the whole damn map
body:
Making this request on behalf of Roy Cooper.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
Peter, here’s the situation: There was _one guy_ that Democrats needed to run if we were going to have a chance at taking down the GOP in 2026. We got him. Now, we have to help him win. **His name’s Roy Cooper.** He was one heck of a governor, and he’s going to be a helluva United States Senator for North Carolina and all Americans. We asked, and he _stepped up._ **The seat he’s running for is so important — it’s the key to taking back the whole damn Senate!** **[If we pull this off, we can change the game. So, are we gonna do this, or what? If you’re in, Roy NEEDS you to pitch in before his end-of-year filing deadline. He can’t win this thing without you, and time’s running out to hit his goal.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2121?t=6&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2122?t=7&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2123?t=8&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2124?t=9&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2125?t=10&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2126?t=11&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2127?t=12&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
Peter, I’m betting on Roy, but this one won’t be easy. The whole GOP is dead set on defeating Roy — and they’re putting their money behind a no-good D.C. lobbyist who Donald Trump decided deserves a Senate seat. They think they can buy this race. I say _hell no._
Here’s what’s the most freakin’ absurd thing I’ve heard in a while: **Experts think Republicans are set to make this the first U.S. Senate race to cost _one billion dollars._** They are going to flood this state with their dirty dark money and huge checks from super PACs. If we’re going to win this, we need to match them dollar for dollar.
The GOP holds all the cards in Washington right now. They can do whatever they feel like — and what they feel like doing is hurting folks in North Carolina and beyond. Flipping the Senate is the first step to stopping this BS.
**[There’s no time to lose. Help Roy win this toss-up — pitch in what you can before the year ends and Roy has to file a PUBLIC financial report. Anything you can manage will help hit his goal before time runs out.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2121?t=13&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2122?t=14&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)

---

---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2125?t=17&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2126?t=18&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2127?t=19&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)
---
Thank you,
James Carville
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=94%2E124072%2E-3245Y)**

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

body:
| | | Hi Peter, On Saturday, December 13th, the **_Progress for the People_**** _Town Hall_** series is coming to Scranton — and we hope you’ll join us there! 📍 Where: Scranton, PA (full details after RSVP) 📅 When: Saturday, December 13th, 2025 🕐 Doors Open: 1:00 PM ET 👉 [**RSVP here**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxOdQ4EkMiKwHEnYq02xofejFPfV_0EDJI1wK1cUhbeUoHvHEKUaObPCXhcd0ScwFYa_m4QkhqajTqeFcd4a8UDJdfwbWBtbNVBqAqFtNroCjJizszlKfLzEfhiS5KqwNVDXkcgxTIlzBeBS0Qwdkq58y_OaBNyeU29ZmFFPdz4eK_jV7I9jUSSyhHXwF2CdI0hh_FLMem_wCCiN8Bc0Mu8I6NwNN0pcsEg-i_eY5xcSLK4k9e6ZQ0QmAqem8i3RUrLRT-K_L1SoveIxXEEK2_QA/4m5/xCZQDhmcSSikKNrPsuDkAw/h0/h001.N_kEXIjq0xEKtk-jOYo2EUGjq71SFv3zly_-DsbJMZI) This town hall is part of a nationwide tour that brings together neighbors, organizers, and progressive leaders to talk honestly about what’s happening in our communities — **and how we can take action together to move Pennsylvania forward.** Right now, GOP politicians across the state are advancing policies that make life harder for working families. This event is a chance for us to gather, share what we’re seeing on the ground, and stand united behind a vision for a Pennsylvania that invests in people — not the wealthy and well-connected. **[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxOdQ4EkMiKwHEnYq02xofejFPfV_0EDJI1wK1cUhbeUoHvHEKUaObPCXhcd0ScwFYEwrUkTUF37tP7v9G-UNoPvZPrw8-55T-70q_QV-SlALTQWXe_TdIOMxYYcHiAUYUt-sjEtDNugFLkhDf8kdkWC-1AZVd_gHfrKvHHXB84zlDj3SV-MlCoXberK6AVaAd6b1f1SGBttUZsQgzr_HVR0xlTYSDn8vkosC8qSJ_iSxVeIIGkAlpDwJ8Zv-2N_8KDIieQzKRo1PhizNzotrryw/4m5/xCZQDhmcSSikKNrPsuDkAw/h1/h001.IShkXPbrTT42eLkgUuMb29QaFz22_YLPVnAKJvTjco8)** **[RSVP now](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxOdQ4EkMiKwHEnYq02xofejFPfV_0EDJI1wK1cUhbeUoHvHEKUaObPCXhcd0ScwFYg97BuRn5jyjkN8qoidrbFsdq1N8_IaqiaFv_7d3Uf-2MfEgg5Kwgd2SN1JFSeXjYEAchH8WVRwmQ7-UYEgAvrfM6jjJQH2hpVnYwgexO0ayzz72PypnJzw02Ma7kMjGJGB7QKYfAZxIsPA2BBBCUhYIJ99krKssDUZH8stKOWmBVkS9kWDMJPbPaWtBj8KQG8OSGxGKhVhuf0naM1ewR9A/4m5/xCZQDhmcSSikKNrPsuDkAw/h2/h001._qNLW2gMOJZhuNmOG6v8FPzs1ULkaa8JBfFvr4LE-H4)** You’ll hear from local organizers, community advocates, and national progressive champions, including:
* Rep. Brendan Boyle (PA-02)
* Rep. Madeleine Dean (PA-04)
* Rep. Jim McGovern (MA-02)
* Rep. Pramila Jayapal (WA-07)

These leaders will break down the real impact of harmful Republican policies — **and offer a path forward rooted in justice, equity, and accountability.** This gathering is supported by a broad coalition dedicated to building a fairer Pennsylvania, including: Progressive Caucus Action Fund, PA Working Families Party, Action Together NEPA, SEIU Healthcare Pennsylvania, Pennsylvanians Together in Action, Pennsylvania Policy Center, Make the Road Action PA, Rural Organizing, Main Street Action, Affordable Pennsylvania, United Steelworkers, and For Our Future PA Action Fund. **We’d love to see you there, Peter.** When we show up together — with our neighbors, our stories, and our determination — we build the kind of people-powered movement that can win real change for working families across Pennsylvania. 👉 Save your seat today: [**RSVP here.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxOdQ4EkMiKwHEnYq02xofejFPfV_0EDJI1wK1cUhbeUoHvHEKUaObPCXhcd0ScwFYhOSIj6-p6I7ZeVozLGAjTwU4mcue6Jup3sqE4TQPAhjlgapNNUK3axrkn_6pOSW6FaJ791Eym0lhhg9eIIrR4uRRQtzr6_rOxvvyZB1MBRNclKKeRFdtWg31MGm-RC01Xh40Lhmhev3pC38sFFG_yJx5lvWGSZJsiatbm6DzmkTLBhRznKtJXp9sssP0nIxo7WYQOZTtdmkCpE8yemadEw/4m5/xCZQDhmcSSikKNrPsuDkAw/h3/h001.ASNIxCfhhm7P6o3h2J3UbZ2h8fXDRtWmX2IViLCducU) In solidarity, Pennsylvania Working Families Party P.S. Want a preview of what these town halls are like? [**Watch highlights from the last _Progress for the People_ event.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRlSj1Q4AmytEnAThGyDkQ4h7bB3aGUHj95ybkXszbTBtPF3-QCWtQ5VxcP0CGq5r3f65mxK7jLYcYqjAeoGaxirs1U4Yxe1qUERrbuX3IxqXf8FfF0p_B3hsvImfO3VtKEaVnWDKOBkd47OL9-pSyuvIUBXqwgrH8NF1joGmC09UD-PYMQ2tIYAyLYIvZm4a3ckEADR5gKV_QAGCjiq1IJlHR_2-8wA8kz_3VsHcJoYCFeogf5xc76HZgbYLV3gfeSV74SJBk6Q-SZ9a070DqOFfcKkhtRgWZzLkR7S4K0unbH5o-1L6vF4Uek1_6SD6qTlQ3INzWvpMi3yKUP8KxSIJ9WWM9MlI7jRnjBfdzrLb1CH6Yo_LaCTVWmLdAPFhtKFa0rktM79pwp3utVX8iI/4m5/xCZQDhmcSSikKNrPsuDkAw/h4/h001.YF8UVw8a4MVDYFT2i_fSJyErYG_DstQB6AEup7dcXak) name: Delegate Sam Rasoul
subject: Tree Lightings, Holiday Parades, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P
body:
| |
---
|
---
# Across the Commonwealth
---
|
---
**ELECTION RESULTS CERTIFICATION** On Monday, the Virginia State Board of Elections certified the results of the 2025 General Election. After each election, votes are double-checked by each locality and certified by local electoral boards. Then, the Virginia Department of Elections checks the vote counts again before the results are certified by the State Board of Elections. We look forward to keeping up the good work in Richmond!
---
|
---
[ **Read More** ](https://clicksp.sam4va.com/f/a/dAhFtBuU1XvpfHI3js3Bpw~~/AAPPABA~/i8GXKt4OH-hQPSYA9U17m8-KSMAkX7NZvTMtAbhFZ5Mzbye24w6-j2L5_c5STqBz1Q-CUUg1mP0Rt1Q5CZEE1Mu16nFJiRIJpVr_NVtQ9dOOx0_FoXKC7KRJeOiibI2pmAjyCo1fSpU41R9_2VE4wdyDNXWc9lG-xsib6J7aW-y5LkfmpjPoc4paT-VrjiVHbrqDPskdHyEVSdMO4AqnhglSkypAh7YLsRwWMGPxvtFUlF4ELC8Kq-E880ViV5fVxdE2--nZ1dDcy_37GB8V-Spq9C5GepBDyMl-WZeKYfRnc0PWY-IuHmSaMjOAJVQGWUBNe8OwnXdD8N7auk4syKGoWriIZd9DS0kBTDeLph0~)

---
**NEW CABINET APPOINTMENTS** Governor-elect Spanberger has selected her second cabinet appointment as she prepares to take over the governorship in January. Shenandoah Valley native Katie K. Frazier will be Virginia's next Secretary of Agriculture and Forestry. Marvin Figueroa will be the next Health and Human Resources Secretary.
---
|
---
# In the Community
---
|
---
|
---
**RCDC HOLIDAY PARTY** On Tuesday, we celebrated the hard work of the Roanoke City Democratic Committee at their Holiday Dinner at Evie's. Roanoke's impressive Democratic turnout in the November election is due to the hard work of these folks. It is always a blast getting to share a meal and celebrate the committee!
---
[ **Read More** ](https://clicksp.sam4va.com/f/a/t77jxjO_odBeXLuP61Jgsg~~/AAPPABA~/e8_nW8JcGmbrQFcYK-vaxZjUXx9TNrk7_ekfDAgCVRQwPAxqpBqCGY0FuvXPWCd2mtCxvo3XUrfERuh3xcM2XcKs8Gr3N4CwBuVHEPs8AZ0bO1nwyp4SA21MvORSz2ByFxc9e-0AO6bygbPEa0JXgrrMYHn3wL_FvlCJFo_ikACxhShHQIf3YOr_Zzm_uRiEfUWEQ1sODFNDRAsfOLj0L89FdhMYMQvYpUxayAZ1TqpvxKWCKhkmV1iCMBYsibdagMmbF8HrRYcHWwnB0GOFWPVNJBOyWJX-xvt3dA9FomTtspUlwMvWDNUa-HC127F_H-gKEEBBd29JP_M9_RmCBA~~)
---
|
---
**YOU WRITE THE BILL SESSION TWO** Last week was the second part of our "You Write the Bill" workshop! These community leaders are ready to take their ideas to the Commonwealth and make meaningful changes in Virginia!
---
[ **Read More** ](https://clicksp.sam4va.com/f/a/J_TLAun-1L9BcK8RBlOY7Q~~/AAPPABA~/e8_nW8JcGmbrQFcYK-vaxZjUXx9TNrk7_ekfDAgCVRQiWAoegBMrKFkm5RVQqLwG3Qqe3WCD4zyCfS7Ia0UYU2OLLcL3He0q9pK3wSA0rje3MSORhEydaZpEM4pDY7p9J2t3mbxWgRx69BG3EG_qbrhLtxeUXfl3eJ4fKqm41WHkNorKSlCiYgpPTnfDGgWV4s2ZplOjJGW41PRlv0uvuFqLRhQ_UqK2wrs-Y5MWKp-xdJC2dqIqmp42IYZcLugSPIIo_F8VnRO8dsp7J6DelfZgWXobnMT0Rk2UnxcRzsC-1hxfSOsTASWiJlRcOVvlAUrNyx_0U_kte4lPa6ZEdw~~)
---
|
---
**VINTON CHRISTMAS PARADE - Dec. 4** Join community member for the Annual Vinton Christmas Parade tonight at 7 pm in downtown Vinton! Experience the festive spirit with illuminated floats, marching bands, and a special appearance by Santa Claus. The parade will be followed by entertainment, refreshments, and photos with Santa.
---
[ **Read More** ](https://clicksp.sam4va.com/f/a/rl7076cLczbyoqc764ZsjA~~/AAPPABA~/Or87l5VQTZGSlY6sGrf2GqXRAbhRLaNobsNsV38sYFEiFOfwQazbaEXnKtFlNb9Vou7Xom-5REOEZ0Bc6aoEk0UEgtgOf2XvPE73megil1QbiZJpdxTNnY58Nl433Plv-2Egc3p255SugNG04wSFijgjbERHarLWykf9gP4vYjRPcItqWcQ2VFjhtam-Gwbj27f3_oAOAWoHJqKDDKHLw7s5nKN6V_uA7F2PBCBoSq2iOxxMFM1SBeKLpf0BoZVBfdDuYziGHOgugWqn57GVLg1v-ohqatigpa9f7iYi4NU~)
---
|
---
**ROANOKE CITY CHRISTMAS TREE LIGHTING****\- Dec. 5** The Roanoke Valley's largest holiday celebration, Delta Dental Dickens of a Christmas, returns tomorrow!

Tomorrow from 6 pm - 10 pm is the City of Roanoke Christmas tree lighting! The lighting takes place on Salem Avenue in the Plaza behind the Market Building. The ceremony begins at 5:30 pm with the tree lighting at 6:20 pm and will include live stage performances.
---
[ **Read More** ](https://clicksp.sam4va.com/f/a/EKEdQEpNXPRTFL_xodVpQg~~/AAPPABA~/mBNwERsqHZO-atUcXXf3BxaZyJIBNPB7qIKk-9ya9aJlsvCak4yLAj8OwU9x3s00VcemBsnoWhLrICoqti6g4ylfo3_xwnfQBLwbhGijAfS3m47xuSfjFINyUoEDKs10N_gxdVoRH4_vNRMsN8tvg-RpaQTAm_sbyvBFrOGCjXTbCYAvCSribk-Lh7-QxXYbXL5_TzDPz445dGX3C5FrPxJ1wgNH3R-HvNdJcmWRepjfPBY4QJFfTbptYvXNNQYYQdfnMvaN4W-WxlhFAOLzyZ9xjvfANMsQ2p46Ujf7ayYfXKPhrzPcqYPnjckDX4pgt0HN2B8TTrG2ipp0Wt9kyw~~)
---
|
---
**2025 GINGERBREAD FESTIVAL - Dec. 6** The Gingerbread Festival returns this Saturday from 10 am - 2 pm at Longwood Park and the Salem Museum. This enchanting event follows the Salem City Christmas parade. The true spirit of the season comes to life with enchanting attractions like festival vendors, the Gingerbread House Competition, the Marshmallow Roast, face painting, and so much more.

**THE TEACHER'S TABLE WITH DEL. RASOUL** Pull up a chair - you're invited to The Teachers' Table! Roanoke City educators are invited to join Delegate Sam Rasoul for a free dinner and evening of conversation, connection, and collective advocacy. This is your chance to share what's really happening in classrooms, exchange ideas with other teachers, and help shape the future of education policy in Virginia. clean_body: | | | Across the Commonwealth | ELECTION RESULTS CERTIFICATION On Monday, the Virginia State Board of Elections certified the results of the 2025 General Election. After each election, votes are double-checked by each locality and certified by local electoral boards. Then, the Virginia Department of Elections checks the vote counts again before the results are certified by the State Board of Elections. We look forward to keeping up the good work in Richmond! | ~ | ~ NEW CABINET APPOINTMENTS Governor-elect Spanberger has selected her second cabinet appointment as she prepares to take over the governorship in January. Shenandoah Valley native Katie K. Frazier will be Virginia's next Secretary of Agriculture and Forestry. Marvin Figueroa will be the next Health and Human Resources Secretary. | In the Community | | RCDC HOLIDAY PARTY On Tuesday, we celebrated the hard work of the Roanoke City Democratic Committee at their Holiday Dinner at Evie's. For generations, organized labor has fought to build economic opportunity for working families, both nationwide and in Colorado. They have fought for workplace safety, bargaining rights, and better pay.
They know what it takes to deliver for Colorado, _because they do it every day._
**These three unions represent more than 20,000 hardworking folks across Colorado. They trust that Michael has what it takes to tackle the affordability crisis and make life easier for them and their families.**
That's why he's more determined than ever to deliver: by lowering prices, providing every Coloradan with opportunities to earn a living wage, and building a brighter future for everyone in our state.

**But folks, he can't make any of it happen without you, too.**
**_[If you agree that Michael can provide the leadership our working families need, will you please take 30 seconds now to endorse him alongside Colorado's labor unions? Friend,
President Donald Trump lied to the American people when he promised to bring prices down “on Day One.”
His reckless tariffs have done the opposite, raising grocery costs, and making it difficult for hardworking families to even put food on the table this holiday season.
That’s why Jacky introduced the _No Tariffs on Groceries Act_ in the Senate, to stop Donald Trump from putting tariffs on the everyday essentials Americans rely on without congressional approval.

Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP. = You can also =** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help._

name: Mike Senatore
subject: Act Today: Speak out against harmful changes to Endangered Species Act’s implementation!
body:
Sign a public comment right now opposing new proposed changes to regulations that will undermine the ESA

Sign a public comment right now opposing new proposed changes to regulations that will undermine the ESA
                  

(https://support.defenders.org/s/4308657/38SyG9Xl)

(https://support.defenders.org/s/4308658/38SyG9Xl)

Add your signature: DEFEND THE ESA!

Defender,

This is not a drill: The Trump administration is proposing massive changes that will gut implementation of the Endangered Species Act.

This is your chance to speak out: Click here to sign a public comment saying you oppose reckless rollbacks of the ESA’s regulations! (https://support.defenders.org/s/4308659/38SyG9Xl)

The ESA is our most effective tool for saving wildlife from extinction. So far, approximately 99% of listed species are still with us today.

But this tool is only as effective as the regulations that implement it – and it’s those regulations that the Trump administration is targeting.

The proposed rollbacks would make it easier for federal agencies to greenlight destructive projects like mining, drilling, and logging without fully assessing their impact on threatened or endangered animals or their habitats.

The government would effectively be ignoring whether vulnerable animals could be pushed closer to extinction by rushed new projects.

The public comment period is now open. We’re calling on all defenders to raise our voices in support of the ESA and against destructive giveaways that threaten our natural world!

ACT NOW TO DEFEND THE ESA! (https://support.defenders.org/s/4308660/38SyG9Xl)

The ESA is one of the greatest achievements in modern conservation. We can’t afford to lose its protections while our country is facing a biodiversity crisis.

Urge the federal government not to go through with these proposed changes by submitting your signature today! (https://support.defenders.org/s/4308661/38SyG9Xl)

Sincerely,

Mike Senatore

SVP, Conservation Programs

Defenders of Wildlife

(http://www.facebook.com/DefendersofWildlife) (http://twitter.com/defenders) (https://www.instagram.com/defendersofwildlife/?hl=en) (http://www.youtube.com/defendersofwildlife) (https://www.tiktok.com/@defendersofwildlife)

Defenders of Wildlife 1130 17th Street NW • Washington, DC 20036 defenders.org (https://defenders.org)

 

 
Photo Credit: Grizzly Bear © Sandy Sisti

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Please do not respond to this email. Click here to update your preferences (unsubscribe_action~3099~50315~https://support.defenders.org/page/18130/subscriptions/1}) or unsubscribe. (https://act.defenders.org/page/unsubscribe?q=3099&p=205479&b=471597&hash=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

name: PoliticsPA
subject: Our latest podcast: PA budget leaders discuss transit, education, adult-use cannabis
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | **Big Names Make News**
---
| Is what comes in equal to what comes out of each of Pennsylvania's counties? Should it be? “We have to be real. There are counties in Pennsylvania that don’t have 10,000 folks in them,” said **Rep. Jordan Harris**. “I have no problem with my taxpayer dollars going to fund the roads and bridges and other projects in those counties. That’s what a Commonwealth is about. It is the common good for all.” ** [[Watch](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=37a8b355ca&e=b7b3eddce2)]**

With a multitude of questions still surrounding the issue, Pennsylvania's leaders have concerns about legalized marijuana. “You see governments that want to jump in right away, fully into the pool, and then deal with the consequences after,” said **Senator Scott Martin**. “How will we sort this out? Does the federal government change the classification from being a Schedule I narcotic to one that’s Schedule II that could be researched.”** [[Watch](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d0b215d19e&e=b7b3eddce2)]**
---
|
* * *
---
| **PA's budget leaders talk transit, education, legalizing adult-use cannabis, and more.**

| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=482188c14d&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=257cc0ce0e&e=b7b3eddce2). Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=995f64d673&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter -
I’m officially kicking off my reelection campaign – to keep up the fight for Virginia’s families, to stand up to the policies in Washington that are skyrocketing the cost of living, and to continue to bring people together to get it done.
And my friend, Ruben Gallego, said I should reach out to you directly – because I’ll need you to join me in this important work. I need your bold ideas, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to making life better for your kids and grandkids with me on the campaign trail.
[**And yes, I need your support in the form of a $5, $15, or $25 contribution. Your donation today – split between Ruben and my campaign – is an investment in the future we’re building together. My team set a goal of earning 5,000 donations this week to kick off our campaign with the grassroots strength we need to win. Every donation, no matter the size, helps us build momentum, reach voters, and get the job done.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-warner-split.EUXFXW&refcode=em251204-1-f&t=1&akid=4042%2E734936%2E-E_USk)
[DONATE>>](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-warner-split.EUXFXW&refcode=em251204-1-f&t=2&akid=4042%2E734936%2E-E_USk)
Look, I’ve always been focused on what’s next, on what’s on the horizon. I started a cell phone company back when everyone was still using landlines.
When I was first elected governor, it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did.
And, in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next:
_• Expanding broadband and economic opportunity to rural America.
• Preparing our intelligence communities for 21st-century threats in our increasingly interconnected world.
• And standing up to Trump’s policies that raise prices and gut health care while he hands massive tax breaks to billionaires. _

**But our work is far from over.**
Since the AI revolution, we’ve seen the job market in a free fall – while prices continue to rise. And Donald Trump and his crowd in Washington? They don’t have a clue what to do about it. They don’t even seem to care.
Instead of being paralyzed by fear – or worse – making futile attempts to turn back the clock, we need to ensure that innovation gives everyone a fair shot.
**This moment calls for big ideas.** A systematic economic re-tooling to prepare for the impacts of artificial intelligence, a complete overhaul of affordable housing and childcare, and universal health care coverage.
**We need a vision to chart a new path and effective leadership to get it done. That’s why I’m running for reelection to the United States Senate.**
[**And I’m asking you to join me. Will you step up today to become one of the 5,000 donors my campaign is counting on before Friday? Split a donation between my campaign and Ruben to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor >>**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-warner-split.EUXFXW&refcode=em251204-1-f&t=3&akid=4042%2E734936%2E-E_USk)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-warner-split.EUXFXW&refcode=em251204-1-f&t=4&akid=4042%2E734936%2E-E_USk)
Our work starts now.
More soon,
Mark Warner

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=5&akid=4042%2E734936%2E-E_USk). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=4042%2E734936%2E-E_USk). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=4042_734936_-E_USk&akid=4042%2E734936%2E-E_USk)

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Coach Walz has an important update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Hi Peter, Kamala here.
Coach Walz has an important update that you need to know about.
Trump loyalist and election denier Mike Lindell just jumped into the race against him for Governor of Minnesota.
Tim has proven his record for Minnesota families like his own, but Republicans are going to pummel him with attacks.
There is a lot more work to be done to ensure Tim has the resources to fight back, and I need your help to make it happen.
So I am asking Democrats everywhere to support Tim’s reelection campaign today.
This will not be an easy race. Tim is going up against the full weight of the MAGA machine, so we must show that we're behind him.
Tim is ready to stand up for Minnesota, but he cannot do it alone. That is why I am asking:
[**Can you please split a contribution between Tim Walz’s reelection campaign and my work elevating the next generation of leadership in America? The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. All that matters is that lots of people are donating to help Tim’s campaign fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-tw?refcode=em251204-b&refcode2=813_2563979_dOJNtt&akid=813%2E2563979%2EdOJNtt)
If everyone reading this chipped in even just a few dollars, Tim would have the resources he needs to get it done. Not everyone does, so I am counting on those who understand how important this moment is for Tim's campaign to help out today.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-tw?refcode=em251204-b&refcode2=813_2563979_dOJNtt&akid=813%2E2563979%2EdOJNtt)**
Thank you in advance for being there for Tim. It means a lot.
Kamala
Prepared and Paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

Paid for by Fight for the People PAC ([fightforthepeoplepac.com](http://fightforthepeoplepac.com/)) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=813%2E2563979%2EdOJNtt)**
clean_body: Hi Peter, Kamala here. Coach Walz has an important update that you need to know about. Trump loyalist and election denier Mike Lindell just jumped into the race against him for Governor of Minnesota. Tim has proven his record for Minnesota families like his own, but Republicans are going to pummel him with attacks. There is a lot more work to be done to ensure Tim has the resources to fight back, and I need your help to make it happen. So I am asking Democrats everywhere to support Tim’s reelection campaign today. This will not be an easy race. Tim is going up against the full weight of the MAGA machine, so we must show that we're behind him. Tim is ready to stand up for Minnesota, but he cannot do it alone. That is why I am asking: If everyone reading this chipped in even just a few dollars, Tim would have the resources he needs to get it done. Not everyone does, so I am counting on those who understand how important this moment is for Tim's campaign to help out today. Thank you in advance for being there for Tim. It means a lot. Kamala Prepared and Paid for by Tim Walz for Governor Paid for by Fight for the People PAC () and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’m endorsing Abdul for U.S. Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
He understands how our healthcare system fails people at every level, because he’s worked inside it and fought to change it.
[](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251204-1-ak.V74pWU&amount=5&refcode=em20251204-1397&t=2&akid=1398%2E251025%2EUqrCgD)
Peter,
I have exciting news to share: **I’m endorsing Abdul for U.S. Senate!**
As the founding co-chair of the Medicare for All Caucus, I’ve spent years working to guarantee healthcare for every single person in this country. And in this moment, where working people are looking for leaders who are unafraid to call out corporate greed and fight to fix our broken healthcare system, I’m proud to support Abdul’s campaign.
**Abdul is one of the clearest, strongest champions for Medicare for All in the entire country.**
* He wrote the book on Medicare for All.
* He rebuilt Detroit’s health department from scratch.
* He erased $700 million in medical debt for Michiganders.
* He understands how our healthcare system fails people at every level, because he’s worked inside it and fought to change it.

Just like me, Abdul has never taken money from AIPAC or corporate PACs, and never will.
That matters because if we’re going to pass Medicare for All, we need leaders in the Senate who won’t be influenced by the insurance lobby, Big Pharma, or any entrenched interest that profits off our pain.
**But those same interests will spend whatever it takes to stop Abdul’s momentum.** We all need to do our part to help Abdul meet as many voters as possible, fend off any incoming attacks, and win.
[**That’s why I’m hoping you’ll join me in supporting Abdul’s campaign by splitting a contribution of $5 or more. Together, we’ll send Abdul to the U.S. Senate and finally pass Medicare for All.**](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251204-1-ak.V74pWU&amount=5&refcode=em20251204-1397&t=3&akid=1398%2E251025%2EUqrCgD)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251204-1-ak.V74pWU&amount=5&refcode=em20251204-1397&t=22&akid=1398%2E251025%2EUqrCgD)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you, so thank you for reading this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Email us: [info@abdulformichigan.com](info@abdulformichigan.com)
Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate.

President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club.

You’re not asleep!
But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one.

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17655894/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtNDd0aC1wcmVzaWRlbnQtZm91bmRlcnMtY2x1Yi1zYi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDQ/LbmNsd0VCSU5xUA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwMDBfd3Ix/gaTHECw/sbu37181d7f)

I personally created the **47th President Founders Club** for one reason only:
To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice.
I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself.

body:
Only 300 spots are open. Will you be one?
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
| | Peter, I need to be blunt with you.
We just launched **The Brett 300** — the _first 300 patriots_ nationwide who will step up to help me fight back in one of the **biggest congressional races in America**.
If we win here, Republicans **hold the Majority** and strengthen our firewall. If we lose, Democrats gain a critical seat and move one giant step closer to flipping control of Congress.
And believe me — **the Democrats have already made us a target.** National party operatives, left-wing billionaires, and coastal elites are pouring money into this race because they see it as their ticket to taking back power.
---
[JOIN THE BRETT 300](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
| | The stakes couldn’t be higher:
* We’re on the **frontline** of the fight to stop the Left’s radical agenda.
* Every dollar we raise now sends a message that **we will not be outworked or outspent**.
* Early momentum will determine if we can compete with the flood of Democrat money that’s coming.

That’s why The Brett 300 matters so much. These are the people who step up first, set the tone for the entire campaign, and show the country that this race will not be easy for the Democrats to steal.
Here’s the truth: only **300 spots exist** , and **many are already gone**. Once we hit our goal, the list closes forever.
**_[If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to step up, this is it.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)_**
We need to hit 300 _fast_ so we can flip the narrative before the Democrats get their foothold.
Will your name be on the list when we go public, Peter?
---
[Claim Your Spot in The Brett 300](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Let’s win this,

Brett Lindstrom Republican Candidate for Congress

Peter,
I’m going to level with you - we missed our November fundraising goal.
That puts real pressure on us as we head into the final weeks of the year.
Our very first end of quarter fundraising deadline of this entire campaign is coming up at the end of this month. This is the moment when everyone will judge our strength. Reporters, donors, opponents. If we come up short again, they will say this movement doesn’t have what it takes.
I refuse to let that happen.
If you’re with me in building a new beginning and a brighter day for South Carolina, I need you to chip in right now. Every grassroots donation today helps to close our fundraising gap and sends a message that South Carolina is ready to move beyond single-party rule. I have spent my life proving people wrong. They said a kid like me could never make something of himself. They said I couldn’t beat a 22-year incumbent. They said someone with my background could never lead in this state.
They were wrong every single time - because people like you stood with me.
Let’s show them we’re building something powerful here. Help me close this fundraising gap by chipping in any amount you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jermaine-dec25?refcode=120425_1]
Thank you for having my back,
Jermaine

John Hickenlooper here. I can’t sugarcoat it: Democrats may have momentum on our side – but we’re up against _steep odds_ to take back our Senate majority next year. 🧗 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120612738/586816428/-431372808?amounts=5%2C10%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=15&refcode=email_120425_climb&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmE3OTY5Mi0zN2QxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0c0fx8EGRXP9CC3DfbOU34sVBiMn2XJTTyo1k-M1lao=) The Senate map is tilted against us and we have no real path to Democratic Senate control without defending seats like Colorado’s. And the stakes are _sky-high._ I can hardly imagine the damage Donald Trump will do with a full four years in power with a Republican Senate to rubber stamp his extreme agenda. We should be focused on making progress on the real issues that families care about – like expanding access to health care, keeping jobs here in America, and tackling the sky-high cost of living. Instead, Republicans are dismantling our democracy, bailing out foreign governments, and giving the ultra-wealthy tax breaks at the expense of working families. With Senate control on the line, we can’t afford to lose our footing. See, Donald Trump has a $600 million war chest at his disposal and we need to run a rock-solid strategy if we’re going to defend this seat. [_**So please don’t leave me hanging. Can I count on you to make a donation to our campaign today? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120612802/586816610/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGE4YjA2MDItMzhkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cY1wpfKXUEZRbdJimHJQ_hjm8FoQ6gJWLyMkrdwMSf4=) | **I’ve spent nearly my entire career in the democracy business.** I’ve seen tough moments. I’ve seen political pressure. I’ve seen misunderstandings about how elections work. But I have never seen anything like what DOJ lawyers described in that New York Times article. Never. When career attorneys, whose job is to enforce civil rights and protect voters, say they were ordered to mislead states, dismiss real cases, pursue false ones, and funnel voter data into unaccountable hands, we have reached a crisis point. And now that same DOJ is suing Minnesota for refusing to hand over millions of voters’ private information. **Let me be clear: I will follow the law, and I will defend the privacy of Minnesota voters. Period.** **[But I cannot do this work alone. And I cannot go into 2026 under-resourced while facing an opponent who will cheer on federal interference. clean_body: = | I’ve spent nearly my entire career in the democracy business. I’ve seen tough moments. I’ve seen political pressure. I’ve seen misunderstandings about how elections work. But I have never seen anything like what DOJ lawyers described in that New York Times article. Never. When career attorneys, whose job is to enforce civil rights and protect voters, say they were ordered to mislead states, dismiss real cases, pursue false ones, and funnel voter data into unaccountable hands, we have reached a crisis point. And now that same DOJ is suing Minnesota for refusing to hand over millions of voters’ private information. Let me be clear: I will follow the law, and I will defend the privacy of Minnesota voters. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120612904/586816868/936185492?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_120425_HEALTHATTACK_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmY5MWM3ODctMzhkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HFjI_SyC6mva4CaZuJPrNa4iLLNmeFKphlR-8A-670Y=) **Quality and affordable healthcare requires investing in infrastructure and the next generation of healthcare workers.** As a former emergency physician, I know firsthand that healthcare workers deserve every bit of support our leaders can give them. [That’s why I’m committed to defending Americans’ healthcare on every front. If you’re with me in that fight, please chip in $10 now to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120612906/586816870/936185492?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_120425_HEALTHATTACK_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmY5MWM3ODctMzhkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HFjI_SyC6mva4CaZuJPrNa4iLLNmeFKphlR-8A-670Y=) The Trump administration’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” gutted Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for the one percent — _leaving millions of Americans without healthcare._ The result? People are forced to go without the care they desperately need, and hospitals throughout America, like the Palo Verde Healthcare District in Blythe, are being pushed into bankruptcy. No one should have to drive _over 100 miles_ to receive life-saving care, but this is now the reality for thousands of Blythe residents. And it doesn’t stop there. **The same Republican budget bill that gutted Medicaid will make it harder for students to get financing for healthcare careers like advanced nursing degrees.** This is bad news for rural communities that already face a shortage of healthcare workers and depend on nurse practitioners for primary care. **Republicans aren't just closing hospitals — they're also shrinking the next generation of healthcare workers.** These attacks on healthcare won’t end until we finally flip the House blue and take back our Democratic majority. In this razor-slim majority, every seat counts, and my district (CA-25) is one of the most competitive districts in the nation. That’s why the Republican strategists are coming after us with everything they’ve got. [I need your help to fight back. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Update: Exposing Sanctuary Lawlessness
body:
As a loyal Judicial Watch follower, I know how strongly you feel about stopping illegal immigration and preventing reckless officials from sheltering criminal aliens and undermining the rule of law.

| [ | |
---
|
--- ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78109&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2) |
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As a loyal Judicial Watch follower, _I know how strongly you feel about stopping illegal immigration_ and preventing reckless officials from sheltering criminal aliens and undermining the rule of law.
That's why I'm proud to share this _special update_.
In recent weeks, our team has filed **two new lawsuits** to _expose_ sanctuary jurisdictions actively thwarting federal law enforcement's efforts to remove illegal aliens.
**I want to be upfront with you that we want to do more to stop this lawlessness, and _[I would very much value your financial support in our efforts](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78109&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_**.
Please keep that in mind as you read and decide whether you want to join our fight:

1. **Arizona**
On November 4th, we filed an Arizona Public Records Law lawsuit against Gov. Katie Hobbs. Our demand is to see the records regarding _her office reportedly ordering state police and the Arizona National Guard to withhold cooperation from federal immigration enforcement authorities_.
Arizona law is clear: "No official or agency of this state or a county, city, town or other political subdivision of this state may limit or restrict the enforcement of federal immigration laws to less than the full extent permitted by federal law."
Yet in November 2024, Hobbs responded to a question on whether Arizona's state police and National Guard would assist with federal immigration enforcement efforts by stating: "I will not tolerate efforts that are part of misguided policies that harm our communities... Arizona will not take part in those.... We will not be participating in misguided efforts that harm our communities."
When we asked for communications and legal analyses behind this radical stance, her office came back with "no responsive records." This is why we are suing now.

2. **Evanston, IL**
On November 6th, we filed an Illinois Freedom of Information Act lawsuit against Mayor Daniel Biss for records related to obstruction of federal immigration enforcement.
The mayor's office previously had not complied with a records request on Biss's activities around ICE's "Operation Midway Blitz", including his potential participation in a protest at the ICE facility in Broadview, IL (federal officials describe rioters obstructing law enforcement, throwing tear gas cans, rocks, bottles, and fireworks, slashing tires, and blocking entrance to the building).
Biss is also reported to have ordered license plate cameras turned off when he learned the data was being shared with federal immigration authorities.
According to this mayor, Evanston has been _ "passing strong sanctuary laws to make sure police are not cooperating with federal civil immigration enforcement."_

| [ YOUR CONTRIBUTIONS HELP JUDICIAL WATCH EXPOSE SANCTUARY LAWLESSNES ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78109&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

There is no question that the actions above are illegal. Federal supremacy in immigration matters is established by the U.S. Constitution's Supremacy Clause.

_But the criminal illegal aliens who flock to cities like Evanston (adjacent to Chicago) and states like Arizona will keep doing so because they know leftist politicians will protect them_.

**The first step towards stopping this blatant disregard for the law is to do the job the mainstream media refuses to: expose this abuse to the public.**

That's where _Judicial Watch_ comes in as _America 's largest public records litigator_ and why _[additional financial support is so important](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78109&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_ to protecting the rule of law.

To investigate, demand records, and file the hard-hitting lawsuits necessary to expose attacks on federal immigration enforcement, Judicial Watch is making efforts to budget additional resources as soon as possible.

_[Please make a tax-deductible gift today to help us expand our docket of vital immigration and sanctuary city lawsuits](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78109&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_.

[ FUEL JUDICIAL WATCH’S FIGHT AGAINST ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78109&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Thank you for considering a gift to Judicial Watch. It is only the steadfast backing of our supporters that allows us to challenge sanctuary city lawlessness like I've shared with you today.

_[Please consider making a first-time gift to Judicial Watch today to fund these cases and others like them](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78109&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_. It will be 100% tax-deductible.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President, Judicial Watch

P.S. Leftist politicians who create "sanctuary cities" obstruct federal immigration law and put law enforcement officials and innocent citizens at risk. With your support, Judicial Watch will hold them accountable. _[Please make a tax-deductible gift today so we can investigate, expose, and challenge these dangerous policies in court](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78109&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: I’m running for re-election.

body:
|
#
---
Peter, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election as Governor of Oregon. [_**Will you donate $10 to send a strong message as we kick off our campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120613998/586820574/-1622755792?amount=10&refcode=AU_TK_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA5YTgxMC0zYmQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-DaGpXZvZUJOcG3iza_SXTdOO8mpDBxQlNt2LaWR2w=) | [BECOME A KICKOFF DONOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120614000/586820580/-1622755792?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_TK_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA5YTgxMC0zYmQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-DaGpXZvZUJOcG3iza_SXTdOO8mpDBxQlNt2LaWR2w=)
---
While the past few months have been unlike anything we’ve seen before — in our state and in our country — the way we came together made me so proud to be an Oregonian.
When President Trump tried to use our own military against us, we showed the power of peaceful resistance.
When President Trump created a food emergency by withholding SNAP funds, Oregon stepped up to help feed our neighbors.
I’ve never been prouder to work for you — but the fight isn’t over. I’m running for Governor again because Oregon values are on the line.
The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let President Trump do whatever he wants.
And with everything going on, we still have to keep building on the progress we’ve made, to make sure people can afford to call Oregon home.
We expanded the number of shelter beds, began building more homes people can afford, funded summer learning, and found ways to ease the rising cost of living.
**It’s a start, but we need to do more. Especially with everything coming at us from Washington, D.C.**
As Governor, I’ve visited all thirty-six counties across Oregon, and I’ve seen firsthand the strength and resilience that makes our state such a special place.
That’s why I’m so optimistic about our future.
**It’s why I’m excited to officially announce my re-election campaign for Governor of our great state. **
[_**If you’re ready to help us make more progress, will you make a contribution today to become a kickoff donor of my campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120614003/586820587/-1622755792?refcode=AU_TK_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA5YTgxMC0zYmQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-DaGpXZvZUJOcG3iza_SXTdOO8mpDBxQlNt2LaWR2w=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120614005/586820590/-1622755792?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_TK_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA5YTgxMC0zYmQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-DaGpXZvZUJOcG3iza_SXTdOO8mpDBxQlNt2LaWR2w=)

# “Know Your Rights to Vote” Informational Session
---
| |

The right to vote is a fundamental pillar of our democracy. Across the country, communities are coming together to protect this right and ensure every voter’s voice is heard. But we cannot do this work alone.
We invite you to join the **Democratic National Committee** and **Latino Victory Fund** for the informational session **“Know Your Rights to Vote”** on [**Thursday, December 4, at 6 p.m. ET**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1b9e9b6c87&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**.**
During this session, you’ll learn about your rights at the polls, the legal protections available, and the actions we’re taking to ensure free, fair, and accessible elections. We have critical runoff elections this December, from Nashville to Miami.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2d0b6a12a4&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| |
# Sesión Informativa “Conozca Sus Derechos al Votar”
---
| |
El derecho al voto es un pilar fundamental de nuestra democracia. En todo el país, comunidades enteras se están organizando para defender este derecho y proteger la voz de cada votante. Pero este trabajo no lo podemos hacer solos.
Por eso, le invitamos a unirse al **Comité Nacional Demócrata** y a **Latino Victory Fund** para una sesión informativa bilingüe sobre **“Conozca Sus Derechos al Votar”** el [**jueves 4 de diciembre a las 6 PM ET**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8c9591865d&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
Durante esta sesión aprenderá sobre sus derechos en las cajas de votación, las protecciones legales disponibles y las acciones que estamos tomando para garantizar elecciones libres, justas y accesibles. Tenemos elecciones de segunda vuelta decisivas este diciembre, desde Nashville hasta Miami.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/4/2025
body:
“The DOJ can take a hike”: Jena Griswold rejects federal demand for voter data
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.joinrmv.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.joinrmv.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Jena Griswold rejected a sweeping DOJ demand for Colorado’s full voter roll, [telling the feds to "take a hike."](https://link.email.joinrmv.) Regulators approved a Clean Heat plan requiring a 41% cut to natural-gas emissions and pushing the state toward [all-electric heating by 2050](https://link.email.joinrmv.). CU Anschutz will pay over $10 million to settle claims from plaintiffs denied religious exemptions to its [COVID vaccine mandate](https://link.email.joinrmv.). A new poll shows nearly [60% of voters think Colorado schools are off track](https://link.email.joinrmv.) despite record spending. And a federal judge ordered records unsealed in the DOJ’s subpoena fight with Children’s Hospital Colorado over [gender-related treatments](https://link.email.joinrmv.).
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** A commentary argues the CIA’s “color revolution” against the U.S. is nearing its end as Trump and CIA Director John Ratcliffe move to [dismantle alleged Deep State and cartel networks](https://link.email.joinrmv.), pointing to U.S. military movements near Venezuela. Meanwhile, the Trump administration warned it will [withhold SNAP aid from Democrat-run states](https://link.email.joinrmv.) unless they provide recipient data to investigate fraud; 22 states and D.C. have sued, but USDA says they must comply by December 8 or risk losing benefits.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, December 4, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[“The DOJ can take a hike”: Jena Griswold rejects federal demand for voter data](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold escalated her standoff with the Trump administration this week, rejecting a request for the state’s full, unredacted voter file. “We will not comply with the Trump Department of Justice’s request for Coloradans’ sensitive voting information. The DOJ can take a hike; it does not have a legal right to the information. Colorado will not help Donald Trump undermine our elections and hurt the American people.”
On December 1, the DOJ’s Civil Rights Division asked the state to enter an agreement to share complete voter data, including names, dates of birth, residential addresses and full driver’s license numbers or the last four digits of Social Security numbers. Griswold said she provided only the publicly available data required by law. Federal pressure grows as states uncover voter roll failures.
Colorado’s refusal comes as the DOJ expands lawsuits into at least 14 states for denying similar requests. Those suits outline why the DOJ says it needs full data.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**[State Regulators Move Colorado Toward All-Electric Heating by 2050 at Any Cost](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **Colorado pushes aggressive all-electric mandate:** Regulators approved a Clean Heat plan forcing Xcel and other utilities to cut natural-gas emissions 41% in a decade and fully decarbonize home heating by 2050—one of the most extreme timelines in the country.
* **Statewide conversion to electric heat required:** The mandate will require hundreds of thousands of homeowners and landlords to replace working gas furnaces and stoves with electric heat pumps and appliances powered by solar and wind.
* **Environmental activists cheer while consumers brace for costs:** Advocacy groups celebrate the plan as a political win, but even they acknowledge concerns about stacking rate hikes and the financial burden electrification could place on working families.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|
---
**[Plaintiffs Win $10 Million Settlement in CU Anschutz Case Over COVID Vaccine Mandate](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **CU Anschutz forced to pay over $10 million:** The university agreed to a major settlement after students and staff sued for being denied religious exemptions to its COVID-19 vaccine mandate, marking one of the only cases nationwide where plaintiffs won monetary damages.
* **Plaintiffs hailed as heroes for defending religious freedom:** The Thomas More Society says the 18 plaintiffs stood up against an injustice that “trampled” their constitutional rights, strengthening protections for people of faith across the country.
* **Mandate exposed overreach by university officials:** While CU Anschutz still defends its policy, the settlement underscores how aggressive COVID-era mandates violated individual liberties and forced institutions to backtrack under legal pressure.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Clerks vs. the Constitution: Why the CCCA’s Letter to Polis Gets It Wrong**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY A.L. GOODWIN | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 2** _The Colorado County Clerks Association (CCCA) sent a letter urging Governor Polis to block the potential transfer of Tina Peters to federal custody. That request rests on unconstitutional assumptions and a series of demonstrably false claims—many of which CCCA Director Matt Crane repeated in his November 24, 2025 interview on 710 KNUS, spread across two morning segments — Let My Tina Go! and Should Tina Peters Be Pardoned?_
__
[**Inside the story Colorado rarely hears: Trauma, transition and the path back to truth**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 2** _“It took me almost two decades to realize the error,” Antoinette De La Cruz told a Fort Collins audience on November 20. “Transitioning didn’t fix anything. It delayed the inevitable. Healing.” It was the first time many Coloradans had heard a detransitioner describe her path into transition, what it cost her and what brought her back._ __
[**Colorado theft crisis: More crime, fewer inmates, and mounting economic fallout**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[****](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**BY SHAINA COLE | STATE | DECEMBER 2** _Ask almost any retailer in Colorado what’s changed over the last few years, and you’ll hear some version of the same thing: theft isn’t a once-in-a-while headache anymore. It’s constant. The Common Sense Institute recently put numbers to what stores have been describing, and the scale is hard to miss._

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
👶🏼**DID YOU KNOW?** John F. Kennedy was the first president **born in the 20th century**.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "The world is not going to be saved by legislation." – William Howard Taft

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: It’s starts local
body:
Peter, I’ve had some time to reflect over the past several weeks on the future of our state in light of the electoral setbacks we experienced on November 4th.
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, I’ve had some time to reflect over the past several weeks on the future of our state in light of the electoral setbacks we experienced on November 4th. Over and over again, Common Sense New Jerseyans like myself have watched with dismay as the Left sweeps the big elections – bolstered by big dollars, a tired but potent narrative of inevitability, and who knows what else – and pushes the state ever closer to the cliff's edge. I’ve watched the tiny flame of hope for a better direction be snuffed out again and again. And yet, I’m still here. And so are many of you. No judgment to those of you who have decided that enough is enough, packed your bags, and moved to freer and saner pastures (Florida or Tennessee, anyone?). Trust me, I’ve been tempted. But for those of us who have chosen to stick it out here (or maybe don’t have a choice),******_is there a path forward?_** Is there hope for the state we love? And if there is a path, well...what is it? This is the question I’ve been asking myself. And slowly, an answer has been emerging. We are STILL the Common Sense __ Majority despite statewide election results. But how can you peel back the veneer of decades of party corruption, the outside dollars, and the political narratives that grow more stubborn year after year? How can you really put Common Sense values to the test and give them a chance to win? Local. _The path starts in our communities. School boards. Town councils. Mayor’s offices._ My friend Shawn Hyland at the New Jersey Family Policy Center recently alerted New Jerseyans to a big win in Colts Neck. There – despite a concerted effort from Leftist Lunatics – the Colts Neck Board of Education voted to enact a Parent’s Bill of Rights, formally recognizing rights already protected federally, but often ignored by local school districts under woke influence. It reads:
* **Parents have a right to access student records** and can inquire and receive truthful and to the extent known information about their child’s gender identity.
* **Parents have a right to consent to or decline any mental or physical health services** offered through the school, including counseling groups and mentoring programs.
* **Parents have a right to opt their children out of health and sex education.**
* **Parents have the right to opt their children out of lessons that contradict their values** or religious beliefs.
* **Parents have a right to safe, secure schools** and for information about those safeguards.
* **Parents have a right to protect their children's personal information** — like gender identity, religious affiliation and sexual orientation — from research surveys and third-party software.

That’s a huge win – and a testament to what can happen when we focus the fight for Common Sense wins locally. These aren’t the sexy victories that make national headlines. But they are real. And they impact the members of a community in a way that is often more profound and tangible than statewide or national policy. I’m heartened by this win. And I’m taking the cue. We’re going to continue to hold our statewide electeds accountable. We’re going to call out the BS wherever we find it. But let’s begin to re-engage locally and see how Common Sense voices can actually make some headway out of the glare of the spotlight and the rush of dollars. I’m hopeful. I'd love to hear your thoughts. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club
---
|
---

If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
11 Convent Road #25
Convent Station, NJ 07961 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
