But let’s begin to re-engage locally and see how Common Sense voices can actually make some headway out of the glare of the spotlight and the rush of dollars. I’m hopeful. I'd love to hear your thoughts. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader | [ ]() President Common Sense Club | Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line) Mailing Address: Common Sense Club 11 Convent Road #25 Convent Station, NJ 07961 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen. Common Sense Club 11 Convent Road #25 Convent Station, New Jersey 07961 United States

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This is my story.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ae40598aeb444da3a5988703213fc550&_e=GfQRBPrfJkl8Ihq-EVmQAkIKWehITraqwqA96kRsrGudc4GGlKf7ZZfLa-T4m1XX3vs7jm7TLqNcE6FTfnHKmMO8i-bQp9QpacaTAYn6EUrLsr4joGlZPydeYqEZ7ZT-nONFrk_Rkt-Bzf8O7cHx0QUBvBn9uMLDFXDqtZnkLVW8yPGk--OhTbHVGP86Pilz7tpB80EEkZuV4sZ9cRIHU3i5i9199R_mxCBNQOeIAicsy-q898-Rlj8Sam0OkyYYEm1Ds4zww2R8iJjV9bo8DqA8qwgtmiwf2mp4ye3oDrUNIWqemEjTByBrkbcW2ssM51-Cvjo67AeVh4f-XwxRn-V-4vLNxPfI52i2g4O8WGvwaEsJW1SSQD3IYHasgJ36dijB80atQql1AhU0g5sij-IsgDotP-PoKyEbUC_yuBiHC-kXalzTJ9gQSwcwzxXiMAG4PVVaHo04d2TXCZ6eWWjDOlpXIy3PM9qJ2NNCv3HcmhbK2lYBI5KAgyy3jZaWJOC7n-CTWW5pVtQWhEWYBQQy8eZZ0O3fChXJjJ44871TbK10VhXTfFq5fGQncXdc-SCB5bCPXwpO2elVO5GsHKaZ3iZtM19Bvn9ftUj4zsHioaPgUDkuRvAuh7cbdOqqNYcWRiN2qatmChWCxBTbigDQ9SmAcuet64IPGAavvzQ%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ae40598aeb444da3a5988703213fc550&_e=GfQRBPrfJkl8Ihq-EVmQAkIKWehITraqwqA96kRsrGudc4GGlKf7ZZfLa-T4m1XX3vs7jm7TLqNcE6FTfnHKmMO8i-bQp9QpacaTAYn6EUrLsr4joGlZPydeYqEZ7ZT-nONFrk_Rkt-Bzf8O7cHx0QUBvBn9uMLDFXDqtZnkLVW8yPGk--OhTbHVGP86Pilz7tpB80EEkZuV4sZ9cRIHU3i5i9199R_mxCBNQOeIAieQvFXLFcYBmDESlMAVjp8BW1mUYBdxYkK6sRUan-TmeQd6RrMrGoPXw4JReaN_ZneqUd_Ul6pesmyeKMVCfak4xWHN0pWpYoPjmXv0-5TK-vRrJpaDqfTGe5TGiFxQvjnwBHtiusn0kfMzrO77NgvWKvMwUM4lG65vgFeX3doZ0R9f8KuAM3MVSHPy90p3KKyhr1k6JZT6s38FX46LmfV50QKHffaHX4Ee4QuWyudp1A0Glt0i6E7L6ROZSDoKoiomI-vTi3ZS52JGE927uogvCTwga9oLhBhmfSdqGRRk8YmpgH7RBttrMeV0WVadJDtAgr_-YLqnEcSqe_46iJK1hwoZKC3NvE9JTd0PquCWheOSSVoFKA74-hlhVlJ-8g9yl2-cqMsDAdKaa6c03SREYGULGDB9XgKRxJWFAEovK98Oh8Cub_Pq-nEYhR-mfRk%3D)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ae40598aeb444da3a5988703213fc550&_e=GfQRBPrfJkl8Ihq-EVmQAkIKWehITraqwqA96kRsrGudc4GGlKf7ZZfLa-T4m1XX3vs7jm7TLqNcE6FTfnHKmMO8i-bQp9QpacaTAYn6EUrLsr4joGlZPydeYqEZ7ZT-nONFrk_Rkt-Bzf8O7cHx0QUBvBn9uMLDFXDqtZnkLVW8yPGk--OhTbHVGP86Pilz7tpB80EEkZuV4sZ9cRIHU3i5i9199R_mxCBNQOeIAierQWjTm042zbeQhM8qGqvtMFi9R_kTaITW66hkdOmwDr480omkVDU_ItT8H_UJKSNh23Fy8L0HKmHvBpzD0jZUmugDdaLZWyZYq2Hgh3zDnosqK6NnJ-10KZOog95fI-2sPqJr59hKiXyN2SY7xRQrKfjcgg4f0NEN1PDUqN-OhZCwJKbtWfvhAOPJ1eZYwTk7BpesksbPq7wM0htfTNDH6tKAKLzYsGa0c-hBnu1gD0oTsakqYv1o6peOPbcBe7RqvbK2rL1QqsOZYB5EXUk6LbXiw46t1w_Pw9JQEgM6AStaHt0GeeMlTg4DZmgRLpU5SGMDN5J0K3mq_7wRs_zzW_G7OfYO53vDzrCCZ5rR2-LmfZ6tHSMo7W2M7aKYki57m2-1evoe2YNrFff24gtbQN6GeTLm6umGnisGSYVzr3SQp-vPAfXySoYbi-YqjtA%3D)**

| [**CONTRIBUTE HERE**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ae40598aeb444da3a5988703213fc550&_e=GfQRBPrfJkl8Ihq-EVmQAkIKWehITraqwqA96kRsrGudc4GGlKf7ZZfLa-T4m1XX3vs7jm7TLqNcE6FTfnHKmMO8i-bQp9QpacaTAYn6EUrLsr4joGlZPydeYqEZ7ZT-nONFrk_Rkt-Bzf8O7cHx0QUBvBn9uMLDFXDqtZnkLVW8yPGk--OhTbHVGP86Pilz7tpB80EEkZuV4sZ9cRIHU3i5i9199R_mxCBNQOeIAidjtieKqgUCzSka7Bv-e9bdGndrs3vD4YCZ4_UoHzEfzS6xbtbDs2PT5C4cQpeWbNY9zVO8wNgjw7z9UcYu0F0SDyeFIlKkX4UZptmNTMq8zTP8MA9mxz1ndHdw_Xo4tQ-Uk8c6rstvescg7JaT9dt36fI0yWsZPaulM1DXaoFZtpp0tUsYcrSyfUXcH77B1duQewGdr5EIg8zQru_8fOmYw5gB5v8t_2aK1N2H9IqaWpYSIRPLgrgGlAlGIKM6yDtuo3WhaJAzDFEelypN_yZ91XRStCgoemUZ_iUsc1VQvPKIf4rbppWUE2wtE2J-lKfq5-DTTKBvtP2RbdHLxTQMPnLZdBNoCeQ6MeU3dL87mowo65hpNcsOCvxy1qu1hu8WnHHUfM-XaA-2Ent5zYel4i20WsPb2ZZSiGs-M4oT3DkUhI4WiATD-b5QdD11I2o%3D)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. Friend, Trump’s Department of Justice just snubbed 11 Secretaries of State who demanded answers about why the DOJ is secretly gathering state voter rolls. When they asked the DOJ: **Why are you collecting our voters’ data? What do you plan to do with it?** They received silence. Not a word or shred of transparency. name: Nellie Pou
subject: What we did together in November
body:
We faced the biggest challenges.

| |
---
Hi friend, November was a month of hard fights. Fights that tested our state, our values, and our resolve. Through the shutdown crisis, rising costs, and the chaos manufactured by House Republicans, our team stayed focused on one thing: **protecting New Jersey families.** We confronted the shutdown head-on. When House Republicans tried to halt SNAP benefits for families who rely on them, we stopped them. When they attempted to strip funding from critical tri-state infrastructure projects, we took legal action. And while they sowed chaos, we made sure food reached local food banks, seniors got the help they needed, and communities stayed connected. And on Election Day, voters rewarded that work. They elected Democrats up and down the ballot because they know who’s fighting for them—and who’s trying to tear everything down. But we can’t let up now. The same extremists who made November so hard are gearing up for an even tougher 2026. If we want to replicate our victories, we must stay strong heading into our final fundraising deadline of the year. **[Now we need to stay in the fight. This is a swing district, and I need your help to stay strong. clean_body: We faced the biggest challenges. | | Hi friend, November was a month of hard fights. Fights that tested our state, our values, and our resolve. Through the shutdown crisis, rising costs, and the chaos manufactured by House Republicans, our team stayed focused on one thing: protecting New Jersey families. We confronted the shutdown head-on. When House Republicans tried to halt SNAP benefits for families who rely on them, we stopped them. When they attempted to strip funding from critical tri-state infrastructure projects, we took legal action. And while they sowed chaos, we made sure food reached local food banks, seniors got the help they needed, and communities stayed connected. And on Election Day, voters rewarded that work. They elected Democrats up and down the ballot because they know who’s fighting for them—and who’s trying to tear everything down. But we can’t let up now. The same extremists who made November so hard are gearing up for an even tougher 2026. If we want to replicate our victories, we must stay strong heading into our final fundraising deadline of the year. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for being part of this movement. In solidarity, Nellie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . 2025 has been a year unlike any other, Peter — a year of GOP chaos and Democratic resistance.
We watched Trump deploy tens of thousands of troops on American soil, break his own record for the longest government shutdown in our history, and gut healthcare subsidies to pay for tax breaks for his billionaire donors.
_But we also saw Americans fight back._
Democrats swept last month’s elections from coast to coast, and Trump's approval cratered to historic lows as he was forced to sign away his surrender on the Epstein files. Even Marjorie Taylor Greene announced her resignation from Congress, saying Trump is totally out of touch with the MAGA wing of his party and the country at large.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. name: Team Bell
subject: LAST STRETCH
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Here's how you can get involved: Peter,

Missouri Republicans are moving fast — not because we asked for it — **because they're trying to force through a mid-decade gerrymandered map that would break apart communities and lock in the GOP's political power for years to come.**

Our communities, our representation, and our democracy are not political bargaining chips for Republicans to use whenever they want. But if they succeed, it's Missouri voters who are going to pay the price for their reckless, self-serving games.

Right now people across our district and state are stepping up to ensure these maps don't pass without Missouri voters having the last word. It's going to take real participation and real people-power to stop this gerrymander — and we're in the final stretch.

[**People Not Politicians is working around the clock to gather enough signatures to make it on the ballot in 2026 so we can REJECT these gerrymandered maps. To join them for a final signature gathering push ahead of the upcoming deadline, find volunteer opportunities here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120615902/586827204/-226696998?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU2NGVjZGItM2RkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AX-DPgtoiydz0tqk0ixht9Hws847Hq0W9K5ahgs2is8=&emci=be880182-8cd0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8e64ecdb-3dd1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1020964) [PROTECT FAIR MAPS!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120615903/586827205/-226696998?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU2NGVjZGItM2RkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AX-DPgtoiydz0tqk0ixht9Hws847Hq0W9K5ahgs2is8=&emci=be880182-8cd0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8e64ecdb-3dd1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1020964) Thank you,

name: Team Wes Moore
body:
This is an important message about education.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1016%2E1086043%2E9sBnKT)
Peter, we have to protect our hard-won progress in Maryland.
Since day one, Wes Moore has been a champion for education. From his own experience at Valley Forge Military Academy, he knows the _transformative_ power of the opportunity to challenge yourself and build your own pathway to success.
So as governor, he got to work. He put **record funding into Maryland’s public schools.** He turned around a staggering teacher vacancy rate with policies and investments that **cut teacher vacancies by 58%** _since he has been in office._ And this week, he announced **$19 million more toward pathways to recruiting and retaining new educators,** with a focus on getting men into more teaching roles.
That’s what Wes Moore is fighting for, but to keep at it he needs you, Peter.
Multiple Republicans are already in the race to make Wes a one-term governor. We’ll need your help to fight back.
**[Will you chip in any amount today to keep Wes in the fight for Maryland to have a world-class education for every kid?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251204-1.-Bj8sg&refcode=em-20251204-1&t=2&akid=1016%2E1086043%2E9sBnKT)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251204-1.-Bj8sg&amount=5&refcode=em-20251204-1&t=21&akid=1016%2E1086043%2E9sBnKT)**
Thanks for your help, Peter.
— Team Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251204-1&t=22&refcode2=1016_1086043_9sBnKT&akid=1016%2E1086043%2E9sBnKT)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=1016%2E1086043%2E9sBnKT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1016%2E1086043%2E9sBnKT)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

# Tokenization Tsunami: SEC Chair says US finance to transform in years
In a bold pivot from past skepticism, new SEC Chairman Paul Atkins predicted Tuesday that **[blockchain-driven tokenization](https://substack.com/redirect/391a76fa-d870-4832-9d81-3b7ad35594ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could revolutionize U.S. financial markets within a couple of years, slashing risks through instant on-chain settlements and boosting transparency for investors nationwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/391a76fa-d870-4832-9d81-3b7ad35594ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **SEC 's Regulatory Embrace Accelerates**: Atkins signals a departure from historical SEC lag on innovations, now proactively welcoming digital assets to position America as a crypto leader under U.S. rules.
* **On-Chain Settlements Slash Risks** : Tokenization eliminates traditional delays between trade execution and final payment, delivering unprecedented predictability and shielding investors from crises like the FTX collapse.
* **Policy Shift Ditches Crypto Bans** : The U.S. abandons prior aggressive crackdowns--once shared only with China--opting instead to onshore blockchain tech for safer, regulated growth.
* **Timeline Far Shorter Than Feared** : While many eyed a decade for full digitization, Atkins foresees market-wide tokenization hitting in under 10 years, potentially as soon as two, amid surging electronic trading advances.

# **Digital Dollar 2.0 May Be Coming**
On July 17th, while the press chased shiny objects and Epstein headlines, the House passed the GENIUS Act.But according to Rep. Marjorie Taylor Green, it's a bill that contains****_**" the entire setup, groundwork and infrastructure to move from cash to digital currency"**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/71c299f2-d9b7-4d1c-9998-e4ac948b45b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* What looks like "modernization" may actually be a transition to programmable money.
* In other words, a digital currency that could possibly be controlled by the federal government. **[When cash dies, access can become conditional.](https://substack.com/redirect/71c299f2-d9b7-4d1c-9998-e4ac948b45b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* That's not theoretical. Ask Canada's truckers.
* **This isn 't a currency debate. It's a sovereignty crisis.**
* If they control your money, they control you.
* You may be out of options, but there's one move you could take:

# **Trump 's tax shake up, the end of the road for income tax? **
President Donald Trump ignited fiscal fireworks Tuesday, boldly declaring Americans could soon **[ditch income taxes entirely](https://substack.com/redirect/5722b417-b242-4fef-9771-54bd9794fcd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as his White House team hunts innovative revenue streams to slash the burden on workers and supercharge economic growth.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5722b417-b242-4fef-9771-54bd9794fcd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tariffs Surge as Revenue Lifeline** : Trump eyes massive import tariffs on countries like China, Mexico, and India to generate billions, potentially replacing income tax dollars while punishing trade imbalances.
* **Historical Echoes Fuel Bold Vision** : Drawing from 19th-century U.S. models without income taxes, Trump envisions a return to tariff-driven funding, hailing it as a path to unmatched prosperity.
* **Expert Warnings on Economic Risks** : Economists caution that ditching income taxes for tariffs could spike consumer prices by up to 20%, hitting everyday shoppers hardest amid inflation fears.
* **Political Hurdles Loom Large** : With Congress skeptical, Trump's radical plan faces steep odds, though allies tout it as a game-changer for blue-collar voters in battleground states.

* * *
* * *
# GOP Firebrand to force a vote on Congressional stock trading ban
In a bold bipartisan push against congressional insider trading, Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, R-Fla., filed a discharge petition Tuesday **[to compel a House vote](https://substack.com/redirect/92498eab-7ec7-495d-9217-e8c64641653f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on banning lawmakers, spouses and dependents from owning or trading individual stocks, aiming to dismantle what she calls an "insider trading cartel" amid ethics reform delays.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/92498eab-7ec7-495d-9217-e8c64641653f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Luna Files Discharge Petition:** Florida Republican leverages procedural tool to amend unrelated bill, forcing floor consideration of stock ban despite leadership resistance.
* **Bipartisan Bill Origins:** "Restore Trust in Congress Act," introduced by Reps. Chip Roy (R-Texas) and Seth Magaziner (D-R.I.) earlier in 2025, gains renewed momentum through Luna's original cosponsorship.
* **Comprehensive Ban Details:** Legislation prohibits securities, commodities, futures and derivatives trading; mandates divestment of holdings with financial penalties, while exempting diversified mutual funds and precious metals.
* **Rising Support Signals Urgency:** Rep. Lauren Boebert vows to sign petition, as Roy and Magaziner warn of member-driven action if House leaders fail to swiftly advance the ethics overhaul.

* * *
* * *
# Trump's Dulles demolition dream
President Donald Trump announced Tuesday he intends to demolish and **[rebuild Washington Dulles International Airport](https://substack.com/redirect/9b981fe3-4a71-4986-b917-fb205f4af89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** into a "really spectacular" modern marvel, decrying its outdated 1960s design as a "disgrace" that hampers the nation's prestige.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9b981fe3-4a71-4986-b917-fb205f4af89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump Lambasts Outdated Design** : Slams Dulles' iconic but aging architecture, built in 1962 under his father Fred's concrete contracts, as embarrassing for global travelers.
* **Echoes Family Legacy Ties** : Trump highlighted Fred Trump's role in the original construction, blending personal history with bold redevelopment ambitions.
* **Airline Silence on Plan** : Major carriers like United, which dominates Dulles traffic, offer no comment, raising questions on feasibility amid aviation disruptions.

* * *
* * *
# NYC elite flee to Miami in Mamdani fueled panic
Wealthy New Yorkers are flooding South Florida's luxury real estate market with a 166% surge in inquiries after democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani's mayoral win, **[sparking a"thoughtful exodus"](https://substack.com/redirect/bf00ee12-52e7-4fec-aba3-3136653e90ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** driven by fears over soaring taxes and policy shifts in the Big Apple.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3465de4f-59bb-4c71-bdbf-35b4363efd0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Mamdani Victory Sparks Exodus** : Zohran Mamdani's democratic socialist triumph in NYC's mayoral race ignited immediate concerns among high-net-worth residents, accelerating plans for second homes in Florida's elite enclaves.
* **Inquiries Skyrocket Post-Election** : Ritz-Carlton Residences saw a 166% jump in New York buyer calls for $10M-$125M beachfront condos, while Four Seasons in Coconut Grove reported 15% of new buyers hailing from NYC amid a 10% regional interest rise.
* **Hesitant Buyers Seal Deals** : On-the-fence ultra-wealthy prospects at Perigon and Cipriani Residences finalized multimillion-dollar purchases the week of the election, with developers citing "staggering" activity from NYC transplants eyeing $12.5M-$70M units.
* **Tax Fears Fuel Migration** : Insiders like Gil Dezer hail the trend as "smart money moving south," warning that unfavorable NYC policies could turn this measured outflow into a full-scale billionaire flight to Miami's tax-friendly shores.

* * *
* * *
# Jan. 6 pipe bomb arrest shatters five-year FBI mystery
In a stunning breakthrough **[after five years of dead ends and conspiracy theories,](https://substack.com/redirect/e0a5df2c-7cb5-4870-8338-7a0683d16563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the FBI arrested Virginia resident Brian Cole early Thursday for planting undetonated pipe bombs outside DNC and RNC headquarters in Washington, D.C., on the eve of the January 6, 2021, Capitol riot--devices neutralized the next day without injury.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d9742f6-9944-4067-be3e-e94ab7090d71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Suspect 's Anarchist Ties Exposed**: Virginia's Brian Cole, labeled an 'anarchist' by investigators, faces charges for the 2021 bombs; his ideological leanings link to broader anti-government sentiments fueling the plot.
* **Bombs ' Chilling Eve Placement**: Homemade devices, packed with black powder and timers were dropped at 7:54 p.m. near DNC and 8:16 p.m. near RNC on January 5. Surveillance captured masked figure in gray hoodie and Nike sneakers.
* **Reward Sparks Evidence Rehash** : A $500,000 bounty and fresh footage prompted FBI to revisit 2021-2022 data, including retailer subpoenas and phone pings, yielding Cole's identification amid initial investigative stumbles.
* **Arrest Fuels Agency Reckoning** : The long hunt embarrassed the bureau for overlooked clues; Trump-era resources and Deputy Director Bongino's 'inside job' theories may now celebrate the resolution, silencing wild gait-analysis conspiracies.

Arrest Fuels Agency Reckoning : The long hunt embarrassed the bureau for overlooked clues; Trump-era resources and Deputy Director Bongino's 'inside job' theories may now celebrate the resolution, silencing wild gait-analysis conspiracies. * * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120616359/586828765/-1819093735?refcode=em_JJR_FR_OpEd_120425&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRlYzE4ODktM2ZkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zR6-XWJxteshCwKl9_CCVoLfkD8CjXlTUvcg5fS9es8=)
Florida families are being squeezed from every direction. Electricity bills are climbing, groceries cost more than ever and the price of housing continues to spiral out of reach. Yet instead of going after the corporate giants driving up costs, Attorney General James Uthmeier — whom one of the authors is running against in 2026 — is spending taxpayer dollars waging a political crusade against women’s healthcare.
His latest stunt, suing Planned Parenthood under racketeering laws, threatens the safety of thousands of women who rely on Planned Parenthood services for basic healthcare, including mammograms, prenatal care and family planning.
In his lawsuit, Uthmeier seeks to impose a $350 million penalty, an additional $1 million per defendant that he believes liable for "racketeering" and the cessation of Planned Parenthood’s operations across Florida and even across the country.
Is that where the majority of Floridians want their taxpayer dollars going towards? No, it is not. Last November, 57.2% of voters statewide supported Amendment 4, the measure to limit government interference with abortion. The majority of Floridians made it clear that women’s healthcare choices should be left to women, their families, and their healthcare providers. But instead of listening to voters and focusing on the real issues we have in our state, Uthmeier is using women’s healthcare to score cheap political points.
If our current attorney general wanted to use the power of the office to actually help Floridians, he should investigate Florida Power & Light, a monopoly utility that has repeatedly raised rates while pocketing record profits.
He should go after corporate price gouging that makes it harder for working families to afford groceries, rent, and medication. He should protect against wage theft and ensure workers are getting paid fairly. He should prevent masked ICE agents from acting with impunity, ignoring all due process for immigration. There is a long list of many things the attorney general can do to improve the lives of families in our state, but suing Planned Parenthood is not one of them.
Florida deserves leadership that is focused on serving the public. That means using the law to keep our communities safe, hold powerful corporations accountable, to lower costs, and to protect the rights and freedoms of every Floridian — not to strip them away.
Women in Florida have already lost so much under this administration: the right to make their own healthcare decisions, access to affordable care and the peace of mind that comes from knowing their state will defend, not endanger, them.
Floridians don’t need an attorney general obsessed with controlling women; they need one who will stand up to corporations and corrupt politicians driving up their bills.

body:
I refuse to let them take this seat back, but I cannot do that without real momentum going into the new year.

---
| Peter,

I am already looking ahead to 2026 because the truth is simple: **if we do not hold this seat, Democrats cannot take back the House.**

This district was decided by just **2 points** last cycle. Anthony D’Esposito is eying another run and national Republicans are raising staggering sums of money. They believe flipping this seat is their fastest path to holding their majority.

* How we scale from proof-of-concept victories to a national independent movement

It’s going to be big. But before we get there, we need to fuel the groundwork happening right now. **Help us raise $30,000 before the event and unlock a $15,000 match.****

name: Ryan Busse, PLW
subject: I’ve got a favor to ask
body:
These guys believe their billionaire friends will beat us down

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/iyQc7X8SiQSaHP4WcMIzXg~~/AAUS1hA~/e-DAK-Zo546TV2r10RqMspPKKAtt8KR09IjOYXgAbDsqRyxSPsQMlZzMcgVaVWolw-ymA78GIhpnR_kbhE0G4iACPAks2D8FGfO_wx0Z82gn8hEVoNlRcMxKAsGl_zl7)
| | | | Peter, This is a longer email, but it’s very important you read through to the end. [**If you don’t have time, please consider making a quick donation to support Public Land Warriors.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/6YtCDv3z3btWZ8A4wm--3w~~/AAUS1hA~/ZoS19HX3lgoOIohu82Kz8cyD6QB7eUKN2jD7P0ukuer4iQLEOfCXJSpIlelXFl6QfJGUB1BXwm59UHHGH9vo9XTXr41qZ32tSqgHLQ-whmxXmrQsm8IllUbcSV1EL-kn24c7a8Px_gEn06C4n99tYU4_NSGzPgiEgdEEMxnfE4gK2HI650XEpqT-xzPcNPf2FTi63o8mWhOSs6ffsZvbijfvMzkqGaLWkeorkUBczklSBzbxYd5R8EJLbybOgbs7) This summer, you helped us stop Mike Lee from sneaking a clause into Trump’s tax bill that would’ve forced the sale of public land across the West. You spoke up, you helped us run ads directly targeting members of Congress — and we won. Then came Trump’s push to gut the Roadless Rule — a key protection for 60 million acres of wild forests. Over 600,000 Americans submitted comments in just three weeks. **And guess what? 99% opposed the rollback.** When was the last time 99% of Americans agreed on anything? **The public wants public lands protected — and we want a say in how they’re managed.** But now, the MAGA right and industry insiders are back with a new threat: the so-called _Fix Our Forests Act._ It doesn’t sell public lands. It does something worse. **It strips away everything that makes them public.** 🔒 Silences science
🔒 Locks out public input
🔒 Hands decision-making to logging, mining, and oil interests Under this bill, you'd still “own” the land — but you’d have no voice in what happens to it. This is the final playbook of MAGA extremism: keep the title public, sell the substance private. And unless we speak out, unless we fight — they’ll get away with it. We need to continue pressuring key members of Congress and making sure no law gets passed without a fight. But we can’t do it without your help. [**Chip in $15 or more today to help us stop this corporate land grab and keep public lands truly public.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zL5u0hZBWgc8s8BWNa15ZA~~/AAUS1hA~/ZoS19HX3lgoOIohu82Kz8cyD6QB7eUKN2jD7P0ukuer4iQLEOfCXJSpIlelXFl6QfJGUB1BXwm59UHHGH9vo9XTXr41qZ32tSqgHLQ-whmxXmrQsm8IllUbcSV1EL-kn24c7a8Px_gEn06C4n99tYU4_NSGzPgiEgdEEMxnfE4ilzFRkYguYGdIODJreC9JV0-GctYhwXx-f1sZdkEuj-gKPsvQBCAr5AvCRKf9hzqFJw2p79R4WdJ6_raflPVIk) Public lands belong to the people. And the people will not back down. Thanks for fighting,
Ryan Busse [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Tc-8zThlyRnhq7j0cXyy-g~~/AAUS1hA~/3N-y0UHMuva6LQprKRWx-tDD8lMBgZ-LHw2oiKtkFce5X2TsA7zCtdszKPdOPjiaBnO8k-OgKC0OQWQZ9TwNcFEXYYVIDD8XifI3UmVAEWnLLkAU3pvkoifRacvtagCKylPh_UF9t6dYDi7z0FA_s08cA51AEVQe59JuQtl3yj7lq5v-MaOnxbXJXpVGe62X3crW4yulu6AjGbyEE1Atybv69icEgBtXKUMrdXI1U73uLuD1cPbUva1nS9hQLg1d) **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Tc-8zThlyRnhq7j0cXyy-g~~/AAUS1hA~/3N-y0UHMuva6LQprKRWx-tDD8lMBgZ-LHw2oiKtkFce5X2TsA7zCtdszKPdOPjiaBnO8k-OgKC0OQWQZ9TwNcFEXYYVIDD8XifI3UmVAEWnLLkAU3pvkoifRacvtagCKylPh_UF9t6dYDi7z0FA_s08cA51AEVQe59JuQtl3yj7lq5v-MaOnxbXJXpVGe62X3crW4yulu6AjGbyEE1Atybv69icEgBtXKUMrdXI1U73uLuD1cPbUva1nS9hQLg1d) ** **
**
---
| Public Land Warriors728 Gilbert StHelena, MT 59601United States

This is the final playbook of MAGA extremism: keep the title public, sell the substance private. And unless we speak out, unless we fight — they’ll get away with it. We need to continue pressuring key members of Congress and making sure no law gets passed without a fight. But we can’t do it without your help. Public lands belong to the people. And the people will not back down. Thanks for fighting, Ryan Busse | Public Land Warriors728 Gilbert StHelena, MT 59601United States "Website"

body:
We Need Your Help to Take on the Swamp!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b5b72b21aa75/warren-howell-the-only-candidate-with-a-real-plan-for-harris-county-17459515?e=7c92d84deb)

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
# _We have to DOGE the Harris County SWAMP!_
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=040943dccd&e=7c92d84deb)
| | | | | | | | | | | |

**Harris County Commissioners Court continues to be exposed for reckless spending, annual deficits and a ridiculously bloated payroll.**
We have far too many overpaid "administrators" shuffling paper and not enough crews in the streets addressing our failing infrastructure. _**We are a shambles.**_
Meanwhile, the personal goings-on of the current County Judge, Lina Hidalgo are front-page news intended to deflect from her piss-poor performance. **It's a literal comedy of errors, folks.**
I am the only candidate who brings an extensive resume steeped in entrepreneurship, construction management, managerial and leadership skills - _AND an immediate written plan to**DOGE Harris County! **_
[ _**👉 www.howellforharriscounty.com.**_](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=83226a118c&e=7c92d84deb)

It's time to batten down the hatches because with your help, _**we are going to take on the storm and TAKE DOWN the SWAMP**_!
My administration will deliver a smaller County government that is highly efficient and reflective of the rigorous economy that Texans deserve.
* **It's time for the FUTURE. **
* **It's time for change.**
* **It's time to take back Harris County!**

See My full plan to _MAKE HARRIS COUNTY GREAT AGAIN_ on the campaign website.
Join our winning team and help lead Harris County to a brighter future with leadership that **WORKS FOR THE PEOPLE!**
---

name: Amanda Sherman Baity, EMILYs List
subject: Republicans know Georgia is slipping from their grasp
body:
Georgia is at a critical crossroads |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120617822/586833972/-1510725204?refcode=WUEFEL08_20251204_GAGov_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY4ZDM3NC00M2QxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zqfq_hRQvxmgAjz4G0nYBFqgKjSmPBvsRtCiFj7cvJ8=) Hi Peter,

I wanted to be the first to share this news with you — today, we're endorsing Keisha Lance Bottoms in Georgia's governor race.

Keisha is the fighter Georgians need at this critical crossroads.

[**Before I tell you more, will you pitch in to help elect more Democratic pro-choice women to lead our states?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120617825/586833980/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL08_20251204_GAGov_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY4ZDM3NC00M2QxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zqfq_hRQvxmgAjz4G0nYBFqgKjSmPBvsRtCiFj7cvJ8=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120617828/586833990/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL08_20251204_GAGov_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY4ZDM3NC00M2QxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zqfq_hRQvxmgAjz4G0nYBFqgKjSmPBvsRtCiFj7cvJ8=)
---
After years of Republican control, we have a real opportunity to flip the Georgia governor's mansion and elect a Democratic pro-choice woman who will fight for reproductive freedom, health care access, lower costs, and economic opportunity for all Georgians.

As Atlanta's mayor, Keisha led the city through the COVID-19 pandemic and championed affordable housing. Most recently, she served as senior advisor to President Joe Biden. And now, she's ready to take her battle-tested leadership statewide.

But let's be clear: Republicans know Georgia is slipping from their grasp. They're going to pour millions into this race to hold onto power, and we need to match their resources dollar for dollar.

We can win this. But only if we start building our campaign infrastructure now.

[**Donate now to help elect Keisha Lance Bottoms and Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot next year:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120617832/586833994/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL08_20251204_GAGov_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY4ZDM3NC00M2QxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zqfq_hRQvxmgAjz4G0nYBFqgKjSmPBvsRtCiFj7cvJ8=)

clean_body: Georgia is at a critical crossroads | = Hi Peter, I wanted to be the first to share this news with you — today, we're endorsing Keisha Lance Bottoms in Georgia's governor race. Keisha is the fighter Georgians need at this critical crossroads. = | = After years of Republican control, we have a real opportunity to flip the Georgia governor's mansion and elect a Democratic pro-choice woman who will fight for reproductive freedom, health care access, lower costs, and economic opportunity for all Georgians. As Atlanta's mayor, Keisha led the city through the COVID-19 pandemic and championed affordable housing. Most recently, she served as senior advisor to President Joe Biden. And now, she's ready to take her battle-tested leadership statewide. But let's be clear: Republicans know Georgia is slipping from their grasp. They're going to pour millions into this race to hold onto power, and we need to match their resources dollar for dollar. We can win this. But only if we start building our campaign infrastructure now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Talk soon, Amanda Sherman Baity (she/her/hers) Chief Communications Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: The Flyover
subject: Last-minute gift stress? Let’s fix that.
body:
The Flyover Gift Guide is here with picks people actually love.

# Thursday, December 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Do you have that _one lingering person_ you still don't have the right gift for? You're not alone and we're here to save you. The Flyover Christmas Gift Guide is live, and many of our favorite picks are still on sale. From the Cozy Earth Bubble Cuddle Blanket that everyone ends up obsessed with to the Sonos Era 100 to transform any room, we've rounded up presents people _actually_ want, not things that end up in a drawer. Finish your list stress-free and find something perfect for even the toughest person to shop for. And don't miss [Ayla](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJy0kL2K4zAURp9G7mL0ZykuVOwSHLbIFrsDYSrhSFfxHWQ7WNcxefvBA_MI036H7xTnevGXHjNO97_9CI7S7CNEDD1B9BNsJQMRLD73hUacVoI7Jiq0QNlRSV5y2RyEPHDtuzXn0_f7jInOK0bwooouAUhQFThhjT5a3RpRDY7b1gRrTIpWS5FkVNwEYaIQ8daIFip0u15IrkXLpZK14jwIe0umkc3xaDjTHCLSvNQfM040QMqv-QlLHeaxym4gehSmfjHZMdlt21a_5pXWG-x8X3oKA1Pdk6nTv9f72-P3dfvzP1SLi48Nc8ZiLNP8PvaYv5T0U4meTn4GAAD___I_hbA) and [Amy's](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJy00LFugzAQxvGngS3IPoyBwUPUikypulXqYhl8hksNRPhIlD59lUp9hM6fft_w_zjbs6NIy_jmZjQcVuvR0-AYvV3wniIy42ajSzzTsjOOFDjxhuk5pWBBQHWQcBDKdnuMr3_6RIFPO3m0MvcmIAKWORpZa9XUqtUyn4xsBq-01i6gqFtXay1bWfWDh9BUEPqczPNeglCyFVBCUQoxyLoPuoKqabTIlEBPvG7FZaWFJwzxsd5wK4Z1zqOZmK8pK48ZdBl0j3Xnvegxg247fl_sZ_X-8jXmm_HXO8VISdeZEuPsKP56_q8eNwM_AQAA___BK391) Flyover Podcast episodes where they walk you through some of our favorite picks from this year's guide.

clean_body: The Flyover Gift Guide is here with picks people actually love. | | | | | | Thursday, December 3, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Do you have that one lingering person you still don't have the right gift for? You're not alone and we're here to save you. The Flyover Christmas Gift Guide is live, and many of our favorite picks are still on sale. From the Cozy Earth Bubble Cuddle Blanket that everyone ends up obsessed with to the Sonos Era 100 to transform any room, we've rounded up presents people actually want, not things that end up in a drawer. Finish your list stress-free and find something perfect for even the toughest person to shop for. And don't miss and Flyover Podcast episodes where they walk you through some of our favorite picks from this year's guide. You can explore the full online now. - The Flyover Team | ➤ Sultry by Mixologie: She's not one for loud perfume--just unforgettable ones. Soft, sophisticated, and endlessly wearable. () ➤ Cozy Earth Bubble Cuddle Blanket: For the woman who deserves to relax in style. Soft, breathable, and ridiculously cozy. () ➤ LaserAway Laser Hair Removal: Holiday glow-up, activated. Skip the razor and save up to 70% on smooth, lasting confidence. () ➤ Society6 Wall Art: Blank walls are boring--she isn't. Give her art that matches her energy and makes her home feel like her own. () ➤ Gift something as unique as she is. A personalized gold necklace she'll wear every day. () | ➤Gravit e by Particle: Strong, smooth, and unforgettable--kind of like him. Grab Gravite by Particle and save 20% with code FLYOVER20. () ➤ Nomad Modern Leather Case: Tech protection, grown up. A case that's as sharp as his suit and twice as dependable. () ➤ Luxury Smokes Sampler: For the man who knows a good moment deserves a great cigar. Ten premium picks, one perfect gift. () ➤ RealTruck Accessories & Gear: His truck deserves an upgrade, too--and right now, you can save big. () | ➤Rosetta Stone Language Learning: For the endlessly curious. Rosetta Stone makes learning a new language intuitive, engaging, and actually fun with bite-sized lessons that fit any schedule. () ➤ ClearChoice Dental Implants: For the person ready for real change. A new smile, renewed confidence, and 10% off treatment. () ➤ flowkey Piano Learning App: Finally learn the piano like you always said you would. Interactive lessons, your pace, your favorite songs. () ➤ LifePro Fitness Equipment: The gift that keeps them moving. Easy-to-use fitness gear designed to build strength, improve balance, and boost energy. () ➤ WOLFBOX Dash Cam: For the driver who already has it all. The WOLFBOX Dash Cam adds clarity, security, and a serious tech upgrade to every drive. () ➤ Loaded Game Marketplace: Pay less, play more. Grab new games for up to 90% off and start earning CDKoins on day one. () | ➤ Hotel Collection Studio Pro: Turn the house into your favorite hotel. Elegant design, unforgettable scent, zero checkout time. () ➤ Miracle Made Sheet Set: Sleep better, wash less, and upgrade the bed for good. These sheets are smarter than your average set. () ➤ Sonos Era 100: Turn up the holidays. Crisp sound, easy setup, and endless playlists right from your phone. () ➤ Cloud Align Pillow: Tired of waking up tired? The Cloud Align Pillow supports, cushions, and actually fixes your sleep posture. () ➤ Cyber Heater: Tech meets cozy. Give the gift of instant, smart heat this season with the Cyber Heater () ➤ SNOW+ Automatic Pet Feeder: 'Tis the season to treat your pet (and yourself!). Smart scheduling, portion control, and jam-free dispensing from the SNOW+ () | ➤ Texas Hill Country Olive Co. Keepsake Box: For the home chef, the foodie, or the "I'll bring a salad" friend. Give the gift of award-winning olive oil. () ➤ NOH Hawaiian Holiday Gift Set: Bright, bold, and straight from Hawai'i. Two full gift sets, one unbeatable price, and the easiest way to taste the islands this season. () ➤ Gourmet Popcorn Gift Set: Popcorn, elevated. Give the snack lover in your life a gourmet surprise that's as fun to give as it is to eat. () ➤ Gourmet Gift Baskets: You can't go wrong with great snacks. From cheeses to chocolates, these gourmet baskets check every box. () | ➤ Wallet Defender: Keep your identity where it belongs, in your wallet. Sleek design, serious protection. () ➤ Cobra Fire Blanket: Not your typical stocking stuffer--but maybe the smartest one. Safety, simplicity, and peace of mind. () ➤ Cell Phone Seat: The stocking stuffer they'll actually use. | I need you with me on this.

24 million Americans could see their health care premiums double unless Congress acts. The enhanced Affordable Care Act premium tax credits, which have helped families afford coverage during some of the most difficult economic years in recent memory, are set to expire on January 1st.

If Speaker Mike Johnson refuses to act, millions of people will be priced out of the coverage they rely on. Marketplace premiums are projected to double on average, and enrollment could plummet by as much as 50%.

At a moment when the cost of everything keeps climbing, allowing health care costs to explode like this is unthinkable.

That’s why I just led members of the Lowering Costs Caucus in calling on Speaker Johnson to immediately extend these tax credits. But he needs to hear from the people he’s putting at risk, too.

[_**Will you add your name to my petition calling on Speaker Johnson to extend ACA enhanced premium tax credits before they expire? I’m fighting with everything I have to protect affordable health care for my constituents — but I need a wave of public pressure behind me.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120618624/586836372/1220550808?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWZhNTAyNS00NGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6pXua6eb9778M3piWtvEMyvqJYw3H-GA4nJE6lhL7c=&emci=cb4a0bff-2ad1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c5fa5025-44d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=750857)

clean_body: I need you with me on this. 24 million Americans could see their health care premiums double unless Congress acts. | = | I need you with me on this. 24 million Americans could see their health care premiums double unless Congress acts. The enhanced Affordable Care Act premium tax credits, which have helped families afford coverage during some of the most difficult economic years in recent memory, are set to expire on January 1st. If Speaker Mike Johnson refuses to act, millions of people will be priced out of the coverage they rely on. Marketplace premiums are projected to double on average, and enrollment could plummet by as much as 50%. At a moment when the cost of everything keeps climbing, allowing health care costs to explode like this is unthinkable. That’s why I just led members of the Lowering Costs Caucus in calling on Speaker Johnson to immediately extend these tax credits. But he needs to hear from the people he’s putting at risk, too. | We cannot allow this crisis to happen simply because House leadership refuses to prioritize working families. Thank you. – Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Tina Kotek
subject: I’m running for re-election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_twk?refcode=X_251204_reelection_spl_twk_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_twk?refcode=X_251204_reelection_spl_twk_act]
Peter, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election as Governor of Oregon. Will you donate $10 to Maxine Dexter and myself to send a strong message as we kick off our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_twk?refcode=X_251204_reelection_spl_twk_act&amount=]
BECOME A KICKOFF DONOR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_twk?refcode=X_251204_reelection_spl_twk_act&amount=]
While the past few months have been unlike anything we’ve seen before — in our state and in our country — the way we came together made me so proud to be an Oregonian.
When President Trump tried to use our own military against us, we showed the power of peaceful resistance.
When President Trump created a food emergency by withholding SNAP funds, Oregon stepped up to help feed our neighbors.
I’ve never been prouder to work for you — but the fight isn’t over. I’m running for Governor again because Oregon values are on the line.
The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let President Trump do whatever he wants.
And with everything going on, we still have to keep building on the progress we’ve made, to make sure people can afford to call Oregon home.
We expanded the number of shelter beds, began building more homes people can afford, funded summer learning, and found ways to ease the rising cost of living.
It’s a start, but we need to do more. Especially with everything coming at us from Washington, D.C.
As Governor, I’ve visited all thirty-six counties across Oregon, and I’ve seen firsthand the strength and resilience that makes our state such a special place.
That’s why I’m so optimistic about our future.
It’s why I’m excited to officially announce my re-election campaign for Governor of our great state.
If you’re ready to help us make more progress, will you make a contribution today to Maxine and my campaign to become a kickoff donor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_twk?refcode=X_251204_reelection_spl_twk_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tina Kotek and Maxine Dexter will go through immediately:

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_twk?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_251204_reelection_spl_twk_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_twk?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_251204_reelection_spl_twk_act]
Thank you. Let’s do this together.
— Tina

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump: “Adam Shifty Schiff is guilty of crimes against our country!!!”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9262%2E5257348%2ExgJUAX ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Not a week goes by that Donald Trump doesn’t personally call me out by
name.

Call for me to be prosecuted.
Call me “guilty.”
Or some other nonsense.

His recent attack comes on the heels of failed attempts to prosecute New
York Attorney General Letitia James and former FBI Director James Comey.

And in classic Trump fashion, he declared me “guilty”:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9262%2E5257348%2ExgJUAX ]Truth Social post: Adam Shifty Schiff is guilty of crimes against our
country!

This may seem insane to those who don’t follow the day to day – or live in
Trump’s crazed media ecosystem, but this is Trump’s reference to his
effort to get the House Republicans to censure me and fine me $32 million
over the Mueller investigation. Quite flattering to know that apparently I
was responsible for an investigation led by a special counsel appointed by
Trump’s own Attorney General.

Trump and his lackeys threatened to primary any Republican who voted
against the censure, so it passed on a party-line basis (minus the fine,
which even Republicans balked at).

The attacks against me have continued,
Derek. Trump has been nonstop in
his smears and demands that I be prosecuted for leading his impeachment.

Including the recent pronouncement that I’m “guilty.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=9262%2E5257348%2ExgJUAX ]While Trump’s attacks escalate, I am continuing to fight to hold him
accountable, and I will never back down. Pitch in to help me stand up to
him and his crooked administration, no matter what they throw at me.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q42025_abs_em.jZ5GRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=9262%2E5257348%2ExgJUAX ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q42025_abs_em.fmwQtt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=9262%2E5257348%2ExgJUAX ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q42025_abs_em.z9ptV2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=9262%2E5257348%2ExgJUAX ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q42025_abs_em.oB7ZBD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=9262%2E5257348%2ExgJUAX ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=9262%2E5257348%2ExgJUAX ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your continued support. Facing attacks from the Trump
administration isn’t easy, but you having my back means so much.

— Adam

# **Buy And Store _Your Own_ Gold & Silver!**
---
|
---
| | Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth. This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what’s the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here’s the thing about ETFs...
---
| |
---
| You don’t actually own the gold or silver.
---
| |
---
| You can’t take physical delivery of the metal.
---
| |
---
| Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains.
---
| |
---
| Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing.
---
| | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver...
---
1. **Immediate Access**
Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners.
2. **Complete control**
You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box.
3. **Easy Portability**
If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals.
4. **Convenient Flexibility**
Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings.
5. **No Pricey Fees**
With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time.

---

Here’s the thing about ETFs... | | | You don’t actually own the gold or silver. | | | You can’t take physical delivery of the metal. | | | Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains. | | | Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing. | | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver... 1. Immediate Access Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners. 2. Complete control You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box. 3. Easy Portability If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals. 4. Convenient Flexibility Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings. 5. No Pricey Fees With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time. | | If you want to learn more about buying and controlling your own physical gold and silver, get your free copy of... | | | In this free guide, you’ll learn... Fellow Conservative,

The SEAL creed begins: _**“I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.”**_

I’ve lived that line since the day I was pinned with my trident after graduating from BUDS.

Three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman.

**Six more deployments as a SEAL officer—Middle East, Pacific, and Africa. 70+ countries.**

Places that don’t make the evening news.

I never needed a megaphone.

I needed a plan, a team, and the discipline to execute when lives were at stake.

Minnesota needs the same quiet professionalism in the Senate. That’s why I’ve tossed my hat in the ring,_**in hopes of becoming the Republican nominee in what is shaping up to be Minnesota’s closest Senate race in a generation.
