clean_body: While career politicians scream on cable news, carjackings in Minneapolis are up 74% since 2020. | Fellow Conservative, The SEAL creed begins: “I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.” I’ve lived that line since the day I was pinned with my trident after graduating from BUDS. Three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman. Six more deployments as a SEAL officer—Middle East, Pacific, and Africa. 70+ countries. Places that don’t make the evening news. I never needed a megaphone. I needed a plan, a team, and the discipline to execute when lives were at stake. Minnesota needs the same quiet professionalism in the Senate. That’s why I’ve tossed my hat in the ring,in hopes of becoming the Republican nominee in what is shaping up to be Minnesota’s closest Senate race in a generation. While career politicians scream on cable news, carjackings in Minneapolis are up 74% since 2020. Rural hospitals in Greater Minnesota are closing. Illegal immigrants with rap sheets walk free because Walz-Flanagan and Ilhan Omar sued to gut ICE detention. My opponent’s loudest moment? Filing lawsuits against police while businesses burned. I’m bewildered why anyone would put their future in the hands of left-wing lunatics with no real-world experience, yet here we are. Just this past week, Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, Minnesotan. I don’t advertise. I deliver. The left’s own poll shows a generic Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat Republican. That’s the closest any race for this seat has been in over 17 years. The national GOP is watching. My socialist opponent’s record? Filing lawsuits against police while businesses burned. I’m bewildered why anyone would put their future in the hands of left-wing lunatics with no real-world experience, yet here we are. Just this past week,Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work. That’s where you come in. Unlike the progressive darling I’m running against, I don’t have any famous backers supporting my campaign, just a hope and a wish that conservative patriots like yourself will see this note and find that I’m worth investing in. Every dollar proves Minnesota is ready for results, not noise. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence works when your adversary believes you’ll act. China believes me. Bernie fears me. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Dependable, safe public transportation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120619379/586838898/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmRjOTliMDItNDdkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yESKAPdLJjJHXKYSmoloc9eDnzwHpbKtQpNtQktl6ms=) Friend, I wanted to thank you, and everyone who supported us over this past month and put us in a position to close my first year in Congress strong. Of course, our relationship isn’t only about fundraising. It’s a partnership for building a better community for every one of us who calls CA-30 home. And one big part of a healthy community: Safe public transportation. Safety is the most basic need we have, and no one should ever fear that public transit is too dangerous to ride. That's why I’ve introduced new legislation called the **Safe and Affordable Transit Act.** This bipartisan effort will help restore public trust in our community buses and trains by hiring more officers and upgrading infrastructure so that we can all feel safe while riding public transportation. [**I sat down with LAist about my new bill, and I encourage you to take a listen:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120619380/586838899/1182562141?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmRjOTliMDItNDdkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yESKAPdLJjJHXKYSmoloc9eDnzwHpbKtQpNtQktl6ms=&emci=c7738bfc-46d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=2dc99b02-47d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8447100) | ****[Listen](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120619381/586838900/1182562141?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmRjOTliMDItNDdkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yESKAPdLJjJHXKYSmoloc9eDnzwHpbKtQpNtQktl6ms=&emci=c7738bfc-46d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=2dc99b02-47d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8447100)****

Thank you again, friend, and here's to a very productive December.
Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, I wanted to thank you, and everyone who supported us over this past month and put us in a position to close my first year in Congress strong. Of course, our relationship isn’t only about fundraising. It’s a partnership for building a better community for every one of us who calls CA-30 home. And one big part of a healthy community: Safe public transportation. Safety is the most basic need we have, and no one should ever fear that public transit is too dangerous to ride. That's why I’ve introduced new legislation called the Safe and Affordable Transit Act. This bipartisan effort will help restore public trust in our community buses and trains by hiring more officers and upgrading infrastructure so that we can all feel safe while riding public transportation. | ** Thank you again, friend, and here's to a very productive December. name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Do you agree with the 85% who want this passed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Headline: 85 Percent of Voters Want Congress to Pass the Equal Rights Amendment [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/ERA_Poll.png]
Fifty years after the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) was initially passed in Congress, an overwhelming majority of likely voters want the provision aimed at guaranteeing equal rights for all genders to go into effect .
Recent polling from Data for Progress finds that 85 percent of likely voters support Congress passing the ERA to give it a second chance at being adopted as a constitutional amendment. Support for the amendment is bipartisan, with 93 percent of Democrats and 79 percent of both independents and Republicans agreeing that the provision should be passed.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should we adopt the Equal Rights Amendment to guarantee full & equal protections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120425_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120425_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120425_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120425_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
Folks,
If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress.
All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.
If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks.
I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.
If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.
And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:
[**Split a donation between Congresswoman Sarah McBride and me. It would mean a lot.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251204-1.hO2ffO&refcode=em20251204-2559&t=1&akid=2559%2E21716%2E_jG2w9)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251204-1.hO2ffO&amount=5&refcode=em20251204-2559&t=20&akid=2559%2E21716%2E_jG2w9)**
Thank you,
Mark
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251204-1&t=21&refcode2=2559_21716__jG2w9&akid=2559%2E21716%2E_jG2w9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=22&akid=2559%2E21716%2E_jG2w9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=23&akid=2559%2E21716%2E_jG2w9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2559%2E21716%2E_jG2w9)

name: Musk via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop giving Musk government handouts!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

It’s completely outrageous: Elon Musk could soon become the world’s first
trillionaire – thanks to government handouts.

Musk’s $1 trillion pay package at Tesla over the next 10 years means he’ll
make more per year than all 1.4 MILLION elementary school teachers in the
U.S. combined. All while he feasts on our tax dollars: billions in
government contracts, grants, subsidies, and lucrative loans are funneled
straight into his pockets.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34703?source=email-20251204&t=1011&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Headline: Elon Musk is set to make more than every U.S. elementary
teacher combined

It’s disgusting – we HAVE to do something about it. And we can start by
making sure our government doesn’t give him one PENNY more of our taxpayer
money.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34703?source=email-20251204&t=1012&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Add your name now to demand Congress end Musk’s government handouts and
defund the oligarchs!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34703?source=email-20251204&t=1013&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]ADD YOUR NAME

Let’s be clear: in the last two decades, Musk’s empire – companies like
Tesla, SpaceX, and Starlink – have pocketed at least **$38 billion** in
government awards. That’s *our* money lining the pockets of the richest
man in the world while schools beg for pencils and counselors, while
people die without health care, and while 1 in 7 families don’t have
enough to eat. It’s not just unfair – it’s a completely rigged, broken
system.

And now Musk, fresh from his “bitter feud” with Trump, is right back in
the White House – dining with the Saudi crown prince. That’s not someone
on the sidelines – it’s the richest man in the world, cashing in on his
oligarch status by shaking hands with power, trading favors, and setting
the rules.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34703?source=email-20251204&t=1014&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Headline: Elon Musk quietly returns to White House as feud with Trump
fades

Enough is enough.

The only way we’ll reclaim our democracy is if we stop letting oligarchs
like Musk buy it with government dollars. And Congress has the power to
end Musk’s government contracts, loans, and grants – if we make enough
noise.

Corporate lobbyists want us to believe these contracts are investments in
American innovation. Don’t buy it. Musk and his oligarch friends spend
millions fighting unions, pushing tech that invades privacy, and spewing
dangerous conspiracy theories – while using our money to get even richer.

Imagine if just a fraction of the subsidies Musk receives went to rebuild
our schools, expand green energy jobs in our communities, or guarantee
affordable health care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34703?source=email-20251204&t=1015&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]This is our moment to say: No more blank checks for billionaires. Not a
dime in taxpayer money for oligarchs who dine with despots and undermine
democracy. Will you add your name now to demand Congress cut off Musk –
and the rest of the oligarchs who rig the system to line their own
pockets?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34703?source=email-20251204&t=1016&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]ADD YOUR NAME

We know taking on the billionaires won’t win us friends in Washington, but
Our Revolution has never backed down from a fight for justice, decency,
and democracy. We’re organizing thousands of Americans like you to tell
Congress: It’s time to serve the people, not trillionaires.

Let’s put workers, teachers, and children before yachts and rockets.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251204.NZhcw8&t=1007&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251204.PaeXAz&t=1008&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251204.X-h-8F&t=1009&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251204.eEwyCV&t=1010&akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9935%2E5885482%2EDULXpW

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as

subject: here's how we make the GOP's plans COMPLETELY backfire
body:
As always, the GOP is letting their BILLIONAIRE BACKERS call the shots... and the result is an avalanche of right-wing money aimed squarely at every competitive House seat in the country.
Their strategy is simple:
Overwhelm the map with massive outside spending and hope grassroots Democrats cannot keep up.
All grassroots Democrats who give a damn about the future of this country need to band together RIGHT NOW and make SURE their shady scheme backfires!!!
We only need FIVE SEATS to take the majority back from these maniacs, and we CANNOT let a few pesky billionaires get in our way! There's just TOO MUCH on the line. body:
https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/ [https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/]
https://www.cityandstateny.com/politics/2025/12/adem-bunkeddeko-launches-state-comptroller-bid-novel-trust-fund-plan/409856/?oref=csny-homepage-river [https://www.cityandstateny.com/politics/2025/12/adem-bunkeddeko-launches-state-comptroller-bid-novel-trust-fund-plan/409856/?oref=csny-homepage-river]
Peter,
City & State broke the news Tuesday: I’m running for New York State Comptroller.
I wanted to send a quick follow-up in case you missed my announcement yesterday: I’m officially running for New York State Comptroller.
The response to the launch has been incredible — thousands of people viewed the video and shared our message about a new social contract for New York. That early momentum matters.
👉🏿 [ DONATE HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/launch1222026] ]
But here’s what’s especially important right now: A contribution of $250 or less from a New York resident is matched 6:1 by the state.
That means:
$50 becomes $300
$100 becomes $600
$250 unlocks $1,500 in public matching funds
These early matchable donations determine our viability — and help us build the coalition we need across the East River and up the Hudson.
If you haven’t had a chance to contribute yet, I’d be grateful for your support today:
👉🏿 [ DONATE HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/launch1222026] ]
Paid for by Adem for New York
Adem for New York
P.O. Box 130-427,
Brooklyn, NY 11213

name: Aria, United We Dream
subject: ✍️ SEND A LETTER: Demand your Senators support permanent protections for immigrants
body:
Your Senators need to hear from you today! | | | Peter, 🗣️**We Need Permanent Protections Now!!** Senators Dick Durbin and Lisa Murkowski just reintroduced the bipartisan DREAM Act - which would create a pathway to citizenship for millions of immigrant young people who call this country home. **⏰****This moment demands decisive action from ALL of us,****Peter.** Immigrant youth joined partners, Senator Durbin (IL) and members of Congress in D.C. to send a clear message: we need a clean, inclusive pathway to citizenship NOW! [**Can you grow our impact and send a letter to your Senators urging them to co-sponsor the DREAM Act?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38n-G3vzkCkIlBeC0doULsRCnf2NjP5sx3T-DHcsgSjG7VHOpxYSA5StJv26csdNUVuafOj2TopcRu5GCwGQ13f92GQauL4Fkkt_dkqudi4DpTt98Exvo2Ke5ZV_iofHgKCjnZhnoT34CDSW-nn8bj99h6WDx-TYocFOmWwEa7IbZ2TLib8DLiXb-v3WxY0XyHqlTiWHycfUUEnpta5CpyM37udZzooDvVO3CxaKu-qFresaPo853oJdEu19oexc9Zv9YBhJJ3AD02UI1K2G1xgejI8FnzzlCVJmA1dVf6iO8B0Uv8d_zuE05jmVQMID33vV4JJYFEVUR_otlZ3qM57O-oO2_t8ETwuaV5hwZ5QAA/4m5/VpzrB3RQQLSOFMUN6s-cLg/h0/h001.Qk6Af0fiX7lfHjHQuSd6kqgYzEltHt0JE7NCrfi34IA) **[✉️ Send Your Letter Today](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38n-G3vzkCkIlBeC0doULsRCnf2NjP5sx3T-DHcsgSjG7VHOpxYSA5StJv26csdNUVuafOj2TopcRu5GCwGQ13f92GQauL4Fkkt_dkqudi4DpTt98Exvo2Ke5ZV_iofHgL5tiG22qcvwaDi1_4oUbP6qc-coTJn1Cg28B5idyvs_2_zP3sv0RXRKZYTViUztvJw52p1HJLXVmWc6aAu34EahsDDtUYx0Wt5UIzCNEO62JtZYgj8QDBWXhCDvGC8cv4_lulwx81M3lZrC0Vc8qzdcHHtSRWS3QX2g_VX9Jgi-TdWLi_XxVy5usOnQ12Qrx30uO9KfRpRb_VCjT8XZAAuxipyZNxAb2UmxSOKm-K5XQ/4m5/VpzrB3RQQLSOFMUN6s-cLg/h1/h001.eMCT3l0N1q2Td7Av1snVIkjSbKEumGPzxwy6OIS3CAA)[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38n-G3vzkCkIlBeC0doULsRCnf2NjP5sx3T-DHcsgSjG7VHOpxYSA5StJv26csdNUVuafOj2TopcRu5GCwGQ13f92GQauL4Fkkt_dkqudi4DpTt98Exvo2Ke5ZV_iofHgKTSjKDOud_btDoizZdXm3Ztx7mfCMvSSqdp95LTJTrSwzvXoSv3mbg29c0PtR6RQXjHWB3s-tNmkKhBNQkXx7lKn3c6fzYPse8N4w68eQ5p0DOYxR-10oORpM5Gy7yiJvudqGhz_IUHGm2dz6ScaUg6AVw6tnzHEYnZaXboK3YWOs4sIn5_38ioCzpPs8aqNTy_cr8Hi2VckMKgKJZpL9H0kSzMD28bGDdRR0GrLqKmg/4m5/VpzrB3RQQLSOFMUN6s-cLg/h2/h001.v9mbRh3qHoW7XVkCyCd2eHHfwAYAmLnzUby9aWg7KhM)** As DACA continues to face dangerous attacks, we know the time is now to act and to protect people. While communities face [escalating unlawful detentions](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SLdqY4re9NRChJwFnQ0irxvvllaowl6suFh7ySTivWcdGg2ubOs7OQOO53-Mmw7GIBAI-_mHtt7fPfH2w6QRlpHiFjzd0cZ5w0DIY1PPXdxmGkCs5nZMgYkSpvID2Skpdv8uGizVJueREy38xVcGuOmoSdXbZ_MzXQ8SDlxXc3AHd8TGp-0LA-jxbJbJpGojsEaf1iOTBlSfQbueMg6zTwy6TsX87oYIoHoIlw5jAz26FVRq-8I-IhF4Uv1Be6OQ27aj1beYMtM-85elUgJDPdWDksFCiJenS5AdCeMrLyPCnKY0SEaoFc3xRV93oJXO7aJlee92QR2xe5Z_6T9RKw/4m5/VpzrB3RQQLSOFMUN6s-cLg/h3/h001.QSVmaEyHIZQwdzpHWx1rpp_fsdw3f6dNCTvXGtVARaA), attempts to limit access to education, healthcare and more, we must be clear about the legislative solutions. Congress must take action and pass policies that stop the separation of families and the detention of workers who support our communities and economy every day. Let’s be clear Peter, none of us will stop fighting until all of us can live in safety and thrive. And while the DREAM Act will not protect all of us, it is a step in the right direction and a real solution: a pathway to citizenship for millions of people who have lived here most of their lives, contributed to our communities, and strengthened our country. Our members of Congress have a responsibility, and a real pathway, to protect millions. 👉 [**Take action today to demand your Senators support the DREAM Act!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38n-G3vzkCkIlBeC0doULsRCnf2NjP5sx3T-DHcsgSjG7VHOpxYSA5StJv26csdNUVuafOj2TopcRu5GCwGQ13f92GQauL4Fkkt_dkqudi4DpTt98Exvo2Ke5ZV_iofHgKhhL6R9_HvxHJX3LKoXidejqEL76T-p-JW2ki0GmZ4LlHuUJieRq3OeZhL1WNEE_m-qRqEVRtoole6pjuef3tTbKhV86EZ9QpBTnMcCi3kKGbg2qh8NBaGaZsCApPqsS-CEpyUiDiVRi0I2977x_6gIsaCVf3MSPofkydi_huosJhJ9dueAnJ7fcN6NS7pX_IsoRBW3cz5jnQBOc9U3kP8-Pga122qdHTmtC-E4I-C8w/4m5/VpzrB3RQQLSOFMUN6s-cLg/h4/h001.F3bEy-8VefuFMhGKy1UZT-juwYH9SR8rD4_xRy81jNk) In unity, Aria and the UWD team

clean_body: Your Senators need to hear from you today! | | | Peter, 🗣️We Need Permanent Protections Now!! Senators Dick Durbin and Lisa Murkowski just reintroduced the bipartisan DREAM Act - which would create a pathway to citizenship for millions of immigrant young people who call this country home. ⏰This moment demands decisive action from ALL of us,Peter. Immigrant youth joined partners, Senator Durbin (IL) and members of Congress in D.C. to send a clear message: we need a clean, inclusive pathway to citizenship NOW! As DACA continues to face dangerous attacks, we know the time is now to act and to protect people. While communities face , attempts to limit access to education, healthcare and more, we must be clear about the legislative solutions. Congress must take action and pass policies that stop the separation of families and the detention of workers who support our communities and economy every day. Let’s be clear Peter, none of us will stop fighting until all of us can live in safety and thrive. And while the DREAM Act will not protect all of us, it is a step in the right direction and a real solution: a pathway to citizenship for millions of people who have lived here most of their lives, contributed to our communities, and strengthened our country. Our members of Congress have a responsibility, and a real pathway, to protect millions. 👉 In unity, Aria and the UWD team | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
[**I’m asking you to make a donation, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251204-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6278%2E6688874%2ESgoqlw)

Thank you.
Mark

subject: DISCOUNT EXTENSION ALERT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

name: Team Bohannan
subject: All we want for Christmas is…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
🎁🎁🎁🎁

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120621891/586847514/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFkZmE1Yi00ZGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5bGi-beVd5I0pVGmwsQufTBKGxjQedm0xMZUboownAM=)

Peter,

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. name: Steve Mietz
subject: Thanks for standing tall this GivingTREESday.
body:
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
Peter, we did it!
We are all so thrilled here at the League to share that we exceeded our Giving TREESday goal of $100,000 yesterday! [https://www.savetheredwoods.org/what-we-do/our-campaigns/redwood-resilience-fund/] This community came together in a big way for our favorite big trees, with 931 donors giving to support the Redwood Resilience Fund . Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.
There were 2 million acres of old-growth redwood forests before 1850. Today, only 5% remain and we’re working to ensure these trees and many more have a bright future. In a time of uncertainty, change, and challenges, your action gives strength, hope, and tangible resilience to these ancient forests, and all who depend on them.
Our actions today impact the redwood forests of tomorrow, and there’s no limit on the positive change we can create with this powerful community beside us.
Thank you for standing with the League so we can help the redwood forests stand tall for generations to come!

There were 2 million acres of old-growth redwood forests before 1850. Today, only 5% remain and we’re working to ensure these trees and many more have a bright future. In a time of uncertainty, change, and challenges, your action gives strength, hope, and tangible resilience to these ancient forests, and all who depend on them. Our actions today impact the redwood forests of tomorrow, and there’s no limit on the positive change we can create with this powerful community beside us. Thank you for standing with the League so we can help the redwood forests stand tall for generations to come! name: Phil Weiser
subject: I asked, 500+ of you responded →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
Your ideas matter to me.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120622182/586848416/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_OTH_YouResponded_120425&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmJjZWI5Yy00ZWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJibUxqnVOtVmmfbSX447o50tPYNrTW_iY7Z_5BDQpI=&emci=aaa0fe0f-33d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=92bceb9c-4ed1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520) It’s been a busy month at our campaign HQ, friend. Here’s what I’ve been up to this November! 👇
* * *
**NOVEMBER HIGHLIGHTS** From lawsuit wins to public forums to parades, it’s been a very busy November. (And I’ve got the iced tea numbers to prove it.) Check it out:
* * *
**I ASKED, YOU RESPONDED** **Over 500 of you gave me your feedback on the Colorado Blueprint,** our 90+ pages of plans for our state. **And I read every single response.** I want to highlight a few patterns that stood out, and share what I’m adding to the Blueprint based on your suggestions: **Affordability.** Not surprisingly, many of you spoke about affordability as a top concern, with many supporting our policies improving healthcare and housing affordability, as well as expressing appreciation for our focus on working families. I was deeply grateful and humbled by your words about my fight against the grocery store merger and the suggestions for more specific proposals on housing, as well as some specific ideas on that front. We will continue to drill down on those suggestions and prepare to tackle this top priority for both renters and homeowners. **Opportunities for our kids.** his was also top of mind, with many comments on how we can improve K-12 schools and curriculum, recruit and support teachers, and invest in career and technical education for our kids. I am committed to doing just that — I particularly appreciated a suggestion from a Montrose resident on the importance of supporting and collaborating with local school boards. I also was grateful for the support for my ColoradoCorps concept, including from someone who heard me outline the concept in Alamosa and suggested that ColoradoCorp participants should be able to work in forestry, firefighting, and wildfire mitigation work — I agree, and I’ll be updating our plans with that great suggestion. **A resilient Colorado.** I appreciated the comments about the importance of protecting public safety and our land, air, and water. Many called out the importance I placed on protecting Colorado’s water, encouraging steps to support voluntary conservation efforts like xeriscaping (landscaping with little or no water required). Many highlighted the importance of our continued clean energy leadership. Some noted that we should be more clear about the importance of protecting wildlife who are especially vulnerable at highway crossings. **Responding to our shared fears.** From protecting Colorado against the lawless actions from the federal government to supporting young people hurting and searching for purpose, I couldn’t agree more with the comments we received about fears we share. As for the Trump Administration, a central message was to keep protecting Colorado and stand strong for our principles. As for the state of our politics, one person bemoaned the rise of "dark money" and corporate money, wanting Coloradans, not out-of-state interests, to decide elections. Your suggestions are energizing and inspiring. Please keep them coming! **[If this recap has motivated you to share your own thoughts, please send them in through our suggestion box — it’s open 24/7.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120622183/586848417/1591134621?refcode=em_WEI_OTH_YouResponded_120425&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmJjZWI5Yy00ZWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJibUxqnVOtVmmfbSX447o50tPYNrTW_iY7Z_5BDQpI=&emci=aaa0fe0f-33d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=92bceb9c-4ed1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520)** | | [SHARE YOUR IDEAS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120622184/586848418/1591134621?refcode=em_WEI_OTH_YouResponded_120425&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmJjZWI5Yy00ZWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJibUxqnVOtVmmfbSX447o50tPYNrTW_iY7Z_5BDQpI=&emci=aaa0fe0f-33d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=92bceb9c-4ed1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520)
---
* * *
**THE MERCH STORE IS OPEN**
In case you missed it: our merch store is now open! **[Now, you can rep Team Phil wherever you go.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120622185/586848419/-2140001509?refcode=em_WEI_OTH_YouResponded_120425&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmJjZWI5Yy00ZWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJibUxqnVOtVmmfbSX447o50tPYNrTW_iY7Z_5BDQpI=&emci=aaa0fe0f-33d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=92bceb9c-4ed1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520)**
| [CHECK IT OUT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120622186/586848420/-2140001509?refcode=em_WEI_OTH_YouResponded_120425&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmJjZWI5Yy00ZWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJibUxqnVOtVmmfbSX447o50tPYNrTW_iY7Z_5BDQpI=&emci=aaa0fe0f-33d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=92bceb9c-4ed1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520)

Phil

name: The Latino Vote Podcast from The Latino Vote Podcast
subject: The Campaign That Won 68% of the Latino Vote: Lessons from New Jersey's Historic Victory
body:
Chuck and Mike sit down with Dr. Patricia Campos-Medina, the co-chair of Mikie Sherrill's winning gubernatorial campaign, with one of the most dramatic Latino voter shifts in recent history.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..rZbGYbyF80SXI2DudwKoLQzSpORdB3onbVIVZfp2y3M?) for more
---
# [The Campaign That Won 68% of the Latino Vote: Lessons from New Jersey's Historic Victory](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5227558&post_id=180736722&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNzM2NzIyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ4ODAxMjIsImV4cCI6MTc2NzQ3MjEyMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMjc1NTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.y0MVVnJUy_6dd727F9eOMYwH2vBABJ4gi-WTj7oaQ4w)
### Chuck and Mike sit down with Dr. Patricia Campos-Medina, the co-chair of Mikie Sherrill's winning gubernatorial campaign, with one of the most dramatic Latino voter shifts in recent history.
| | [The Latino Vote Podcast](https://substack.com/@thelatinovotepodcast)
---
| Dec 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@thelatinovotepodcast)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5227558&post_id=180736722&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNzM2NzIyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDg4MDEyMiwiZXhwIjoxNzY3NDcyMTIyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNTIyNzU1OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jumiimd-xolpaW_RBubdTHcWP1-QrMfXoIEAXmLQ73M&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5227558&post_id=180736722&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNzM2NzIyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ4ODAxMjIsImV4cCI6MTc2NzQ3MjEyMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMjc1NTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.y0MVVnJUy_6dd727F9eOMYwH2vBABJ4gi-WTj7oaQ4w&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5227558&post_id=180736722&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNzM2NzIyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ4ODAxMjIsImV4cCI6MTc2NzQ3MjEyMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMjc1NTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.y0MVVnJUy_6dd727F9eOMYwH2vBABJ4gi-WTj7oaQ4w)
---
| | [](https://substack..wpzbHNXMRP7X2G55cECVfuffxavoyvTGTKLwQ3vDCbs?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/thelatinovotepodcast/p/the-campaign-that-won-68-of-the-latino?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/285e82fc-4e12-49be-b92e-147fa11184d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### The Problem Was Real
Let's be clear about what Democrats were facing in New Jersey. In 2024, Donald Trump was ahead by **24 points** in some Latino counties. Places like Passaic County--historically Democratic strongholds--were bleeding Latino voters at an alarming rate.
New Jersey Democrats had fallen into a comfortable trap. "We're a blue state," the thinking went. "We just have to tell people Trump is bad." No real outreach. No sustained investment. Just assumptions about loyalty that no longer held.
* * *
### "New Jersey is in an economic crisis - and Latinos are living it every day."
One of the most striking insights Dr. Campos-Medina shares is the depth of economic anxiety among Latino families in New Jersey. Not ideological dissatisfaction. Not culture war fatigue. Real, day-to-day issues.
High rent. High utilities. Shrinking margins for small businesses. And the creeping fear that one economic shock could put a family underwater.
For years, these voters heard Democrats say: _" Trump is bad."_
But they didn't hear Democrats say: _" Here's what we're going to do for you."_
In 2024, that dynamic nearly cost the party the Latino vote entirely.
In 2025, it flipped.
* * *
### The Strategy: Listen First, Invest Second
Dr. Campos-Medina forces a hard truth onto the table: Democrats in New Jersey had been coasting on assumptions for a decade. Latino communities weren't being organized. Consultants weren't being rotated. Field operations weren't culturally grounded.
Her approach was the opposite:
* **Bring in Latino strategists.** Not translators. Not token advisors. _Decision-makers._
* **Rebuild the relationships within the community.**
* **Put real money into field, media, and volunteers** , especially Spanish-language outlets (Univision, Telemundo, YouTube, etc.)
* **Stop talking about Trump.** Start talking about rent, utilities, and business costs.
* **Show up in places Republicans had been quietly building relationships for years.**

It worked.
And it didn't happen by accident.
* * *
### Why New Jersey Is the New Case Study
The shifts we saw in Passaic, Hudson, and Union weren't small. They were historic. As Mike Madrid points out, these are among the _largest_ Latino voting swings in the country.
And they carry a warning.
Latino voters in New Jersey--and everywhere else--are now **fluid**. They are willing to move _toward_ or _away_ from any party depending on who speaks to their interests, who shows up, and who actually delivers.
* * *
_**Don 't forget:**_ Like, subscribe, and share this with every political operative who needs to understand what actually works with Latino voters.

_Follow Dr. Patricia Campos-Medina on her website:[https://patriciacamposmedina.com/](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/113badb8-3a9b-4a60-83c2-f8d557697c41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/113badb8-3a9b-4a60-83c2-f8d557697c41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: Chuck and Mike sit down with Dr. Patricia Campos-Medina, the co-chair of Mikie Sherrill's winning gubernatorial campaign, with one of the most dramatic Latino voter shifts in recent history. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Chuck and Mike sit down with Dr. Patricia Campos-Medina, the co-chair of Mikie Sherrill's winning gubernatorial campaign, with one of the most dramatic Latino voter shifts in recent history. | | | Dec 4 | | | | | | | | | | | | The Problem Was Real Let's be clear about what Democrats were facing in New Jersey. In 2024, Donald Trump was ahead by 24 points in some Latino counties. Places like Passaic County--historically Democratic strongholds--were bleeding Latino voters at an alarming rate. New Jersey Democrats had fallen into a comfortable trap. "We're a blue state," the thinking went. "We just have to tell people Trump is bad." No real outreach. No sustained investment. Just assumptions about loyalty that no longer held. "New Jersey is in an economic crisis - and Latinos are living it every day." One of the most striking insights Dr. Campos-Medina shares is the depth of economic anxiety among Latino families in New Jersey. Not ideological dissatisfaction. Not culture war fatigue. Real, day-to-day issues. High rent. High utilities. Shrinking margins for small businesses. And the creeping fear that one economic shock could put a family underwater. For years, these voters heard Democrats say: " Trump is bad." But they didn't hear Democrats say: " Here's what we're going to do for you." In 2024, that dynamic nearly cost the party the Latino vote entirely. In 2025, it flipped. The Strategy: Listen First, Invest Second Dr. Campos-Medina forces a hard truth onto the table: Democrats in New Jersey had been coasting on assumptions for a decade. Latino communities weren't being organized. Consultants weren't being rotated. Field operations weren't culturally grounded. Her approach was the opposite: Bring in Latino strategists. Not translators. Not token advisors. Decision-makers. Rebuild the relationships within the community. Put real money into field, media, and volunteers , especially Spanish-language outlets (Univision, Telemundo, YouTube, etc.) Stop talking about Trump. Start talking about rent, utilities, and business costs. Show up in places Republicans had been quietly building relationships for years. It worked. And it didn't happen by accident. Why New Jersey Is the New Case Study The shifts we saw in Passaic, Hudson, and Union weren't small. They were historic. As Mike Madrid points out, these are among the largest Latino voting swings in the country. And they carry a warning. Latino voters in New Jersey--and everywhere else--are now fluid. They are willing to move toward or away from any party depending on who speaks to their interests, who shows up, and who actually delivers. Don 't forget:** Like, subscribe, and share this with every political operative who needs to understand what actually works with Latino voters. ? Follow Dr. Patricia Campos-Medina on her website: The Latino Vote Podcast is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Latino Vote Podcast that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 The Latino Vote Podcast 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: LeftNet
subject: The Voting Rights Act is under attack
body:
[1]LeftNet

Voting is the most basic right in our democracy — but far too many people
have been locked out of the process.

Six decades ago, the landmark Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA) was signed
into law, and provided protections for voters, particularly Black voters
who had been excluded from casting a ballot for years under Jim Crow.

Now, voting rights are under attack again. The U.S. Supreme Court's
conservative justices signaled their willingness to undercut another key
section of the Voting Rights Act.

We’ll explain why in just a moment, but if you’re ready to fight back
against the war on voting rights, [ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251204.uPcGqw&refcode=em20251204-1386&t=1001&akid=1386%2E2118727%2E5FADYp ]please split a donation of any amount
today between the Brennan Center, When We All Vote, America Votes, and
Fair Fight Action, who are fighting tooth and nail to defend voting
rights.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251204.uPcGqw&refcode=em20251204-1386&t=1002&akid=1386%2E2118727%2E5FADYp ]DONATE

In the next few months, the Supreme Court is expected to rule in Louisiana
v. Callais, a redistricting case that could weaken Section 2 of the Voting
Rights Act — the part of the law that helps protect communities from maps
that dilute the voting power of Black, Latino, Native, Asian American, and
other minority voters, even when there isn’t a clear “smoking gun” showing
the intent to discriminate.

This matters because district maps shape political power for years at a
time, and they determine whether communities can elect representatives who
reflect their priorities and lived experiences. If Section 2 is narrowed,
it could become a lot harder to challenge maps that diminish minority
voting strength, leaving fewer tools to prevent harmful outcomes from
becoming locked in.

With the 2026 midterms approaching, protecting the Voting Rights Act is
even more essential because the decisions being made now will shape the
playing field for this upcoming election and beyond.

The good news is that people are fighting back. Across the country,
voting-rights advocates and community organizations are building stronger
protections, pushing for reforms, and expanding access where they can. But
the work is difficult, and it will take serious resources to effectively
fight back against the GOP’s fascist attacks on our rights and democracy.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251204.uPcGqw&refcode=em20251204-1386&t=1003&akid=1386%2E2118727%2E5FADYp ]So please, consider chipping in a contribution of any amount today to
be split between voting rights organizations to support the fight to
defend voting rights.

In solidarity,

— LeftNet

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.leftnet.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1386%2E2118727%2E5FADYp

name: Oof
subject: Confirmed: the GOP is seriously effed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
We can finish the job and finally get rid of Boebert this election.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GEcH2g7ei_xwAlyWzpKQ5GDx-_3B3aODuIGGdbLqWWqAtbu-RrUUQPqCCoA68d0aFT1uA2MQo99QpARXSb8Mn9jh2Jjt1yqpq0EUjSDtJbRMGxSfmJ9u5NDgmRheGEenVMOgj91yzqHlTYqnFq0qhj4hTINMYuI3-LJ3IGzcXXiDpSZGgWo0n2ZzYK-mcqTOcDpEURdLQT4otO-b0GF1yRqT194eye8-&c=vNnxS1NocgClwXF8SdU2h1PVKXFQOU_a8zZK7-kLD0103N5JMJzOXg==&ch=DxWCzXI9zme2SzrlXpP7l_hQ3tIYe5gr72OAX-rGebPEQYqAng5oOg==)
---
|

Peter,
Republicans are freaking out after the Tennessee special election. Here's why:
If turnout had been super low, and if Republican voters stayed home while mostly Democrats showed up, the GOP would be feeling good and sleeping well after the election.
But they aren't--they're waking up in a cold sweat, blaming Speaker Mike Johnson's poor leadership for placing them on the edge of disaster.
Turnout was actually very high in the TN-07 special election -- at Midterm participation levels. Both Republican and Democratic voters showed up, and the GOP still only won by 9 points in a district that Trump won by 22% last year:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GEcH2g7ei_xwAlyWzpKQ5GDx-_3B3aODuIGGdbLqWWqAtbu-RrUUQPqCCoA68d0aFT1uA2MQo99QpARXSb8Mn9jh2Jjt1yqpq0EUjSDtJbRMGxSfmJ9u5NDgmRheGEenVMOgj91yzqHlTYqnFq0qhj4hTINMYuI3-LJ3IGzcXXiDpSZGgWo0n2ZzYK-mcqTOcDpEURdLQT6Yu07fp0Kup-xyKLE7gWEI&c=vNnxS1NocgClwXF8SdU2h1PVKXFQOU_a8zZK7-kLD0103N5JMJzOXg==&ch=DxWCzXI9zme2SzrlXpP7l_hQ3tIYe5gr72OAX-rGebPEQYqAng5oOg==)
---
The GOP is seriously effed.
All the signs are there: we can finish the job and finally get rid of Lauren Boebert this election.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a mere 546 votes. In 2024 when Trump was on the ballot, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese had the single best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
[A 13 point swing toward Democrats would easily defeat Boebert and it can happen if we work for it. Can you help this team get out the vote to flip this district and beat Boebert for good by making a donation of $25, $50 or whatever fits your budget right now?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GEcH2g7ei_xwAlyWzpKQ5GDx-_3B3aODuIGGdbLqWWqAtbu-RrUUQPqCCoA68d0aveSysu9jx644BW--90CkiLBJzuK4BiQV_KEojG0xww2A5MteThbgekpoUDdnjPHDAH-yzjpRDJmQp-DRfnrLwmdRzp7sAWg3pn-5bpU1P-ipPeYm43FMYGyboHaQavHzGBg3E8M1D7JTC7LaRb-E6QdWH7lKY_LAMSUB9SV2udc=&c=vNnxS1NocgClwXF8SdU2h1PVKXFQOU_a8zZK7-kLD0103N5JMJzOXg==&ch=DxWCzXI9zme2SzrlXpP7l_hQ3tIYe5gr72OAX-rGebPEQYqAng5oOg==)

Peter,
Republicans are freaking out after the Tennessee special election. Here's why:
If turnout had been super low, and if Republican voters stayed home while mostly Democrats showed up, the GOP would be feeling good and sleeping well after the election.
But they aren't--they're waking up in a cold sweat, blaming Speaker Mike Johnson's poor leadership for placing them on the edge of disaster.
Turnout was actually very high in the TN-07 special election -- at Midterm participation levels. Both Republican and Democratic voters showed up, and the GOP still only won by 9 points in a district that Trump won by 22% last year:

The GOP is seriously effed.
All the signs are there: we can finish the job and finally get rid of Lauren Boebert this election.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a mere 546 votes. In 2024 when Trump was on the ballot, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese had the single best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
[A 13 point swing toward Democrats would easily defeat Boebert and it can happen if we work for it. name: Janelle Bynum
subject: I’m proud of my record
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120622785/586850531/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTRkNzViMWUtNTFkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Hk34XSgPo58Qy1_2-FKgC_2hobllOuKRWSOpsO8b6ck=) There’s officially less than a year to go until the election, and the attacks have already started. For months now, National Republicans have targeted me with misleading political attacks in an attempt to blame me for their failed leadership in Washington. But no matter what attacks they throw our way, **I’m proud of my record serving Oregon’s 5th District in Congress.** I’m proud of my record of putting Oregonians first and fighting to lower costs, protect affordable and accessible healthcare, and keep our communities and families safe. I’m proud of my record of delivering real results to help our communities thrive by passing three bipartisan bills in the House to support small businesses and power our local economies. And I’m proud of my record of pushing back on the Trump administration’s reckless agenda, that puts working families in harm’s way, and working to ensure Oregonians’ voices are heard in Washington. **I’m proud of my record, and I’m determined to keep building on this progress and continue fighting for a brighter future for Oregon families every single day.** [_**If that’s a mission you believe in, will you make a donation today to support my re-election campaign? clean_body: = There’s officially less than a year to go until the election, and the attacks have already started. For months now, National Republicans have targeted me with misleading political attacks in an attempt to blame me for their failed leadership in Washington. But no matter what attacks they throw our way, I’m proud of my record serving Oregon’s 5th District in Congress. I’m proud of my record of putting Oregonians first and fighting to lower costs, protect affordable and accessible healthcare, and keep our communities and families safe. I’m proud of my record of delivering real results to help our communities thrive by passing three bipartisan bills in the House to support small businesses and power our local economies. And I’m proud of my record of pushing back on the Trump administration’s reckless agenda, that puts working families in harm’s way, and working to ensure Oregonians’ voices are heard in Washington. I’m proud of my record, and I’m determined to keep building on this progress and continue fighting for a brighter future for Oregon families every single day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120622814/586850647/1972407494?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Defense_251204_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2Q3NWIxZS01MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VFegsBnUU-HOZw7f3ttt8yQMMfHRO-5NalwDlXrHvf8=) I won’t mince words, Derek. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120622863/586850841/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_VIP_AC_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDkzZmFjNTItNTFkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EmtOUeea07jIMBj3EBcxlppO9dV6YWajpB3F8YueyvA=)
---
Folks, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: [**Split a donation between AZ Dems and me. Adding your name will only take a few seconds, but it helps a ton – grassroots endorsements are a critical part of our strategy.

Here's why: Right now, we're statistically tied with our Republican opponent among independent voters. But we can pull ahead if everyone can see the power of this movement and the thousands of people who stand with Haley.
[**We need 5,000 endorsements by midnight. Will you be one of them, null?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9472?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1488%2E49239%2E5PEBeo)

Team Haley

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9472?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1488%2E49239%2E5PEBeo) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9471?t=8&akid=1488%2E49239%2E5PEBeo)

Haley

This is our final chance to flip the House blue

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623162/586851345/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNiNjBmOS01MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YR2iKQ5JU10hEZfVNZdbfAUxHJrFBJ_rSnaiWLimcFI=) Hey, it's Andrea. [_**I’ll be blunt: We're losing steam. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623163/586851346/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_120425_giveup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNiNjBmOS01MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YR2iKQ5JU10hEZfVNZdbfAUxHJrFBJ_rSnaiWLimcFI=) Our final 2025 fundraising deadline is less than a month away, and we're falling significantly behind goal. [_**A Democratic House majority is our only defence against Trump and his MAGA agenda — which means it’s critical we have the funds to defend every seat (even Democratic strongholds like OR-06). Because if we fail, our chance to rebuild our country disappears. Can we count on you to chip in $6 to help us catch up?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623164/586851347/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_120425_giveup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNiNjBmOS01MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YR2iKQ5JU10hEZfVNZdbfAUxHJrFBJ_rSnaiWLimcFI=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623165/586851348/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_120425_giveup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNiNjBmOS01MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YR2iKQ5JU10hEZfVNZdbfAUxHJrFBJ_rSnaiWLimcFI=)

I don’t want to alarm you, but Republicans think we’ve already given up.
[**Donald Trump just raised $1.9 BILLION, and his team is now claiming the 2026 midterms “are already paid for.”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623166/586851349/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_120425_giveup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNiNjBmOS01MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YR2iKQ5JU10hEZfVNZdbfAUxHJrFBJ_rSnaiWLimcFI=)
They’re counting on us to give up.
I know supporters like you aren’t ready to throw in the towel — especially not with so much on the line. [**Our momentum this month is our final chance before we enter the midterm year to show Republicans how fed up we are and show that we are NOT giving up. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623167/586851350/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_120425_giveup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNiNjBmOS01MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YR2iKQ5JU10hEZfVNZdbfAUxHJrFBJ_rSnaiWLimcFI=)
[_**So please: If you’re with me in this fight, I am humbly asking for your support. Will you chip in $6 and help me keep standing up to Donald Trump and his MAGA majority, reclaim the House Majority, and join me in fighting for a better future for our country by flipping the House for Democrats? **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623168/586851351/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_120425_giveup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNiNjBmOS01MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YR2iKQ5JU10hEZfVNZdbfAUxHJrFBJ_rSnaiWLimcFI=)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s maneuvers are a threat to this country
body:
None of this is normal.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)
Peter — Despite decades of evidence to the contrary, Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is still peddling the malicious fabrication that childhood vaccines cause autism. **Let me be clear: Over and over, expert research has found that there is no connection between vaccines and autism.** But Kennedy’s anti-science conspiracy theories are now reflected across the federal government, including on the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) web page on autism and vaccines. The web page header still specifies that vaccines do not cause autism — but with an asterisk: [](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Vaccines/?source=em_RC_PET_RRVaccines_120425&t=7&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj) Look, Kennedy is no expert. He is not a medical professional. He is not a researcher. **He is bent on power and influence — and he’s decided that being the central figure of the anti-vaccine conspiracy movement is how he’ll get it.** I’m calling it like I see it. It is the government’s duty to protect the people, but **Kennedy’s actions are a direct threat to the health of our families and our communities.** **[I need you to stand with me now. Add your name to demand that the federal government protect and encourage access to vaccines and stop peddling conspiracy theories around autism.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Vaccines/?source=em_RC_PET_RRVaccines_120425&t=8&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)** | [SIGN ON](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Vaccines/?source=em_RC_PET_RRVaccines_120425&t=9&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)
---
Thanks to the Trump Administration’s anti-science ideology, the vaccine panel that is supposed to keep American families safe is set to make it harder for parents to get their children the vaccines they need to stay healthy.
Under President Trump and Kennedy, the facts don’t matter. All that matters is spreading conspiracy theories — _lies_ — designed to further their dangerous agenda.
We have to stop them.
**[Join me and call for our federal government to stop with the ideological lies and to protect vaccines — and our people.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Vaccines/?source=em_RC_PET_RRVaccines_120425&t=10&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)**
Thanks for speaking out,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Vaccines/?source=em_RC_PET_RRVaccines_120425&t=11&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=12&akid=99%2E124072%2E6ufWxj)

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. ** mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible. The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. subject: Hegseth must resign. Sign on:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623373/586852197/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGZkYzdkZDctNTNkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqoMr5cXVD0pGX4v8TVkDE00X4EUUePVn6-35Dha7mc=)
Let me be clear: Pete Hegseth has no business serving as Secretary of Defense. He’s under bipartisan fire for overseeing a “double-tap” military strike that killed survivors clinging to wreckage in international waters. And now, instead of owning up to it, he’s dodging questions, calling the reports “fake news,” and trying to shift blame onto the very officers following his orders. That’s not leadership. That’s dangerous. **I’ve questioned Hegseth under oath before -- when he deployed federal troops without cause. And I’m willing to do it again over this disgraceful and unlawful strike.** **[I need your support in demanding accountability: Sign onto my petition demanding Hegseth resign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623374/586852198/286511556?refcode=em-12.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGZkYzdkZDctNTNkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqoMr5cXVD0pGX4v8TVkDE00X4EUUePVn6-35Dha7mc=&emci=6f9961d1-53d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8fdc7dd7-53d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=27336212)** | **[Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120623375/586852199/286511556?refcode=em-12.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGZkYzdkZDctNTNkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqoMr5cXVD0pGX4v8TVkDE00X4EUUePVn6-35Dha7mc=&emci=6f9961d1-53d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8fdc7dd7-53d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=27336212)**
---
No one is above accountability -- especially not the person in charge of our armed forces. This is not just about one man. It’s about the kind of country we are, and what we stand for.
We can’t stay silent.
-Derek

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: update: The FBI is coming after us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2385%2E135344%2E0Y0OWH)

**Bloomberg News** : _“FBI headquarters is pressuring the bureau’s domestic terrorism agents to open a seditious conspiracy investigation into six Democratic lawmakers”_
* * *
Let's be straight about what’s happening.
The President is directing the FBI to target us because we made a video he didn't like.
He called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court-martial. And now, it appears, they are pressuring the FBI to bring charges.
In any other Administration, this type of legal harassment to target political opponents would be considered totally out of bounds.
But President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him -- which is why we made this video in the first place.
But these kinds of tactics won’t work. And neither will the wave of death threats, bomb threats, and intimidation he has unleashed.
I have always worked to be upfront in these emails. This latest news from the FBI takes our need for a legal strategy to the next level. We do not know exactly where the Department of Justice will take this inquiry.
[**So, sadly: any contribution you can make now will be put to work immediately to provide the resources to fight back. No donation is too small — it does add up fast.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct25.P8-T7T&refcode=em251204&t=2&akid=2385%2E135344%2E0Y0OWH)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Elissa Slotkin

body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
There’s no other way to put it, team:

Donald Trump is trying to silence and intimidate Jason because he's standing up against this corrupt administration to fight for working people and defend the rule of law.

But no matter what, Jason will never stop fighting for our democracy, and for you .

That’s why Jason wants to hear from you: Will you take our 2026 Opinion Survey? It will only take a few minutes, but makes a big difference to our team. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/122025-survey]

Team Crow

name: Team Taylor
subject: What if we told you this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251204-882&t=1&akid=882%2E294397%2E5wBEWU)
Folks,
What if we told you that just **_four quarters_** could stop right-wing special interests from buying a seat on Wisconsin’s highest court?
Last April, right-wing groups spent $54 million trying to elect an extreme candidate, and they lost.
Now, they could target our campaign, but we have something that can’t be bought: **Grassroots momentum** — thousands of people who are determined to secure our progressive majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
And when one person on our team pitches in $1, someone else joins them. And then another. Maybe that includes you.
Together, we create a chain reaction of support strong enough to defeat our extreme opponent and elect Judge Chris Taylor.
[**With that in mind, will you start that chain reaction today with a donation of $1 or more?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/154?c0=em_ms_jct_20251204_1_ak.kb9MIZ&refcode=em20251204-882&t=2&akid=882%2E294397%2E5wBEWU)

Team Taylor
