name: AOC
subject: An announcement from Ayanna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Ayanna plans to continue holding the line against this hostile White House.
#
I wanted to reach out to you directly to share an update about my sister in service, Ayanna Pressley.
Ayanna’s district — Massachusetts’ 7th — is squarely in the crosshairs of the Trump White House. The fear and trauma felt in so many of our communities across the country right now is all too real.
So that’s why **Ayanna has resolved to continue fighting for her district.**
I’m proud to share that **Ayanna is running for re-election to the House of Representatives in 2026.** Her work, and the movement she has inspired, is organizing not only for an election — but with an eye on generations to come.
[ Will you split a $5 contribution today between our campaigns — $2.50 for each of our teams — to kick off the next phase of Ayanna’s work with the strongest possible momentum so we can keep her fighting in the House?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251204-ap.wxkWUR&refcode=em20251204-10327-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251204-ap.wxkWUR&refcode=em20251204-10327-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS)**
In this next term, Ayanna plans to continue standing in the gap and holding the line against this hostile White House. That means:
* Fighting back against the White House’s attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, Black and brown folks, federal workers, and our immigrant neighbors.
* Continuing to use her committee roles to conduct oversight and make progress on everything from housing affordability, AI and crypto oversight, to accountability for survivors of Epstein’s abuse.
* Leading the Reproductive Freedom Caucus to protect and expand abortion access with a House majority.
* Continuing to advance bold, comprehensive policies that meet the moment and address the affordability crisis — like lowering the cost of housing, investing in affordable childcare, ending the pushout of Black women from the workforce, closing the racial wealth gap, and more.

These are not simply “nice-to-haves” — **these are _must-haves_ for working people across Massachusetts and the country.**
Now more than ever, we must dig deep, lean into mutual aid, and use every tool available to stand in the gap in defense of our neighbors and our democracy.
That’s exactly what Ayanna and I will do — and we’re going to keep powering our work with small-dollar, grassroots support from everyday people, not corporations.
[ So if you can today, please split a donation to support our campaigns to help kick off Ayanna’s fight for bold action and transformative policies in Massachusetts and across the country.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251204-ap.wxkWUR&refcode=em20251204-10327-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS)
Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with us. Thank you for everything.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251204-ap?refcode=em20251204-10327-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=10327_2526796_YbxnfS&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251204-10327-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=10327%2E2526796%2EYbxnfS)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Powered by People
subject: First Tennessee, now Texas.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We can flip a seat in Texas on January 31st but we need your help to make
it happen.

Democrat Taylor Rehmet has forced a runoff election in Senate District 9.
He’s a union leader, veteran, and working-class Texan through and through.
He grew up in the district, lives the values of hard work and community,
and understands the issues that matter to everyday Texans.

Last year, Trump won this district by more than 17 points. But last month,
Taylor finished in first place with 48% of the vote and is heading to a
runoff.

This moment is part of a bigger swing happening across the country. Just
look at the recent special congressional election in Tennessee: while
Republicans ultimately held the seat, it was a single-digit margin in a
district that Trump won by 22 points last year. Democrats are gaining
ground. Momentum is on our side. But we have to keep organizing.

Senate District 9 includes parts of Tarrant County, which Beto won in 2018
before it flipped back red last year. Winning here isn’t just about one
seat—it’s about building a democratic foothold and showing that we have
momentum in Texas. We’re on the ground, organizing in communities across
the state, and registering and educating voters so candidates like Taylor
Rehmet can win. But we can’t do it alone.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251204.7RCh7y&refcode=ema20251204-240503&t=1002&akid=240503%2E444211%2EUfnn22 ]Will you chip in $3 today to Powered by People so we can
continue organizing throughout the state and turn these opportunities into
victories?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251204.7RCh7y&refcode=ema20251204-240503&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=240503%2E444211%2EUfnn22 ]DONATE $3

Let’s build the power we need to win—together.

Thank you,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=240503%2E444211%2EUfnn22

Katie Porter (D): 11%
Steve Hilton (R): 12%
Chad Bianco (R): 13%
We need to step up _right now_ to make sure Republicans don’t flip California red: **[Rush a $5 donation right now to help Katie win>>](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251204_1_ak.zL9a9U&refcode=em20251204-40526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40526%2E3422442%2EX2j2Zy)**

name: Charles Booker
subject: A big announcement from me:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for the Commonwealth
body:
The era of Mitch McConnell is over. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.GUR5GRy6uM46EnL-euyBoI4Zenr_7hh7vN6K-IfKMtD-I2GkRRwi4quoQm40rgPfHG9bzmnTje5RD2Zl1cZFjRfKrdkFzd8nyqA6sK8KCrlr2tOKthJ9t19zeDClClkK2zPEID7b3pc7z_7BVOU342XiVTRKQSmjQeL4n7EqUCPAXnhSD1n5tXx0UJmcp-MhQfFBKor5fYvs3QbSbfAWDvb8PblnbXzzDSrG0Mf3I4_dTHucHkxTahWl05QxEBB3Y_1Bp8zmikYLhcjwkQYkNA/4m5/zamk9qERSLCHONTVQF_mEA/h0/h001.5pxGpaKSCLJbReN0olcZUQjgFVpYe0biM-2RQeo6-tI) Peter, I wanted you to hear this from me: **I’m officially launching my campaign to represent Kentucky in the U.S. Senate.** The era of Mitch McConnell is over. Kentucky has the opportunity to turn a new page. We no longer have to accept that this is just the way things are. We can dream big. I’m not willing to settle for politicians who are bought by corporate interests looking for one more senator to serve them. The future is ours. Imagine how much better life would be with:
* Medicare for All and universal child care so that getting by isn’t so damn hard.
* Housing you can live in and afford, without being crushed by utility bills.
* A fresh deal for working people: **40 for 40** — a minimum wage of $40,000 a year for everyone who puts in a 40-hour work week — a guarantee to live a life with dignity.

And if these big money politicians keep crushing working families and refusing to make any meaningful change, we can shut it all down. I mean that — I’m ready to organize for a general strike. Because we know how to use the power of the people. **[If you believe that this is the type of campaign Democrats should be running, add your name to help show broad support for our bold vision. In order to win, we’re going to need to demonstrate widespread, public support for this campaign.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39MQ6Jh9XzX_QnC-KWhWTVS3tBpOW5UaIs1TLyJSVJk2zSPuQGwKEX7K3777yGpb6PbIOUmpc89kLKlp-z0CB7MkRWWJqW_8kP9h4XPg0ffM_scNS5Tqc2O5o0j7HeC0cVSOGV9BwYRvAyS9qieIpxgNpE7EUgd_jim0xOtef64JXxiERGANuymAhomPRXmvAv-Sz6EtRvw3MSpEuqOvouRN8c9XgdtcSVDSj-1Ms2wizyKnnfmuVNe1QXcEMPil2X4A7shvMLr9Mm64tGyBtrzWKqGY0Ubz_d5_sXu5aA20GCHMmqSQknAhTKUnWA1JTcheTqPpKYYHE8IsullmzNp/4m5/zamk9qERSLCHONTVQF_mEA/h1/h001.pmZyj-egIYNAoLTNV6-vZiYsqAHq-sAxTnpwsF79QhA)** You may be thinking: Could a campaign like ours really win in Kentucky? My answer is **100%, without a doubt, yes.** Trump is instilling fear to divide us so we don’t notice we’re being robbed by greedy politicians and corporations. But guess what? We’ve noticed. Voters across the country sent a loud message on Election Day this year that cannot be ignored: They want leaders who aren’t afraid to put up a fight and will actually try to make life more affordable. We not only have what it takes to become the Democratic nominee. We have what it takes to build a strong movement across the Commonwealth — uniting Kentuckians across race, religion, and class — in order to demand better from our government and send a true fighter for us to the Senate. Through faith, I know something greater is possible for us — even when we’re told it’s not. I need you to keep believing that something greater is possible, too. **[Add your name to show that you endorse a Democrat fighting for bold changes like Medicare for All, organizing a general strike, and affordable housing. Every signature will send a powerful message about our movement’s strength.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39MQ6Jh9XzX_QnC-KWhWTVS3tBpOW5UaIs1TLyJSVJk2zSPuQGwKEX7K3777yGpb6PbIOUmpc89kLKlp-z0CB7MkRWWJqW_8kP9h4XPg0ffM_JiXYog3NMY5JR3N6dVeMY-MoKTFUeIonQZjXwJspq1xC9LPoapt5hUqUnDY2IyhdfXPzXJTYCiRHOh8Hcn05h1HCfXoZVthWIfCeJeDjkz7uulFKaNn_CEvVTi_WA4l-HVGoEnUNaEEKZE9UmbEqAT7_KuJgaVEq9s0YtiEBWFxljNXnosnIIPciUzNNIBe1fzs9D3Tb3iEKryctj1ctBR_KEH6HPKHwG_nnjzHd5B/4m5/zamk9qERSLCHONTVQF_mEA/h2/h001.8Ve_AQch8H7Ka_pUth5b5pSFBPajno7yCvBTQet8358) ** In solidarity, Charles [**DONATE**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtrxiKjLCxJOFhn8y1ZGmzwe9OExi13UbAV6A4ZMcT9V27Ygt09Umdv-C20aTpt2q4LVkhnggQSq9xJ5WxUXpOryRHMNeH38JUHaSHXxNdcuSLPbDAuT11rbt2a4b--lJeu2DFK1bHHJv_dqh19IjKiWeEB5zCg_2z-0euGpZ5Woh3n4r0tYKkGhagm_kqXzM-GwDwdAbBjaXQf4DG1XBeTQSa_9cndYOd2Nhv4RCacrl5y8uA_A6H5pfvVH2Y2BuMqsMKHtvDLKVO_SZuc49IRZARYr8IRyITYzleJFtz3NCO03vWRZRl-Dykws0zb80bW0w9FVA3DMEKMbEDA4lHwRpzQj8G5YU6dUu8HbOCU89cEcldLatTiNRQf5ISqJdY/4m5/zamk9qERSLCHONTVQF_mEA/h3/h001.Y7MAsNbFC5iNLiQJ-rBhMchLikKW0yoYPrNx0ZJ23xM) | **Booker for the Commonwealth**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.

| Peter,

If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress.

All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.

If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter.

I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.

There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.

If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.

And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:

[_**Split a donation between Linda Sánchez and me. It would mean a lot.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120625311/586858609/-116832807?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-12-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjI4MTBmYy01N2QxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eFu0WeQAILPi16Aea960thdSH1xrBq8dDVrt_uJpglc=)

clean_body: It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. | Peter, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Mark * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. Fellow Patriot,

When President Trump announced he was _canceling any Biden-era orders that were never personally signed_ , it sent shockwaves through Washington.

**[I posted a video about it that has now reached tens of thousands of Americans, because the message resonated:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3fe9cccefdcb4874b6a3178b38f6a5fc&_e=cdELwbCqCaCkwB4T71ZhwgJVR8ArEsY2hRchMiJcShEe7I7r3sZrdqywB8mGjHjABZRFUQx8p55cyI_w6bfPWPkdINfIiuSuLTwH-rRix5DKxNu5fi380G8aEbWi0HfjEfi8gABSgdkUPMo_JVfxygwAiF3VkFx4KewSvCVY3FAPzaSI_xLLaUpsd8YOJ2wHkxyIzPuAxXankumA_AaiI7wZFtHdrCUH8i_2th7M-7fpX5Ni2-9D4jHhv2Z4MDIBV8EljaL3a6wVvUPNNW7A8nvmjxL1R6ML_2-iJR2UsDZBO71jkVSsNFg1NO9XELYL3a37gXVChf3v-eXLoGQgY68dCFFJ7zsbOThuNdpqV-HDKp_PQAnKApglLqQBp3d_JS3QPMP4XyeKzNBaithg0ms6Te7-DFfst6tyzcidVnRp60vG-hDjsKgFmkPRHRvI4fLnx7lXRnWO7y5S5Arv8hsV3bRctLSrQJkB3DtCUOosYuPPWQdto_xjyXcYTfEpNV7nOTzGyGJmDRJtXEhGcg0D61r0Nk0sJsr4Dxq_bo8rw1LfyFGtDBlQOMNyKNNGShqZv9ZzTjpALiuQyyT6ARV157Le0PK9QrvO2141z6BqFFw2NJMM2DAtjyegOwsn5DxOoe-BRSTqMQQZsZx1TWgB9wfVjGSWk5Cao2_2RnE%3D)**

**The power of the pen is the power of accountability. And for four years, the Biden Administration treated it like an afterthought.**

As Sheriff, I signed every document myself - because the people who elected me deserved nothing less. But under Biden, **92% of his actions were pushed through by autopen or anonymous staff in the dark.**

No transparency.
No oversight.
No accountability.

President Trump is restoring that basic standard of leadership. And when I'm elected to Congress, I'll do the same: **End the era of bureaucrats running the country from the shadows, and return power where it belongs - with the American people.**

This race is about something bigger than politics. It's about restoring trust in institutions that have forgotten that they work for us.

This campaign is fueled by patriots - folks who believe in God, Family, and Freedom, and want leaders who actually take responsibility for their signature, their decisions, and their word.

**Fellow Patriot, if you believe Washington needs a course correction, I need you on my team. Chip in and help me take this fight straight to Congress.**

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Trump is profiting while Americans suffer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
The Trump regime has been a disaster for Americans, Peter. They have kicked millions off their health care, allowed millions to go hungry, and raised costs for families all across the country. But if you’re wondering how this regime has worked out for Trump _personally,_ take a look at this: **Donald Trump has made close to $2 billion since he won the 2024 presidential election.** We have a President of the United States who doesn’t give a rip about lowering costs for Americans or protecting people’s benefits. He wakes up every morning thinking about how he can use the office of the President to enrich himself. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I wanted to inform you of some news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter - I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later.
I've come to truly appreciate your consistent record.
With everything you've given to our movement, there was no question in my mind that I needed to send you this message ASAP.
I'd hate to see this opportunity pass you by.
That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency!

1. **THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you!**
2. **You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy?**

I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to upgrade today with this limited time offer!

That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency! 1. THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you! 2. You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy? I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to upgrade today with this limited time offer! Peter,
Last night I joined Anderson Cooper to discuss Donald Trump and his attacks on our Somali community here in Minnesota.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120625978/586860537/1023956617?refcode=image&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2ZmZWFkMi01OWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-FTGPch0EQkEx0WSAQkiAG0ubkApazGzkBbAVNWBDBo=)
I made it clear that the vile language Donald Trump is directing at American citizens is only greenlighting more harassment and abuse.
In Minnesota, we know that our Somali neighbors are part of the fabric of our communities. While Trump is hurling racist threats, we’re going to stand with our neighbors.
**But this is just the beginning.** We know that Trump is going to continue to attack our state. As the People’s Lawyer, I’ve stood up for Minnesota every time Trump has come after us, and that’s not going to stop now.
**I need folks across Minnesota to stand with me as we fight back against Donald Trump and make sure he knows that we will not stand for his racism, hatred, and abuse.**

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: We need just 4 more signers to force a vote on healthcare affordability in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Add your name now to demand a vote in the House to renew the enhanced ACA premium tax credits. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWIP7ZMPbm4UalOFcKTXzWqkgLvjWV-5XOIq8kqZ508s4SpXN2KN-IWmlULw-xzBuc1ZKpDOuSr1w5PrBMll0OUnzDCbi3G1-6FL5t3LWs0zoFRLxH4lnXnhfXclhdSu1x8f2Nb1y1Gek2jRI47_t_NT1Y_wgrWrbgpGW_PO1KDQehHAQhJxFl0R6OnRtDrdgRh6PrA_ltpBHH5_BwedrDZAH-kp8ndceY10pDVvyWFLJvhs27eC6kgNmUC8uZotAeF31jx--B_FCVaEEZYLU1Ccw7xgUN3GqLVfKk18woLJo/4m5/E9ur-zy5S3yYxcinbg5veQ/h0/h001.OpcdNnxuRttnw1v-9256Z-98D2BhC1mhV5lWZ-WTwBs)
---
Friend, Enhanced Affordable Care Act subsidies have been keeping healthcare more affordable for tens of millions of people. And with these subsidies, people living below the federal poverty line of $15,650 are able to access silver-level health insurance plans with $0 monthly premiums. **But these subsidies are about to go away unless Congress acts.** **That’s why I’ve signed a discharge petition to try and force a vote in the House on a renewal of these ACA tax credits.** 214 of my colleagues have signed, meaning we need only 4 more signatures to force Speaker Johnson to hold a vote. With open enrollment ending December 15 for a January 1 health insurance start date (and January 15 for a February start date), the time for Congress to act is NOW. [**Add your name to demand an immediate vote in the House to renew the enhanced ACA premium tax credits—and help keep health insurance affordable for tens of millions of Americans.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_l-QHkeYbLj4BCEVAID66qpb_LbOW1F4QnFEKCZACNr9qYQWB3dnMsK3SQsi4-jwNiUIZf-0m1t_X9Hw-uf1tcwX2Ptes9ZdxH9WW3VNaXKkcA853Ye2nI31DEiZlxsPjFSADgrdfGTbMJVZl0p-jVKnxJLsTRyXcdJsBI4tKe-LauX_oi0w4hdIkWfC8vJ3qxK-6yMBylfhyWZ3dzuIkkWIFuFRnTeQSiDJ--_uvikj6VWJl7X-lw8aPpPlzWuG4vmHA5G1q8zqcuAnqPu1QEmDra7zQtIAUKqMDMfHBTKukz-LN4eDrfs15E36zeI1mY1l0hwD_I-dihgjWs207ohunkbUDXFs2RhG-enbixNYTfctAjeSuXJKFghwBnXLzsvTW5PK7sUwT5yxyeAPhxvL0LD596oPp4cqtC20OTGbqIqAoejh6mkVtxitZAWEVn-gJ7RqObg79lrvTGLIHr/4m5/E9ur-zy5S3yYxcinbg5veQ/h1/h001.l431XZEC7sxuBUxTHGmzM0mDp9BehhhWb8bdvC-6B4U) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_l-QHkeYbLj4BCEVAID66qpb_LbOW1F4QnFEKCZACNr9qYQWB3dnMsK3SQsi4-jwNiUIZf-0m1t_X9Hw-uf1tczDcRaOz5DTlQQ7KgYw9dNFqG3ZTVTAnSULvE2AtX4cT-UzKSNk-mQdLjHavlEIf-hPWJv-6492WPD24jWi08DYRekI4mCO3NVoQ8SBLZsdOC3VZAe8zaaZ-jG-U2uZdzjr0ZNdFmrR3amPAPfFu8pHGCRw_6XKrInR6TzbfMNnkW-BrmOnEFSvU8MzswUXe7stwNFHq0jB1ajvLEfftkXTGpG8bC48qqluS_d_q7Au5xtKwiNi15dzxe6naV2tsw5MVEOSmPSmse1sPfjUQlnf_M1oiESHgoXUUSstkvcKcbYKAcnL7s71WcXKCOsmdL-Dr5J7rvZrRrJDcpXEU7aG4RJW3a8adlupBF3T7TWJnn0x4zyTeXVUqZdjOiZ7h9/4m5/E9ur-zy5S3yYxcinbg5veQ/h2/h001.EI_mEy8hNUTAchsl764D9XGMHijgb6uYzVcpQy40W7U)
---
In the Senate, a vote is expected next week. But no such promise exists in the House. We need just a handful of my Republican colleagues to join Democrats in forcing a vote.
If no vote is taken, these subsidies will expire on December 31st, and the out-of-pocket health insurance costs for tens of millions of people will more than double.
Already, people are seeing their costs increase during the current enrollment period, which is discouraging many Americans from signing up for health insurance. Because of Congress’ inaction on this, some insurance companies have pulled out of the Affordable Care Act marketplace.
Clearly, our for-profit healthcare system isn’t working. While I will continue fighting for Medicare for All to ensure healthcare as a human right, this vote is critical right now.
Twenty-four million people get their healthcare through the ACA exchange. Over 90% use these tax credits to keep healthcare more affordable. If these tax credits are allowed to expire, millions will have to make impossible decisions between keeping their health insurance and affording other necessities such as food and housing.
Millions will be forced to go without health insurance altogether.

clean_body: Add your name now to demand a vote in the House to renew the enhanced ACA premium tax credits. | | | Friend, Enhanced Affordable Care Act subsidies have been keeping healthcare more affordable for tens of millions of people. And with these subsidies, people living below the federal poverty line of $15,650 are able to access silver-level health insurance plans with $0 monthly premiums. But these subsidies are about to go away unless Congress acts. That’s why I’ve signed a discharge petition to try and force a vote in the House on a renewal of these ACA tax credits. 214 of my colleagues have signed, meaning we need only 4 more signatures to force Speaker Johnson to hold a vote. With open enrollment ending December 15 for a January 1 health insurance start date (and January 15 for a February start date), the time for Congress to act is NOW. | In the Senate, a vote is expected next week. But no such promise exists in the House. We need just a handful of my Republican colleagues to join Democrats in forcing a vote. If no vote is taken, these subsidies will expire on December 31st, and the out-of-pocket health insurance costs for tens of millions of people will more than double. Already, people are seeing their costs increase during the current enrollment period, which is discouraging many Americans from signing up for health insurance. Because of Congress’ inaction on this, some insurance companies have pulled out of the Affordable Care Act marketplace. Clearly, our for-profit healthcare system isn’t working. While I will continue fighting for Medicare for All to ensure healthcare as a human right, this vote is critical right now. Twenty-four million people get their healthcare through the ACA exchange. Over 90% use these tax credits to keep healthcare more affordable. If these tax credits are allowed to expire, millions will have to make impossible decisions between keeping their health insurance and affording other necessities such as food and housing. Millions will be forced to go without health insurance altogether. Together, we will not stop fighting for the human right to healthcare. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

It wasn’t a battle.
It was a blackout.

Ukraine wiped out 41 Russian aircraft in a single strike—before most even left the ground.

The secret?
**“Drones are the future of warfare. Manned aircraft are not.”**
— _Elon Musk_
[Except this was more than drones.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=39f2398aa7304ed391816cd1044003ce&_e=lHxCgo_gW6OSbw9nCO0P5pT_bRBNgw1i65cOTyiobUb7Ba2i8TtwVb1onUFdJAoT1VBLh-TLRLY48bRy5yDi_F1qU1y-OJRwUSUgwbxX5Wm4F5BQv30c_2OAtNOZBwk_ehvMhN655vki4aeRmbzE40Xy6Dsgav-1tjp3mICooOoBYdN3e56rksF9Xnf6Jy8ONf3NIyGJCR5HT2qW6c2hmh3wCTxWmRes_vW92G1cIc9tOHaC2UqlXYqsEEBXAxQv_qRToSa0G2wv0-LV_rqAhrT8yYMyIt1QnnaYtWNo951qNzWQ73LN8rpEgPrYgAFNtdo5P0pQWt3etgCM1GNzkDudbnKLygaD1-7k7iNp6CqPiSx2sbsPe42NmVRFf3inMhzlQO1XY4enVkEeBib5mVwhRISk1SjHAoXKlRXaH3PIfpsv_rerry3Ij5dJMXL-DRDOR671SMuDNTNTuBgAUx4ERZZFeIOLozhE2B6B8loXkv-1ObOX7bI4ozmvi8CNMhJBuyIb6DsJ6Zon22p2vMVbBWtJKjosnjIGm9PmOkCaB3Oo9aJ3LvZLEa857qnJr8x4luTlAxa2JwdRYlXeoA%3D%3D)

**Simmy Adelman, Editor**
_Behind the Markets_
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Did you see this?
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3849%2E582294%2Eij7z0e)
**“THE BIGGEST SHAKE-UP ON THE MAP”**
That’s what Newsmax had to say about John Sununu entering the race for New Hampshire’s Senate seat against Chris Pappas. With Senate control up for grabs, politicos are rating this election as one of the top FIVE to watch.
**[All eyes are on New Hampshire, and what we do right now will set the course for the next year. Will you chip in $5 or any amount today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251204_2_newsmax.lYjwRb&refcode=em20251204-2&t=2&akid=3849%2E582294%2Eij7z0e)**
Democrats have no shot at flipping the Senate without winning here. We need to make sure we elect Chris Pappas so he can continue fighting for Granite Staters.
But our opponents are laser-focused on making sure that doesn’t happen. Senate Republicans have their hand-picked candidate, John Sununu — and potentially millions of dollars in outside spending — ready to stop us.
We need your help to fight back. Chris has won four competitive elections for Congress thanks to a strong grassroots team. We need that same grassroots team to take action right now.
**[This is one of the most competitive Senate elections in the country, so every dollar has a real impact. Please, make a contribution of any amount today to support Chris Pappas.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251204_2_newsmax.lYjwRb&refcode=em20251204-2&t=3&akid=3849%2E582294%2Eij7z0e)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251204_2_newsmax.lYjwRb&amount=5&refcode=em20251204-2&t=22&akid=3849%2E582294%2Eij7z0e)**
Thank you,
Chris Pappas HQ
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251204-2&t=23&refcode2=3849_582294_ij7z0e&akid=3849%2E582294%2Eij7z0e)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=3849%2E582294%2Eij7z0e)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

name: Ilhan Omar for Congress
subject: “Ilhan Omar is garbage”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251204.STldYL&refcode=em20251204-5678&amount=3&t=1001&akid=5678%2E420207%2Ed1HhhN ][IMG]

Peter — Trump
just can’t stop attacking Ilhan.

First, Trump spent months going after Ilhan with racist conspiracies,
leading to ongoing harassment and constant threats to Ilhan’s life and
requiring us to hire our own security.

Then, Trump’s rhetoric over the last weeks has put a target on the backs
of innocent Somali-American families here in Minneapolis who already face
so much hate from the far-right.

Now, Trump is calling Ilhan “garbage” and adding that immigrants like her
are “garbage” too. It’s disgusting and dangerous.

And more so, it’s a distraction from the fact that Trump’s first year in
office has been a disaster. The cost of living continues to rise, millions
are losing their healthcare, and ICE has waged a terror campaign in our
cities. The American people are waking up to Trump’s incompetence, and he
is desperate to create a distraction.

So, Peter, we
are reaching out today to ask this grassroots team to help us show that
thousands, or even millions, of people stand with Ilhan Omar as she faces
down Trump’s attacks and continues to fight for our agenda of healthcare,
housing, education, and a safe and affordable life for all Americans,
regardless of where they were born.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251204.STldYL&refcode=em20251204-5678&amount=3&t=1002&akid=5678%2E420207%2Ed1HhhN ]Split a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford
between Ilhan Omar’s campaign and Pramila Jayapal today. We want to prove
that this movement has Ilhan’s back and is ready to meet these racist,
hateful attacks with a powerful grassroots campaign that can defeat Trump
and the far-right.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251204.STldYL&amount=3&refcode=em20251204-5678&t=1021&akid=5678%2E420207%2Ed1HhhN ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar for Congress

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251204-5678-footer&t=1022&refcode2=5678_420207_d1HhhN&akid=5678%2E420207%2Ed1HhhN

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5678%2E420207%2Ed1HhhN

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: What Charlie knew all along
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGunTAMhp8mbByBk5AwMFQ9Qupw79oxMomB6IaEknB4_Yr29AG6Wf5-f5Ltnx_mA33wcfnEjQb78ubI5lqx2BWP4Okr0oUhYEhxMdCArFuoG3Gn2soN1nUcKhpa1QmtZdfKah1ISiVEz4WS3Aol517NNCth537S1OrKD7ephUYANE3TPzRx59zMte6kcr1iojl3h4Xyw6aY6Xhh8S_yMaa7SvFh01aFYS1lz4x_YzAyGDPZ86AHRnKp3AkGYzmP6ONS78nHUp8ZGYykJdA0TXWreqiFmpq654rXNFvUk-24Bcf4mNN5WDI2OWL8-f3Hp1KStwy6s2xmI-fPjfEnbejDu_l3gvHniofD_GXQ_noji9uOfok3TJe5yFw-_mMpFoqF8SdWx-D2y4fgc3dfYbntf5Yt__uc1wC_AwAA__-T1J0B)

---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGunTAMhp8mbByBk5AwMFQ9Qupw79oxMomB6IaEknB4_Yr29AG6Wf5-f5Ltnx_mA33wcfnEjQb78ubI5lqx2BWP4Okr0oUhYEhxMdCArFuoG3Gn2soN1nUcKhpa1QmtZdfKah1ISiVEz4WS3Aol517NNCth537S1OrKD7ephUYANE3TPzRx59zMte6kcr1iojl3h4Xyw6aY6Xhh8S_yMaa7SvFh01aFYS1lz4x_YzAyGDPZ86AHRnKp3AkGYzmP6ONS78nHUp8ZGYykJdA0TXWreqiFmpq654rXNFvUk-24Bcf4mNN5WDI2OWL8-f3Hp1KStwy6s2xmI-fPjfEnbejDu_l3gvHniofD_GXQ_noji9uOfok3TJe5yFw-_mMpFoqF8SdWx-D2y4fgc3dfYbntf5Yt__uc1wC_AwAA__-T1J0B)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. name: Dr. Abdul El-Sayed
subject: When I get to the Senate, here’s my first promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1400%2E251025%2ESiz1dH ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1400%2E251025%2ESiz1dH ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

If I win this race, I’ll be the only non-MAGA doctor in the entire U.S.
Senate — and the first public health official to ever serve there.

That scares the hell out of the people who built their careers on lies,
like this guy. 👇

[ RFK ]RFK Jr. wants you to know he's personally responsible for anti-vax
misinfo

And do you want to know the first thing I’m going to do once I’m sworn in?
Hold RFK Jr. accountable for using the CDC to misinform Americans.

I’m done letting people like him get away with poisoning the well of
science while pretending it’s “free speech.”

There is no world in which we let RFK Jr.’s brainworm ideology warp public
health into a political weapon without a fight.

This race is the firewall,
Peter.

Our U.S. Senate race in Michigan is our chance to prove that facts still
matter, science still matters, and that working people — not conspiracy
theorists — get to decide our future.

But we can only achieve this if our grassroots movement shows up right
now.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251204-2-ak.xfIIQO&amount=10&refcode=em20251204-1400&t=1004&akid=1400%2E251025%2ESiz1dH ]If you want a public health voice in the Senate who won’t bow to MAGA
extremism, pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford today:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251204-2-ak.xfIIQO&amount=10&refcode=em20251204-1400&t=1023&akid=1400%2E251025%2ESiz1dH ]Donate $10 ››

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: They called me “dangerous.” Good. Let’s fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
I will not back down.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120627566/586866263/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWQ2OTc1Yi01ZGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2KHB4yNONBuARR3dQ23bltk2Jyn3lbUncPsGg6LsjOU=)
Hi team, Robert Garcia here.
Republicans have made one thing very clear: _They are terrified that we’re telling the truth about the Epstein files._
When my team and I sifted through more than 20,000 Epstein documents, we found three emails they desperately hoped would stay buried — **emails suggesting Donald Trump knew more about Epstein’s abuse than he ever admitted.**
So we released them.
Because survivors deserve transparency.
Because the public deserves answers.
Because justice belongs in daylight — not in a locked drawer.
Republicans didn’t like that.
**They attacked me. They tried to discredit the victims. They accused us of “smearing Trump.” Republicans actually said the “most dangerous place in D.C.” is between me and a TV camera.**
**You know what?**_If exposing corruption and fighting for survivors makes me dangerous — then good._
But this is the part I need your help with: _Trump and his allies are now trying to drown out oversight with lies, distractions, and attacks. And we can’t let them._
My team is pushing for full public release of the Justice Department’s Epstein files — not just the ones Republicans cherry-pick. That fight takes resources, staff, and the ability to withstand non-stop GOP pressure.
**[So I'm asking: Will you chip in $10 or anything you can to keep the pressure on and stay in the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120627569/586866271/789508428?refcode=251204_RG_dangerous-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWQ2OTc1Yi01ZGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2KHB4yNONBuARR3dQ23bltk2Jyn3lbUncPsGg6LsjOU=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120627572/586866274/-309737922?refcode=251204_RG_dangerous-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWQ2OTc1Yi01ZGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2KHB4yNONBuARR3dQ23bltk2Jyn3lbUncPsGg6LsjOU=)
Every day this movement grows, Republicans panic a little more — because they know we’re not following their script.
Let's keep going,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120627575/586866279/-309737922?refcode=251204_RG_dangerous-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWQ2OTc1Yi01ZGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2KHB4yNONBuARR3dQ23bltk2Jyn3lbUncPsGg6LsjOU=)

body:
It’s hard to believe the incompetence in Minnesota right now. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=24932cb729a344fa8e11dd7239116856&_e=0mC30fF6epbBBh8c69YUL8cw8Kvo4DydaK2KlaJ79cIarumH5A_AdJb541qJlqMMURjbIJ3OoJJSeBW83vKkTWv2d7H-frN4IVTzsMmzP_ILFFgJbcgrJj3UarmlK3jpBjB9Dwfz7mwy67Rvq6R24YhQNg6vfk7I6CXAIJEn-GY03L6fMfMOnxwSBMTGaCpGLaY5YvRdN8MBoJEV4BZwTFc6Oij2IgyIXMqR2LnhirS7DN8GmZVae_equigZOVjWrLyCwtbb73NyBDR8q6An6tylEn3XfZeiXmx7gNzcWV4RTk5vYK8IJkU_UNFCQ3QjvNCPJVNqDaOtbAVE8P66jHUfrJlpqZppCjkIi2sWUylXvZL07xCyfHM2uMhuLrBzykyu22bfvHwxrOAe_DJienIGJROSUmPEj0wZ4_LkiXGc2iuasULts6Q53vDbiHf-TONFTOPGBufr-GEImn_U4e7QJuFuZeS6dzylS_zUAhO_uh-kJ_XP3dWNCe4pJr47HgWP-jRk_Y402D1ZZhygwG8gLGNXZUT6vGtjsyw-RR5zU_W9Me5hZFCoPSDFI9d7n6No97ye-6LRftqcysp7wtAsMYatEoZRumW2r2Poc65gxKrjH3duAz075E4nElCBYa427w2NTgqxRmiPJLHdXZm9XVXd1k4WigeyYdJyAs-wN4ubT72Jyh04LdoP1BUHVNGNFEg_Iu6OzBOURSB0qbbkkMwj4oYNodDm_fWwagTytPlsPwiSgbrCn8DD1IU4)

---
Peter,

It’s hard to believe the incompetence in Minnesota right now.

While Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan are auditioning for jobs, Somali immigrants in my state are stealing money from **American taxpayers and likely funneling it to terrorists in Africa.**

I know this is nuanced, but things have gotten so out of control in Minnesota that the New York Times wrote an article titled **“How Fraud Swamped Minnesota’s Social Services System on Tim Walz’s Watch”**
**_
It’s caught my attention as a Republican U.S. Senate candidate.

It’s caught President Trump’s attention. _**

Now, I**[hope to catch your attention](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=24932cb729a344fa8e11dd7239116856&_e=0mC30fF6epbBBh8c69YUL8cw8Kvo4DydaK2KlaJ79cIarumH5A_AdJb541qJlqMMURjbIJ3OoJJSeBW83vKkTWv2d7H-frN4IVTzsMmzP_ILFFgJbcgrJj3UarmlK3jpBjB9Dwfz7mwy67Rvq6R24YhQNg6vfk7I6CXAIJEn-GY03L6fMfMOnxwSBMTGaCpGLaY5YvRdN8MBoJEV4BZwTFc6Oij2IgyIXMqR2LnhirS7DN8GmZVae_equigZOVjWrLyCwtbb73NyBDR8q6An6hJw4BzFqqjJ8Vtu2TBIlpPzN3uXXl8KDM6gnwxWjRQy5QXWE9knowWC9A5_bYvpnz1O7TR2XU2GgSurrZTN0crsm6h8IOw0TegJImQNO713-mxBV7WZrhxmkioPNTJAlDFIXRYqhFj1Nie9UrJ3EBDfFqseOqjEMhTtc5lXxxkjBFWGzXJ2-NZBQI94zG4OqYN5p9Pg0KNzDx-Q4z9GB5e8VQO3Fyhdis334veZ43VlYdjh0v1_ckhEUdb96FVCYV_lHJuz0QXk3OWP6KErSdeHem5mPTTBUzq8JiIeGw0ZCCltmWVDs7aGzk21OetrIjpa8tRrHnO81ONFrkJdGFBx_uU0BiQTDFlwPGO8FuwWsfTAu5Fa2X6U-UFBP1RWtxvH9VHA5lLNcJh97G8BRP6vVnxTO-0ewUoPzWTNE3gnywVIlSHVZ-2XQf96AC3tT_ARZfngUOS2rfxyRk8yIOtok1sVbUOnC9Ls8fvppxcn)** with the gross misconduct and neglect this man and his cabinet have inflicted on our beautiful state.

There are Democratic governors in the country. If it could happen here, it can happen anywhere.

Friend,
---
What I’m about to tell you is of grave importance – _in fact, it’s so vital that I just spoke to President Trump _directly_ about it_ – so I hope you’ll read every word.
---
After sweeping Republican victories last November, most Americans _expected_ that the corrupt Deep State that weaponized our government to target President Trump and his allies would be dismantled forever.
---
**_But unfortunately, the Deep State is still alive and well in America!_**
---
**That’s why Deep State operatives colluded with House Democrats – led by Trump impeachment architect Jamie Raskin – to try to BLOCK my provision to prevent the FBI from secretly conducting investigations against federal candidates in order to interfere in elections!**
---
However, I refused to back down – and after speaking to President Trump, he gave my provision his full support, ensuring that it will officially become the law of the land!
---
_Why am I making such a big deal about this?_
---
Under Barack Obama, the FBI was weaponized by James Comey to conduct an illegal, partisan witch hunt against President Trump in an attempt to interfere in the 2016 presidential election and strip _YOU_ of your right to elect the candidate of your choice.
---
Under Joe Biden, the FBI was once again weaponized by Democrats and the Deep State to SPY on Republican members of Congress as part of the sweeping Arctic Frost wiretapping scandal!
---
**Stopping any future weaponization of the FBI needed to be a priority for our House GOP majority – and my provision will ensure the FBI is NEVER secretly weaponized by the Deep State against Republicans ever again.**
---
That’s why Democrats and the Deep State were so determined to stop it at any cost!
---
At the end of the day, this would be a significant legislative win delivered against the illegal weaponization of the Deep State — but of course, there’s much more work to do.
---
You can rest assured, Friend...
---
_I won’t rest until we’ve delivered _FULL_ accountability and multiple legislative fixes to arguably the biggest illegal corruption and government weaponization issue of all time. _
---
There’s no excuse for not getting this done, Friend.
---
**__The Deep State must be FULLY dismantled if America is to survive!__**
---
I’ve been leading the battle against the Deep State for years now.
---
**Through tough questioning in a March 2017 intelligence hearing, I was the first to expose the illegal cover-up by Comey and the Deep State of their political weaponization of intelligence agencies in our elections.**
---
That forced Comey to admit _under oath_ that he ignored proper protocol regarding the notification of Congress when he launched his illegal witch hunt targeting President Trump.
---
Ever since that day, I’ve been taking the offensive against these Leftist tyrants to ensure such a despicable abuse of power _NEVER_ happens again.
---
_**I may be running for Governor of New York, but I’m still a member of Congress – and as long as I’m here, I’m going to take my job, and _my oath to the people_ , seriously.**_
---
If that makes headlines or creates enemies, I don’t care: I will **ALWAYS** do everything in my power to take the fight to the Deep State and put America First!
---
But to win this battle and return power to the American people once and for all, I’m counting on support from generous America First conservatives like _YOU_.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help me continue fighting to DISMANTLE the Deep State and END the weaponization of government in both New York and Washington D.C. – _and help unlock a 600% MATCH_.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3da10607dd7f415e9bb3648d23727d2e&_e=vmGpOIwmmxJk1H9PdJVx1iaamUjhVyvMv2stvAUQ02RpT3Nn5vNf5d4gL5LeuL3j7JodYpMhe-ScEOBm4Yw2ea5val1JxdSUfw-7DUWsUcjAv9gU5GdMM1-sRZSOKUfmKgb63M3NJOnUW0NxAYBmeISdrqMiTsE2R3ufSaCr4f_niE2YE5aHNuASBNRY431XPuKUvNjxxTdDUAwk_waDUiX5whLzeJ2hXjsDQK0ZOh0jSo6f32hAErv7-b42lgYV3BIznlPVb5hJGMdZJp3M6dpIoxPv1tk8eAhoWK7PNtdZ7iMqkStXTIKhi45W9IwAMbA12SIJJ6Gf7tYdV4a8KnpBz6jQ36u72cJ4X7IXhCnK3ed1OxhJt5sQHx2XUh0v8zzIGhe8o9aOxVgzuIK67cHQF9GGs6DZHS7KjqsXUqWjIOPhD6AlfuJ9C59WcQ-gVZx2A8LVid6crTGeTp4iJTx4Gyj5tGfUuozaKI13_fJqpOna26V4Nb82uuPMupYuZLXvZXjE0BDWXtiThk6Ud1BYSVaDwF7mhFIY5Fpammc9yR51xLMsbL5ibM8JLOs2cUCBNOFtUGO7NSxiS9AMvI-cl8xSlZs61iq_1QeZB-W6sMXyI5JocCAvlpSTdFWy)

clean_body: What I’m about to share is that important. | Friend, What I’m about to tell you is of grave importance – in fact, it’s so vital that I just spoke to President Trump directly about it – so I hope you’ll read every word. After sweeping Republican victories last November, most Americans expected that the corrupt Deep State that weaponized our government to target President Trump and his allies would be dismantled forever. But unfortunately, the Deep State is still alive and well in America! That’s why Deep State operatives colluded with House Democrats – led by Trump impeachment architect Jamie Raskin – to try to BLOCK my provision to prevent the FBI from secretly conducting investigations against federal candidates in order to interfere in elections! However, I refused to back down – and after speaking to President Trump, he gave my provision his full support, ensuring that it will officially become the law of the land! Why am I making such a big deal about this? Under Barack Obama, the FBI was weaponized by James Comey to conduct an illegal, partisan witch hunt against President Trump in an attempt to interfere in the 2016 presidential election and strip YOU of your right to elect the candidate of your choice. Under Joe Biden, the FBI was once again weaponized by Democrats and the Deep State to SPY on Republican members of Congress as part of the sweeping Arctic Frost wiretapping scandal! Stopping any future weaponization of the FBI needed to be a priority for our House GOP majority – and my provision will ensure the FBI is NEVER secretly weaponized by the Deep State against Republicans ever again. That’s why Democrats and the Deep State were so determined to stop it at any cost! At the end of the day, this would be a significant legislative win delivered against the illegal weaponization of the Deep State — but of course, there’s much more work to do. You can rest assured, Friend... I won’t rest until we’ve delivered FULL accountability and multiple legislative fixes to arguably the biggest illegal corruption and government weaponization issue of all time. There’s no excuse for not getting this done, Friend. The Deep State must be FULLY dismantled if America is to survive! I’ve been leading the battle against the Deep State for years now. Through tough questioning in a March 2017 intelligence hearing, I was the first to expose the illegal cover-up by Comey and the Deep State of their political weaponization of intelligence agencies in our elections. That forced Comey to admit under oath that he ignored proper protocol regarding the notification of Congress when he launched his illegal witch hunt targeting President Trump. Ever since that day, I’ve been taking the offensive against these Leftist tyrants to ensure such a despicable abuse of power NEVER happens again. I may be running for Governor of New York, but I’m still a member of Congress – and as long as I’m here, I’m going to take my job, and my oath to the people , seriously. If that makes headlines or creates enemies, I don’t care: I will ALWAYS do everything in my power to take the fight to the Deep State and put America First! But to win this battle and return power to the American people once and for all, I’m counting on support from generous America First conservatives like YOU. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Team, Presidents Joe Biden and Barack Obama showed the American people what TRUE leaders look like.

With Donald Trump wreaking havoc on our Democracy, we’re desperately missing the days when he wasn’t President.

We’re reflecting back to Presidents that _ACCOMPLISHED SO MUCH_ for our country – but we’re unsure how local Democrats feel.

**So, we’re gathering nationwide feedback on how Americans view the progress made during previous Democratic administrations.**

Please, you’re the only Democrat chosen to represent your area in this exclusive survey, so your input is absolutely essential.

_– Fight For Reform_

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: Peter, an earnest request from Jon Ossoff’s campaign team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Peter, you know that Jon hates having to ask for money.
#

Peter —
We’re asking you to make a contribution to Jon Ossoff as we prepare for the biggest and most important Senate race of the midterms.
If that’s all you need to know, _thank you._ You can use this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-dec25**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251204-1-f-b&t=1&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN)
If you need more, please, let us explain:
**MAGA and the GOP have already spent more than $10 million dollars on Georgia’s Senate race.**
Jon is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Donald Trump won.
_That makes him _easily_ MAGA’s #1 target in the midterms. _
It explains why they’re pouring so much money into this race so early, and why Donald Trump himself has attacked Jon and said he’s watching the race very closely.
It’s also why, before this race is over, there is a very good chance it ends up being the most expensive election in U.S. Senate history.
Peter, you know that Jon hates having to ask for money. If it was up to him, we’d have overturned _Citizens United_ years ago and we wouldn’t have shady dark-money Super PACs spending hundreds of millions of dollars to influence our elections.
But that is the reality we’re facing. And we can’t just stick our heads in the sand and hope for the best. There is too much on the line.
**We know that a single donation might not seem like much compared to the millions flooding our political system, but _remember_ : it’s not just you chipping in — it’s thousands of people just like you, all pitching in.**
[**So we are humbly asking: can Jon count on you to chip in today? We wish we didn’t have to ask, but there’s no way we’ll be able to fight back against the MAGA millions without your help.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251204-1-f-b&t=2&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.UdqSSd&refcode=em251204-1-f-b&t=21&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.electjon.com/go/1526?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.3llSsh&refcode=em251204-1-f-b&t=22&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.bGqFYH&refcode=em251204-1-f-b&t=23&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.IZ7DFn&refcode=em251204-1-f-b&t=24&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.pWvP31&refcode=em251204-1-f-b&t=25&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.PyZHDd&refcode=em251204-1-f-b&t=26&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN)**
---
****
Thank you!
\- Team Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=27&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1210%2E5691347%2E_dlNAN) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

body:
Your voice matters in the fight for Democracy. |
---

| | Hi , You've shown up for voting rights by supporting Fair Fight's work. But we can only take our message so far. YOU are the best messenger to the people you know, and we need you! **Introducing REACH: Fair Fight's new platform for everyday Democracy defenders. ** Today, we’re launching REACH, an innovative relational organizing platform that equips you with the posts, graphics, and information you need to organize for good! At a time when the news and media are dominated by the Trump Regime's constant attacks on our country and our Democracy, you can use your voice to cut through the noise. We break down voting rights issues with clear, fact-checked information you can trust. Right now, that means resources to organize against the SAVE Act (anti-voting legislation at the federal level) and updates on _Louisiana v. Callais_ , a case that could gut the Voting Rights Act and decimate fair representation and the ability for Black voters to elect the candidates they want. Then, we give you shareable content that's ready to go, so you can inform your friends, family, and community! **[JOIN REACH NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120628172/586868088/564853936?refcode=emm_ff_20251204_T1_reachlaunch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzUzZGJhNC02MGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxhIGMUb5jSs8Dh0HtS90CnE7YL_FL0tBCYhvrXfZ_0=&emci=da5dd248-57d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=9353dba4-60d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1037277) and be part of grassroots change. ** Thanks for being in this fight with us, The Fair Fight Team

clean_body: Your voice matters in the fight for Democracy. | | | Hi , You've shown up for voting rights by supporting Fair Fight's work. But we can only take our message so far. YOU are the best messenger to the people you know, and we need you! Introducing REACH: Fair Fight's new platform for everyday Democracy defenders. Today, we’re launching REACH, an innovative relational organizing platform that equips you with the posts, graphics, and information you need to organize for good! At a time when the news and media are dominated by the Trump Regime's constant attacks on our country and our Democracy, you can use your voice to cut through the noise. We break down voting rights issues with clear, fact-checked information you can trust. Right now, that means resources to organize against the SAVE Act (anti-voting legislation at the federal level) and updates on Louisiana v. Callais , a case that could gut the Voting Rights Act and decimate fair representation and the ability for Black voters to elect the candidates they want. Then, we give you shareable content that's ready to go, so you can inform your friends, family, and community! and be part of grassroots change. Thanks for being in this fight with us, The Fair Fight Team * | = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida can’t do it alone
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251204-1679-foote&t=1001&akid=1679%2E342411%2EmCZk4c ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Our country is under attack from within — and the Squad is on the front
lines. Last month, supporters like you helped defend our progressive
champions and push bold policies that protect working families, expand
justice, and create a democracy that works for all.

This is your chance to join a movement that
delivers,
Peter. Your support gives the
Squad the power to challenge entrenched elites, defend democracy, and make
sure progress reaches everyone — not just the privileged
few.

Change doesn’t happen by waiting — it happens because people show up. The
far-right is ramping up attacks, and the next battles will be fierce. But
the Squad is showing up, every day, against Trump, his allies, and anyone
who threatens justice.

And together, we can defend our democracy and make sure no one is left
behind.

Thank you for standing with us,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing up to Trump, MAGA
forces, and anyone trying to drag our country backward — but they can’t
do it alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251204-movement.Ul1JTP&refcode=em20251204-1679&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1679%2E342411%2EmCZk4c ]Chip in now to stand with the Squad and keep this movement going
strong.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251204-movement.Ul1JTP&refcode=em20251204-1679&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1679%2E342411%2EmCZk4c ]Contribute ››

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1679%2E342411%2EmCZk4c

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

_Reminder:_ **Donald Trump's FBI Director, Kash Patel, is a QAnon supporter, conspiracy peddler, and die-hard MAGA loyalist.** Patel is entirely unqualified to lead the FBI, but luckily for him, that’s never been the criteria to serve in Trump’s cabinet. Instead, Trump hand-picked Patel because Trump knew that Patel would be a puppet who would weaponize the FBI against Donald Trump’s enemies. What was once a nonpartisan, apolitical institution that was the envy of the world is now nothing more than a political vehicle for a wannabe despot – exactly the type of politicized law enforcement seen in banana republics that the United States has always condemned. **Hiring Patel was a slap in the face to the brave men and women who serve our country in the FBI. And it’s only getting worse. They deserve better, and so do you.** **[I will not back down from the fight for accountability from this corrupt administration. name: Tina Kotek
subject: I’m running
body:
Donate now to support me and EMILYs List. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120628693/586869883/1087007976?refcode=WUEFHL09_20251204_KotekSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjMwOTM0Mi02MmQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YObOzykK_OnIvTBipK4ZVllN2zFaB_krWnKyWNeuh8Y=) Peter, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for reelection as governor of Oregon. [**Will you donate $10 to EMILYs List and myself to send a strong message as we kick off our campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120628694/586869884/1087007976?refcode=WUEFHL09_20251204_KotekSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjMwOTM0Mi02MmQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YObOzykK_OnIvTBipK4ZVllN2zFaB_krWnKyWNeuh8Y=) | [BECOME A KICKOFF DONOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120628695/586869885/1087007976?refcode=WUEFHL09_20251204_KotekSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjMwOTM0Mi02MmQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YObOzykK_OnIvTBipK4ZVllN2zFaB_krWnKyWNeuh8Y=)
---
While the past few months have been unlike anything we’ve seen before — in our state and in our country — the way we came together made me so proud to be an Oregonian.

When President Trump tried to use our own military against us, we showed the power of peaceful resistance.

When President Trump created a food emergency by withholding SNAP funds, Oregon stepped up to help feed our neighbors.

I’ve never been prouder to work for you — but the fight isn’t over. I’m running for governor again because Oregon values are on the line.

The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let President Trump do whatever he wants.

And with everything going on, we still have to keep building on the progress we’ve made, to make sure people can afford to call Oregon home.

We expanded the number of shelter beds, began building more homes people can afford, funded summer learning, and found ways to ease the rising cost of living.

**It’s a start, but we need to do more. Especially with everything coming at us from Washington, D.C.**

As governor, I’ve visited all thirty six counties across Oregon, and I’ve seen firsthand the strength and resilience that makes our state such a special place.

That’s why I’m so optimistic about our future.

**It’s why I’m excited to officially announce my reelection campaign for governor of our great state.**

clean_body: Donate now to support me and EMILYs List. | = Peter, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for reelection as governor of Oregon. = | = While the past few months have been unlike anything we’ve seen before — in our state and in our country — the way we came together made me so proud to be an Oregonian. When President Trump tried to use our own military against us, we showed the power of peaceful resistance. When President Trump created a food emergency by withholding SNAP funds, Oregon stepped up to help feed our neighbors. I’ve never been prouder to work for you — but the fight isn’t over. I’m running for governor again because Oregon values are on the line. The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let President Trump do whatever he wants. And with everything going on, we still have to keep building on the progress we’ve made, to make sure people can afford to call Oregon home. We expanded the number of shelter beds, began building more homes people can afford, funded summer learning, and found ways to ease the rising cost of living. It’s a start, but we need to do more. Especially with everything coming at us from Washington, D.C. As governor, I’ve visited all thirty six counties across Oregon, and I’ve seen firsthand the strength and resilience that makes our state such a special place. That’s why I’m so optimistic about our future. It’s why I’m excited to officially announce my reelection campaign for governor of our great state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your split contribution will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
