Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: My letter in the New York Times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This letter is about the disgusting, non-stop hate that I and the entire Somali-American community has been receiving from Donald Trump
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1981%2E791427%2EsnYsLe)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251204-1-180&t=2&akid=1981%2E791427%2EsnYsLe)
Friend, I have a new opinion letter out in the _New York Times_ today.
The letter is about the disgusting, non-stop hate that I and the entire Somali-American community has been receiving from Donald Trump and his far-right allies over the last week.
I’m including the entire letter below for you to read, and **[I’m respectfully asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help us fight back against Trump and continue to push forward our movement in the face of right-wing extremism.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251204-1-180&t=3&akid=1981%2E791427%2EsnYsLe) **[DONATE NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251204-1-180&t=4&akid=1981%2E791427%2EsnYsLe)**
— Ilhan
* * *
**Trump Knows He’s Failing. Cue the Bigotry.**
By Ilhan Omar
On Tuesday, President Trump called my friends and me “garbage.”
This comment was only the latest in a series of remarks and Truth Social posts in which the president has demonized and spread conspiracy theories about the Somali community and about me personally. For years, the president has spewed hate speech in an effort to gin up contempt against me. He reaches for the same playbook of racism, xenophobia, Islamophobia and division again and again. At one 2019 rally, he egged on his crowd until it chanted “send her back” when he said my name.
Mr. Trump denigrates not only Somalis but so many other immigrants, too, particularly those who are Black and Muslim. While he has consistently tried to vilify newcomers, we will not let him silence us. He fails to realize how deeply Somali Americans love this country. We are doctors, teachers, police officers and elected leaders working to make our country better. Over 90 percent of Somalis living in my home state, Minnesota, are American citizens by birth or naturalization. Some even supported Mr. Trump at the ballot box.
“I don’t want them in our country,” the president said this week. “Let them go back to where they came from.”
Somali Americans remain resilient against the onslaught of attacks from the White House. But I am deeply worried about the ramifications of these tirades. When Mr. Trump maligns me, it increases the number of death threats that my family, staff members and I receive. As a member of Congress, I am privileged to have access to security when these threats arise. What keeps me up at night is that people who share the identities I hold — Black, Somali, hijabi, immigrant — will suffer the consequences of his words, which so often go unchecked by members of the Republican Party and other elected officials. All Americans have a duty to call out this hateful rhetoric when we hear it.
The president’s dehumanizing and dangerous attacks on minority immigrant communities are nothing new. When he first ran for president a decade ago, he launched his campaign with claims that he was going to pause Muslim immigration to this country. He has since falsely accused Haitian migrants of eating pets and referred to Haiti and African nations as “shithole” countries. He has accused Mexico of sending rapists and drug peddlers across our border. It is unconscionable that he fails to acknowledge how this country was built on the backs of immigrants and mocks their ongoing contributions.
While the president wastes his time attacking my community, my state, my governor and me, the promises of economic prosperity he made in his run for president last year have not come to fruition. Prices have not come down; in many cases, they have risen. His implementation of tariffs has hurt farmers and small business owners. His policies have only worsened the affordability crisis for Americans. And now, with Affordable Care Act tax credits set to expire, health care costs for American households are primed to skyrocket, and millions of people risk losing their coverage under his signature domestic policy bill.
The president knows he is failing, and so he is reverting to what he knows best: trying to divert attention by stoking bigotry.
When I was sworn into Congress in 2019, my father turned to me and expressed bewilderment that the leader of the free world was picking on a freshman member of Congress, one out of 535 members of the legislative body. The president’s goal may have been to try to tear me down, but my community and my constituents rallied behind me then, just as they are now.
I often say that although Minnesota may be cold, the people here have warm hearts. Minnesota is special. That is why when so many Somalis arrived in this country, they chose the state as home. I am deeply grateful to the people of Minnesota for the generosity, hospitality and support they have shown to every immigrant community in our state.
We will not let Mr. Trump intimidate or debilitate us. We are not afraid. After all, Minnesotans not only welcome refugees, they also sent one to Congress.
* * *

clean_body: As we kick off December, I need to level with you about what this month means for our campaign. | Hello everyone, As we kick off December, I need to level with you about what this month means for our campaign. Experts agree that we have a real shot at flipping CO-3 blue and Democrats regaining the House majority. And with extremist Jeff Hurd more vulnerable than ever, the stakes in this race just got higher. My opponent has made it clear whose side he’s on, and it isn’t working families in Western and Southern Colorado. It’s time we finally bring some accountability back to Washington, D.C. I’m ready to fight tooth and nail for the families and communities right here in Colorado's 3rd, but I cannot win this competitive seat without you. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for being by our side. — Alex Kelloff * | | | ---|---|---|--- Alex Kelloff for Colorado P.O. name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Tina has spent years fighting for everyday Oregonians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter: **Tina just announced that she’s running for re-election!** From her start at the Oregon Food Bank, to ensuring every family has health care and childcare they can afford — Tina has spent _years_ fighting for Oregonians. As our Governor, she made it a priority to make life better for Oregonians. Faced with unprecedented challenges out of Washington, D.C., Tina is determined to lower the cost of living, build more homes people can afford, and keep our neighborhoods safe. **To protect our progress, Tina is committed to her mission of making life easier for all of us. name: Frank Mrvan
subject: Republicans caved.
body:
|
#
Friend, it’s Frank Mrvan and I need to share an urgent update with you. **Over the holiday weekend, Indiana Republicans caved to Donald Trump, announcing their intention to vote on mid-decade redistricting in Indiana. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120629603/586873005/-826584788?refcode=em-12.04.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTUyYjRmMy02NGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuUtTzEadNVbM0nKfbQdCYLx-2VFSyAaMXb3QY2X6kc=) They’ll head to a special session to vote on their new proposed gerrymandered map which would make Indiana’s 1st Congressional District _R+12_. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120629604/586873006/-826584788?refcode=em-12.04.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTUyYjRmMy02NGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuUtTzEadNVbM0nKfbQdCYLx-2VFSyAaMXb3QY2X6kc=)
Friend, I wish I could tell you exactly what will happen next. The truth is, right now, it feels like a coin flip. I can’t say with certainty which way things will go, but I do know this: **every bit of support we can rally in the next crucial days will make a real, measurable difference for Indiana.** We’ve already seen the power of this team. Thanks to your support, we’ve been able to put significant pressure on the GOP’s special session, slow their momentum, and make our voices heard. **But this fight is far from over.** The coming days are critical, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Every ounce of energy, every phone call, every contribution helps keep the pressure on and hold the line. **Right now, Indiana’s 1st Congressional District is one of the most important in the entire country in the battle for the House majority. ** [**Because of the incredible support of this team, we’ve put major pressure on the GOP’s special session — but this is the most important moment of this yet. With all that said, can you split a donation of $3 or any amount between my campaign and Kristen McDonald Rivet before midnight to help us continue to hold the line in these critical days?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120629605/586873007/-826584788?refcode=em-12.04.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTUyYjRmMy02NGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuUtTzEadNVbM0nKfbQdCYLx-2VFSyAaMXb3QY2X6kc=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Frank Mrvan and Kristen McDonald Rivet will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120629606/586873008/-826584788?refcode=em-12.04.25-all&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTUyYjRmMy02NGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuUtTzEadNVbM0nKfbQdCYLx-2VFSyAaMXb3QY2X6kc=)

clean_body: | Friend, it’s Frank Mrvan and I need to share an urgent update with you. Over the holiday weekend, Indiana Republicans caved to Donald Trump, announcing their intention to vote on mid-decade redistricting in Indiana. = They’ll head to a special session to vote on their new proposed gerrymandered map which would make Indiana’s 1st Congressional District R+12. Take a look: = Friend, I wish I could tell you exactly what will happen next. The truth is, right now, it feels like a coin flip. I can’t say with certainty which way things will go, but I do know this: every bit of support we can rally in the next crucial days will make a real, measurable difference for Indiana. We’ve already seen the power of this team. Thanks to your support, we’ve been able to put significant pressure on the GOP’s special session, slow their momentum, and make our voices heard. But this fight is far from over. The coming days are critical, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Every ounce of energy, every phone call, every contribution helps keep the pressure on and hold the line. Right now, Indiana’s 1st Congressional District is one of the most important in the entire country in the battle for the House majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Frank Mrvan and Kristen McDonald Rivet will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I can’t thank you enough for all your support, friend. Frank Mrvan | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Helping people in Western Pennsylvania is front and center to everything I do.
When I talk to folks at home, they tell me exactly what they want from their government:
They want a tax cut that actually helps working people—not handouts for billionaires. They want Medicare and Social Security protected, not gutted to line corporate pockets. They don’t want Medicaid slashed so Wall Street and robber barons can get even richer. They want leaders to fight for the basic bargain of the American Dream.
That’s why I’m in this fight. I’m sick and tired of the Wall Street-driven corporate mindset that outsourced our jobs, rigged the economy for the wealthy, that price gouges hard working families, and that crushes unions and kills small businesses.
I work every day in Congress to change that. But my Republican colleagues? They aren’t fighting for any of that. They’re fighting for the same broken system that sold out hardworking families.
[_**Look, I’ll stand up to them every chance I get, but I need you standing with me in this work. subject: The Department of Justice must actually release the Epstein files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Last month, the House and Senate passed my bipartisan bill, the Epstein Transparency Act, to release the Epstein files.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120630059/586874401/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDMyMzc1Yy02NmQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygYYJwL3GAvW_93jFv1Nu4-Q6Xae8_ghBQtxWjsPRBk=&emci=e83d0b62-62d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8032375c-66d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7731215)

| | Last month, the House and Senate passed my bipartisan bill, the Epstein Transparency Act, to release the Epstein files. After months of obstruction, delay, and political games, Congress finally said enough. I led the fight in the Senate, and with grassroots support from folks all across the country, we won. We had a major victory for accountability and justice, and it happened because we refused to back down. **But now the real challenge begins.** The Department of Justice must actually release the files, and we know the biggest holdup throughout this entire fight has been one person: **_Donald Trump_**. Yesterday, I joined with the bipartisan Epstein leaders in the House and Senate demanding answers from Attorney General Pam Bondi on the status of the release. And as we know, Trump could have already released these files at any point. Instead, he did everything he could to keep them hidden. He leaned on Speaker Mike Johnson, and Johnson responded by sending House Republicans on an eight-week vacation to avoid voting on the bill. Their goal was clear: protect powerful people at all costs. But they failed because the American people stood up and demanded the truth. Grassroots pressure overwhelmed the political establishment, and Congress finally passed the bill. **Now we need to finish the job.** Everyone must be held accountable. It's time for full transparency. Hey folks,
Just went live with my friend **Brad Woodhouse** , president of Protect Our Care, and we dove straight into the chaos of the week. From the "double tap" strike to Trump's wild pardon spree to the health care crisis nobody in power seems willing to confront -- this one hits hard and gets real fast.
* [**00:02:18**] What Congress actually saw on the "double tap" tape -- and why it's indefensible.
* [**00:11:42**] Trump's pardons: corruption, grift, and the sheer scale of it.
* [**00:21:06**] The billionaire jet, the gold ballroom, and the reality people are living in.
* [**00:28:44**] How GOP health care cuts could gut hospitals and send premiums soaring.
* [**00:38:57**] The affordability crisis, tariffs, and Trump's fantasy economics.

We unpack a government willing to reward its friends, punish its enemies, and leave ordinary people drowning in medical bills and rising costs. If conversations like this matter to you -- honest, human, urgent -- help me keep them going.

With urgency,
--Mike

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: “We’re killing all the right people” – Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120630732/586876159/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.04_Annie-Andrews-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzY1NDgwYy02OGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-eNBR_KVnknAUs7kNbUvWjcr5qSyNbmdKRGTYvHI6qE=) Lindsey Graham stood on stage and **_bragged about “killing all the right people.”_**

Who exactly are the “ _right people_ ,” Lindsey?

The child shot in their classroom because you refuse to pass common sense gun legislation? The teenage girl who was refused care while suffering a miscarriage and died because of your extreme abortion bans? The millions of Americans who can’t get the care they need because they don’t have health insurance?

As a pediatrician, I’ve spent my entire career saving lives, fighting to keep kids healthy, and advocating for families who can’t afford basic care.

So when I hear Lindsey Graham, a sitting U.S. Senator, bragging about killing “the right people,” it makes me sick to my stomach and reminds me exactly why I’m running for Senate.

**Because public service should be about compassion, not cruelty. It should be about enriching lives, not glorifying death.**

[**_But to replace Lindsey Graham and restore decency to South Carolina’s Senate seat, I need your help. Will you split a $10 donation or whatever you can between my campaign and Maggie Hassan right now to help us fight back against this cruelty and elect a Senator who actually values human life?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120630733/586876160/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.04_Annie-Andrews-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzY1NDgwYy02OGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-eNBR_KVnknAUs7kNbUvWjcr5qSyNbmdKRGTYvHI6qE=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120630734/586876161/899181852?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.04_Annie-Andrews-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzY1NDgwYy02OGQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-eNBR_KVnknAUs7kNbUvWjcr5qSyNbmdKRGTYvHI6qE=)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name: Linda McMahon must resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
No part of public education will be untouched by Linda McMahon’s crusade to make the Department of Education dysfunctional.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2721%2E4032634%2EeZ46MP)
---
It’s official: Donald Trump and Linda McMahon are dismantling the Department of Education one piece at a time. This is, in Secretary McMahon’s words, the department’s “final mission.” They’re doing this by stripping the Department of Education for parts and putting major functions under other federal agencies. This means that programs are being moved into other agencies that have no relevant expertise to be managed by people who know nothing about the issues. Earlier this year, I looked McMahon dead in the eye and asked, “Do you think you can shut down the Department of Education?”

She said, “No, I don’t have the legal authority to do that.”

Yet here we are. **When a Secretary of Education is actively dismantling our public education system, it’s time to reconsider her role in government. It couldn’t be clearer: Linda McMahon has no business leading the Department of Education.** [**That’s why I’m calling on her to resign. If you’re with me, add your name to call for Secretary McMahon’s resignation.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-mcmahon/?source=EMZ28S_ENG_E_20251204_V1S1&t=8&akid=2721%2E4032634%2EeZ46MP) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-mcmahon/?source=EMZ28S_ENG_E_20251204_V1S1&t=9&akid=2721%2E4032634%2EeZ46MP)
---
No part of public education will be untouched by McMahon’s crusade to make the Department of Education dysfunctional:
* Secretary McMahon has been trying to **slash the department's section that assists students with disabilities and their families.** If she’s successful, this could sharply limit access to speech therapy, individual aides, and special equipment that are all essential for these children to participate fully in a classroom education.
* Secretary McMahon has fired half the staff at the Department of Education, making it harder for the **6 million students taking out college loans** and the **43 million Americans who have outstanding student loans.**
* Under Secretary McMahon’s new arrangement, **agencies that have no experience will be in charge, risking mistakes, confusion, and delays in funding.** One example: The Department of Labor will be in charge of supporting K-12 literacy, American history and civics, and Title I funding. Drink that in: Labor Department employees will decide which reading readiness programs to support for kindergartners.

[**Add your name to call for Linda McMahon’s resignation and fight to preserve every kid’s ability to get a top-notch public education in America.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-mcmahon/?source=EMZ28S_ENG_E_20251204_V1S1&t=10&akid=2721%2E4032634%2EeZ46MP)
Look, I was a special education teacher. I know how much families rely on the Department of Education to ensure that their kids get the resources they need.
To me, what’s at stake in this fight is more than the future of a federal agency. It’s about whether our country is truly committed to the idea of public education: the idea that anyone, no matter where they are born or how much money their parents have, can get a first-rate education.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

---

Dear Reader,

Not long ago RFK Jr went toe-to-toe with senate Dems on Capitol Hill... And he was NOT holding back.
What he EXPOSED left the room in stunned silence.

**[An emerging health threat](https://substack.com/redirect/efdcd892-705e-40be-8dae-ea1d42ceee0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that affects over one hundred million Americans. And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965... then you're most at risk.
Angry Democrats mocked him as a conspiracy theorist...
Just like they did when he warned about the COVID Lab leak, microplastics and corruption in the FDA...
All of which now appear to be _**100% TRUE**_.
Which is exactly why you need to hear RFK Jr's 2025 warning _**NOW**_.
You can **[get full details here now](https://substack.com/redirect/efdcd892-705e-40be-8dae-ea1d42ceee0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.

I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. **[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/efdcd892-705e-40be-8dae-ea1d42ceee0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.

# Virginia resident charged in January 2021 capitol pipe bomb case
Federal agents apprehended Brian Cole Jr., age 30, from Woodbridge, Virginia, for allegedly placing **[explosive devices](https://substack.com/redirect/60bbc808-5060-48f8-b6df-e9bb7de3127d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/60bbc808-5060-48f8-b6df-e9bb7de3127d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)near the Capitol more than four years ago, with the Justice Department criticizing the Biden administration for investigative delays.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60bbc808-5060-48f8-b6df-e9bb7de3127d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
J6 pipe bomb suspect, FBI
* **Long-awaited arrest:** Cole entered FBI custody Thursday on charges related to deploying an explosive device, with his initial court hearing set for Friday in the nation's capital, while law enforcement executes search activities at his home and his step-grandfather acknowledged contact with federal investigators but declined further comment.
* **Political finger-pointing over timeline:** Attorney General Pam Bondi slammed the former administration for letting the investigation sit dormant, asserting recent months brought intensive evidence review of materials that languished at the bureau for years, with prosecutors making the breakthrough through persistent detective work rather than fresh leads or witness testimony.
* **Threat assessment details:** Investigators recovered two functional explosive devices positioned near both major party committee offices as demonstrators converged on the Capitol to contest election outcomes, with security camera recordings from the day before showing a concealed individual wearing casual athletic footwear and carrying what investigators believe held one of the devices through a congressional neighborhood well before their discovery.

* * *
# **Federal authorities investigate post-arrival radicalization of DC attack suspect**
Federal officials are exploring whether the Afghan man charged with shooting two National Guard soldiers underwent **[radicalization on American soil](https://substack.com/redirect/fafd6be7-5563-4b38-bddc-a8bc772541d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after successfully passing security checks conducted by two different presidential administrations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fafd6be7-5563-4b38-bddc-a8bc772541d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rahmanullah Lakanwal, suspected DC gunman
* **Clean background, troubling outcome:** Rahmanullah Lakanwal, age 29, cleared background investigations when he arrived following the 2021 Kabul evacuation and again when receiving asylum approval this past April under Trump, with Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem declaring investigators think "he was radicalized since he's been here" through relationships in his Pacific Northwest community.
* **Screening system boundaries:** Secretary of State Marco Rubio acknowledged the inherent challenges of preventive security measures, explaining authorities can only evaluate someone's historical record rather than predict future actions, while a former intelligence official noted Lakanwal's completely clean record made prevention extremely difficult.
* **Mystery behind the violence:** Authorities are working to understand what prompted Lakanwal--a father who previously assisted CIA operations in Afghanistan--to drive cross-country from Washington state and open fire on Specialist Sarah Beckstrom and Staff Sgt. Andrew Wolfe near the White House, with potential factors including money troubles from work permit expiration, mental health struggles, or unverified claims about Taliban coercion targeting his relatives.

The administration answered by shutting down Afghan asylum pathways and blocking entry from nearly two dozen nations, while Lakanwal entered a not guilty plea during a video hearing from his hospital room.
* * *
# **Charlie Kirk 's final book on sabbath observance to be released **
The late Turning Point USA founder **[Charlie Kirk's last book](https://substack.com/redirect/cbd703d5-f9e4-494e-987b-767a175b5517?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** urging Americans to honor the Sabbath is being published this week, with his widow Erika adding a heartfelt foreword following his assassination in September.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cbd703d5-f9e4-494e-987b-767a175b5517?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Testament to lived convictions:** "Stop, In the Name of God: Why Honoring the Sabbath Will Transform Your Life" represents Kirk's deeply personal beliefs rather than abstract theory, according to Erika Kirk, who now serves as Turning Point USA CEO and describes the manuscript as "one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world" containing lasting truths.
* **Manifesto against modern chaos:** Kirk described his work as a call to combat the relentless pace of contemporary existence, targeting "the exhausted parent, the anxious student, the burned-out executive, the soul-numbed scroller" while arguing America's abandonment of the Sabbath coincides with declining emotional, spiritual, and communal health markers despite increased productivity and digital connectivity.
* **Personal spiritual journey shared:** The introduction recounts Kirk's own 2021 rediscovery of Sabbath rest during a period of internal struggle despite outward success following his marriage, offering practical guidance on how setting aside one day weekly for rest can restore balance, reduce anxiety, and reconnect individuals with God, family, and themselves.

The book releases December 9.
* * *
# **Halle Berry slams Gov. Newsom over vetoed menopause bill: "should NOT be our president!"**
Actress Halle Berry **[shocked the public](https://substack.com/redirect/a3965443-4196-4f4a-b59c-8fcd5a02f677?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after criticizing California Governor Gavin Newsom during a high-profile summit appearance, condemning his repeated rejection of menopause care legislation.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/31c75819-be39-4a53-ba8d-4cc558e4a90b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Direct gubernatorial rebuke:** Speaking at Wednesday's Dealbook Summit with Newsom in attendance, Berry blasted the governor for vetoing menopause legislation AB 432 two consecutive years, declaring "the way he has overlooked women, half the population, by devaluing us, he probably should not be our next president either," drawing audible gasps from the crowd.
* **Legislation details:** The rejected bill introduced by Assembly member Rebecca Bauer-Kahan would have mandated healthcare plans provide menopause treatment recommendations and required medical providers receive specialized training on menopause care, which Berry argued was essential given the governor's handling of women's health issues.
* **Ageism in America discussion:** The 59-year-old Oscar winner and Respin menopause care company founder lamented being deemed "past my prime" in American culture, describing how women face pressure to remain "forever 35" and are celebrated for appearing younger while becoming increasingly invisible in Hollywood, workplaces, and social media as they age.

clean_body: "I have witnessed the horrors of socialism firsthand!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "I have witnessed the horrors of socialism firsthand!" | | | Dec 4 | | | | | | | | | | | | GOP Rep. Young Kim of California over the Democrat Party's shift to embrace socialist policies while undermining Trump; something she knows a lot about having escaped socialism herself and living through the aftermath of the Korean War. | | ---|---|--- Dear Reader, Not long ago RFK Jr went toe-to-toe with senate Dems on Capitol Hill... And he was NOT holding back. What he EXPOSED left the room in stunned silence. that affects over one hundred million Americans. And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965... then you're most at risk. Angry Democrats mocked him as a conspiracy theorist... Just like they did when he warned about the COVID Lab leak, microplastics and corruption in the FDA... All of which now appear to be 100% TRUE. Which is exactly why you need to hear RFK Jr's 2025 warning NOW. You can while it's still available online. P.S. I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. while it's still available online. Virginia resident charged in January 2021 capitol pipe bomb case Federal agents apprehended Brian Cole Jr., age 30, from Woodbridge, Virginia, for allegedly placing the Capitol more than four years ago, with the Justice Department criticizing the Biden administration for investigative delays. | | ---|---|--- J6 pipe bomb suspect, FBI Long-awaited arrest: Cole entered FBI custody Thursday on charges related to deploying an explosive device, with his initial court hearing set for Friday in the nation's capital, while law enforcement executes search activities at his home and his step-grandfather acknowledged contact with federal investigators but declined further comment. Political finger-pointing over timeline: Attorney General Pam Bondi slammed the former administration for letting the investigation sit dormant, asserting recent months brought intensive evidence review of materials that languished at the bureau for years, with prosecutors making the breakthrough through persistent detective work rather than fresh leads or witness testimony. Threat assessment details: Investigators recovered two functional explosive devices positioned near both major party committee offices as demonstrators converged on the Capitol to contest election outcomes, with security camera recordings from the day before showing a concealed individual wearing casual athletic footwear and carrying what investigators believe held one of the devices through a congressional neighborhood well before their discovery. Federal authorities investigate post-arrival radicalization of DC attack suspect Federal officials are exploring whether the Afghan man charged with shooting two National Guard soldiers underwent after successfully passing security checks conducted by two different presidential administrations. | | ---|---|--- Rahmanullah Lakanwal, suspected DC gunman Clean background, troubling outcome: Rahmanullah Lakanwal, age 29, cleared background investigations when he arrived following the 2021 Kabul evacuation and again when receiving asylum approval this past April under Trump, with Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem declaring investigators think "he was radicalized since he's been here" through relationships in his Pacific Northwest community. Screening system boundaries: Secretary of State Marco Rubio acknowledged the inherent challenges of preventive security measures, explaining authorities can only evaluate someone's historical record rather than predict future actions, while a former intelligence official noted Lakanwal's completely clean record made prevention extremely difficult. Mystery behind the violence: Authorities are working to understand what prompted Lakanwal--a father who previously assisted CIA operations in Afghanistan--to drive cross-country from Washington state and open fire on Specialist Sarah Beckstrom and Staff Sgt. Andrew Wolfe near the White House, with potential factors including money troubles from work permit expiration, mental health struggles, or unverified claims about Taliban coercion targeting his relatives. The administration answered by shutting down Afghan asylum pathways and blocking entry from nearly two dozen nations, while Lakanwal entered a not guilty plea during a video hearing from his hospital room. Charlie Kirk 's final book on sabbath observance to be released The late Turning Point USA founder urging Americans to honor the Sabbath is being published this week, with his widow Erika adding a heartfelt foreword following his assassination in September. | | ---|---|--- Testament to lived convictions: "Stop, In the Name of God: Why Honoring the Sabbath Will Transform Your Life" represents Kirk's deeply personal beliefs rather than abstract theory, according to Erika Kirk, who now serves as Turning Point USA CEO and describes the manuscript as "one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world" containing lasting truths. Manifesto against modern chaos: Kirk described his work as a call to combat the relentless pace of contemporary existence, targeting "the exhausted parent, the anxious student, the burned-out executive, the soul-numbed scroller" while arguing America's abandonment of the Sabbath coincides with declining emotional, spiritual, and communal health markers despite increased productivity and digital connectivity. Personal spiritual journey shared: The introduction recounts Kirk's own 2021 rediscovery of Sabbath rest during a period of internal struggle despite outward success following his marriage, offering practical guidance on how setting aside one day weekly for rest can restore balance, reduce anxiety, and reconnect individuals with God, family, and themselves. The book releases December 9. Halle Berry slams Gov. Newsom over vetoed menopause bill: "should NOT be our president!" Actress Halle Berry after criticizing California Governor Gavin Newsom during a high-profile summit appearance, condemning his repeated rejection of menopause care legislation. Direct gubernatorial rebuke: Speaking at Wednesday's Dealbook Summit with Newsom in attendance, Berry blasted the governor for vetoing menopause legislation AB 432 two consecutive years, declaring "the way he has overlooked women, half the population, by devaluing us, he probably should not be our next president either," drawing audible gasps from the crowd. Legislation details: The rejected bill introduced by Assembly member Rebecca Bauer-Kahan would have mandated healthcare plans provide menopause treatment recommendations and required medical providers receive specialized training on menopause care, which Berry argued was essential given the governor's handling of women's health issues. Ageism in America discussion: The 59-year-old Oscar winner and Respin menopause care company founder lamented being deemed "past my prime" in American culture, describing how women face pressure to remain "forever 35" and are celebrated for appearing younger while becoming increasingly invisible in Hollywood, workplaces, and social media as they age. Friend, FDA Commissioner Marty Makary confirmed what you and I have known for some time: **Anthony Fauci orchestrated a “massive cover‐up” of the origins of COVID‐19. **

According to Makary, Fauci and his former colleagues commissioned a 2020 report that dismissed the possibility that COVID leaked from a lab in Wuhan, while behind the scenes, they allegedly coerced top virologists to suppress contrary views, rewarded them financially, and misled Congress about dangerous gain‐of‐function research.

So many Americans believed Dr. Fauci. So many relied on that “expertise.” If those experts misled us — whether to protect reputations, preserve power, or protect bureaucracies — then we have a duty to demand the truth.

Your support helps uncover the truth behind this pandemic — and ensures those responsible don’t escape scrutiny.

It helps support pro‐liberty lawmakers in Washington who will push for congressional investigations, reform of public‐health agencies, and protections against future abuse of power.

clean_body: | | | Friend, FDA Commissioner Marty Makary confirmed what you and I have known for some time: Anthony Fauci orchestrated a “massive cover‐up” of the origins of COVID‐19. According to Makary, Fauci and his former colleagues commissioned a 2020 report that dismissed the possibility that COVID leaked from a lab in Wuhan, while behind the scenes, they allegedly coerced top virologists to suppress contrary views, rewarded them financially, and misled Congress about dangerous gain‐of‐function research. This isn’t just about political spin. It’s about real trust. Trust in our public health institutions, trust in the science they claim to uphold, and trust that those entrusted with protecting our lives will be held accountable. So many Americans believed Dr. Fauci. So many relied on that “expertise.” If those experts misled us — whether to protect reputations, preserve power, or protect bureaucracies — then we have a duty to demand the truth. Friend, I’ve spent my career fighting government overreach and demanding transparency. I’ve always believed that power belongs in the hands of Americans, not nameless bureaucrats and shadowy commissions, especially when that power impacts life, liberty, and property. That’s why today I’m asking you to stand with me. Your support helps uncover the truth behind this pandemic — and ensures those responsible don’t escape scrutiny. It helps support pro‐liberty lawmakers in Washington who will push for congressional investigations, reform of public‐health agencies, and protections against future abuse of power. It sends a message: Americans will never sit quietly while their health, safety, and civil liberties are treated like political chess pieces. In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |

# You're Invited! District 25 Virtual Bill Workshop Nov 12th, 7pm - Zoom Link with RSVP
---
| [ ](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/vg3B2u9GjTntPBhxgotBng~~/AAS2yhA~/6jDimv_ZdjmOri_sehUW7aqiL6z-aoz5Dr-gqCP1OzTxcWydHeYJMCfwkLRzU4hvvz73S8C9Me92oTMhnWc1yp5UwQbe3A7fqFz2wY7HIKL-5LpAtVusuaNh5s6tHCo-)

Dear
---
The Office of Delegate Sewell is pleased to invite you to our virtual legislative townhall on Wednesday, December 19th at 6:30pm [via zoom.](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/vg3B2u9GjTntPBhxgotBng~~/AAS2yhA~/6jDimv_ZdjmOri_sehUW7aqiL6z-aoz5Dr-gqCP1OzTxcWydHeYJMCfwkLRzU4hvvz73S8C9Me92oTMhnWc1yp5UwQbe3A7fqFz2wY7HIKL-5LpAtVusuaNh5s6tHCo-) We will provide an overview of Virginia's legislative process and go over some frequently asked questions. Then, we invite you to take part in an open discussion where we discuss community concerns and build them into bill ideas. Delegate Sewell will always carry your feedback to Richmond! [Please complete this RSVP form to receive the Zoom link for the event.](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/vg3B2u9GjTntPBhxgotBng~~/AAS2yhA~/6jDimv_ZdjmOri_sehUW7aqiL6z-aoz5Dr-gqCP1OzTxcWydHeYJMCfwkLRzU4hvvz73S8C9Me92oTMhnWc1yp5UwQbe3A7fqFz2wY7HIKL-5LpAtVusuaNh5s6tHCo-) You will be emailed the link once you sign up, so please check your inbox! These events are non-partisan and family-friendly. All constituents are welcome to join as we respectfully discuss the legislative process.
Questions? Contact my office at DelBSewell@virginia.house.gov

In Service,

name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: They’re calling it the “Mamdani Effect”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
A new wave of young people is stepping up to run for office.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251204-1&t=1&akid=2904%2E587540%2E7wKNKn)
Right now, history is being made, Peter.
The so‐called “**Mamdani Effect** ” — driven by Zohran Mamdani’s breakthrough win — is sparking a surge of young, working‐class, values-driven candidates across the country. Experts now say we could be on the brink of a generational shift in who gets to lead.
Zohran — a 34‐year‐old who ran for Mayor of New York on a platform of affordability, fairness, and real change — didn’t win because of celebrity or corporate backing. He won because people like him finally got a shot, and he led a movement that was powered by grassroots organizing and support from real people.
That shift matters. Because of Mamdani’s victory:
* Organizations mobilizing progressive, under‐40 candidates saw a flood of interest. One group reportedly got **10,000 new people signing up to run for office** within weeks of Zohran’s primary win.

* People across the country who’d felt shut out by politics started believing again — believing they could run, win, and change things.

That’s why organizations like Leaders We Deserve are more important than ever. Because the “Mamdani Effect” won’t sustain itself.
Young, working-class, grassroots candidates don’t win without resources, mentorship, and infrastructure. That’s where we come in, Peter:
**[Can you make a $5 contribution to provide a foundation of support for the new wave of young progressive candidates stepping up to the plate?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251204_1_mamdani.DF0dvM&refcode=em20251204-2904&amount=5&t=2&akid=2904%2E587540%2E7wKNKn)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251204_1_mamdani.DF0dvM&amount=5&refcode=em20251204-2904&t=21&akid=2904%2E587540%2E7wKNKn)**
Your donation today will go directly toward recruiting, training, and supporting candidates who reflect the values of working people. Together we can elect leaders who are ready to fight for justice, affordability, and real representation.
If you want to keep this moment going — if you believe in a future where ordinary people, not billionaires or corporate PACs, win elections — then you’ve got a choice right now.
**Will you support the next generation of unbought progressive leaders?**
[**Donate $5 right now to support the candidates fighting for our future.**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251204_1_mamdani.DF0dvM&refcode=em20251204-2904&amount=5&t=22&akid=2904%2E587540%2E7wKNKn)
Let’s prove that the “Mamdani Effect” is just the beginning.
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251204-1&t=23&refcode2=2904_587540_7wKNKn&akid=2904%2E587540%2E7wKNKn)**

body:
There is no doubt that this has put a huge target on me.
| | | Friend,

**I just blocked 88 Trump nominees from confirmation,** INCLUDING an unqualified Fox News contributor nominated to run America’s drug policy.
---
This comes during a week when Trump pardoned the former president of Honduras, who conspired to flood the U.S. with over 400 tons of cocaine.
At the same time, Pete Hegseth, another unqualified Fox News host, ordered potentially unlawful strikes in the Caribbean.
President Trump and his reckless administration have no regard for the rule of law. That is why I went to the Senate floor and blocked their nominations today.
